clean_body: Accountability is Not ‘Political Retribution’ – It is Justice [INSIDE JW] ACCOUNTABILITY IS NOT ‘POLITICAL RETRIBUTION’ – IT IS JUSTICE [] In my column for The Washington Times, I write how the law must be applied fairly: In America, the rule of law depends upon there being one system of justice for the entire country, but let’s be honest: Until now, that hasn’t been true. The Washington establishment has operated under a double standard: One for them and another for everyone else. James B. Comey [], Letitia “Tish” James [] and John R. Bolton [], all now targeted for or under indictment, are not victims of “retribution,” as the leftist media and Democrats loudly claim. They are facing long-overdue accountability for alleged criminal misconduct tied to abuse of power, deception and the weaponization of government against political opponents and the rule of law itself. The liberal media’s narrative of “revenge” is a convenient distraction. It ignores the years of documented misconduct that helped erode public trust in our institutions — much of which Judicial Watch exposed through litigation and investigations. These cases aren’t about politics; they are about restoring equal justice and integrity to the system that the political left corrupted. The indictment of Mr. Comey, a former FBI director, on charges of obstruction of a congressional proceeding and making false statements, should come as no surprise to those who have followed the man’s record. Judicial Watch uncovered evidence that the FBI retrieved personal memos from Mr. Comey after he left office, which he had either leaked or kept without authorization. We obtained documents showing that he coordinated with Robert Mueller’s team before his 2017 testimony and used his office to promote a baseless case against President Trump. Mr. Comey lied, leaked and obstructed, all to manipulate investigations and preserve the anti-Trump narrative. Now, when he is finally called to answer for those actions, his attorneys accuse Mr. Trump of “personal animus.” That’s nonsense. These charges stem from his own misconduct, not from politics. Accountability isn’t retribution; it’s the law doing what it should have done years ago. Ms. James made her political career by campaigning on the promise to “get Trump.” She smeared him as an “illegitimate president” and then weaponized her position as New York attorney general to pursue baseless civil charges against Mr. Trump and his company. Even a leftist-dominated appellate court in New York rejected Ms. James’ abuse of Mr. Trump and knocked out the abusive fines she sought. Now, when Ms. James herself faces charges of bank fraud and lying to a financial institution, the same media that cheered her partisan crusade portray her as a victim. It’s hypocrisy. The rule of law doesn’t stop applying when the accused is a Democrat with elite connections. For now, the courts have shut down the indictments of Mr. Comey and Ms. James for dubious reasons, but the underlying charges are rightly still being pursued. Then there’s the self-styled “guardian” of national security, Mr. Bolton, who, according to federal prosecutors, mishandled and unlawfully transmitted classified defense information more than a dozen times. More than 1,000 pages of national defense material leaked through his personal accounts, with reckless disregard for security. For years, Mr. Bolton [] cast himself as a “truth teller” against Mr. Trump. Now, he faces 18 federal counts for behavior that placed real intelligence at risk. Everyone with a security clearance knows full well the consequences of publicizing classified information. Mr. Bolton apparently thought the law didn’t apply to him. Once again, the “system” is finally holding a powerful insider accountable. Mr. Trump’s critics, now joined by the same media that cheered lawfare against him for years, claim these indictments mark a dangerous precedent. Yet the real danger lies in pretending that elites such as Messrs. Comey and Bolton and Ms. James are above the law. For years, they targeted citizens and political opponents using the machinery of justice as a weapon. They normalized selective prosecution. The current cases simply return the law to its rightful, impartial place. Abigail Jackson, spokeswoman for the Trump White House, put it plainly in September: “It is the highest form of hypocrisy for Democrats and the media to falsely claim accountability is ‘political retribution’” after years of weaponizing the entire Biden administration. When one side systematically abuses power, restoring accountability will always look like retribution to those who benefited from corruption. Sunlight is the best disinfectant. The law must apply equally, whether your name is Donald Trump, James Comey or John Bolton. Mr. Trump’s administration is not seeking revenge; it is repairing justice. That restoration is not tyranny. It is the republic’s renewal. COURT HEARING HELD FOR DC POLICE BODYCAM FOOTAGE FROM JANUARY 6, 2021 We were in court yesterday for a hearing [] before D.C. Superior Court Judge Carl E. Ross in a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the District of Columbia for local police bodycam footage from January 6, 2021. We filed the June 2024 FOIA lawsuit [] in the U.S. District Court for the District of Columbia after the Metropolitan Police Department (MPD) denied our August 2021 request (Judicial Watch v. District of Columbia [] (No. 2024-CAB-003453)). We are seeking all footage captured by the body-worn cameras of police department officers who responded to the Capitol on January 6. The Metropolitan Police Department continues to withhold the January 6 footage because it claims that the faces and voices of every individual who is not law enforcement personnel in the videos for personal privacy reasons. Because of this, the police department seeks to charge [] us more than $1.5 million so that the police department can redact those faces and voices in the videos, which supposedly contain over one thousand hours of footage. In a September 2025 filing [], we argue that DC’s claim of FOIA’s personal privacy redaction requirement is wrong because no privacy interest exists – and even if it did exist any privacy interest is outweighed by the public’s interest in this case: [Metropolitan Police Department’s bodycam] footage from January 6, 2021 captured a public event on public property. The footage does not reveal private financial information, hospital admission records, social security numbers, medical records or similar materials. The [bodycam] footage only consists of faces and voices that were seen and/or heard by anyone present on public property or has seen other images/videos captured that day. There is nothing whatsoever private about the faces and voices.... If the Court were to find that more than a de minimis privacy interest is implicated by the unredacted disclosure of the [bodycam] footage, the obvious public interest outweighs it.... [L]ike the release of footage from the Capitol surveillance cameras, the release of [the police department’s bodycam] footage “will provide millions of Americans, criminal defendants, public interest organizations, and the media an ability to see for themselves what happened that day, rather than having to rely upon the interpretation of a small group of government officials.” See X post here []. There is no good reason to hide these videos from January 6, and we will continue our fight five years later for the public’s right to see the unedited footage. We have extensively investigated the events of January 6. In July 2025, we sued [] the U.S. Department of Justice for records on accelerated January 6 prosecutions after Donald Trump was elected president in November 2024. The Biden administration, anticipating President-elect Donald Trump’s promise to issue pardons for January 6, 2021, defendants, is believed to have accelerated prosecutions in the final months of Biden’s term. In August 2025, we announced that the U.S. Air Force would finally provide full military funeral honors [] to Ashli Babbitt, the Air Force veteran who was shot and killed inside the U.S. Capitol by then-Capitol Police Lt. Michael Byrd on January 6, 2021. Babbitt was the only official January 6 homicide victim. The Biden administration had previously denied Babbitt and her family these honors in retaliation for being at the U.S. Capitol that day. This decision came on the heels of a massive, nearly $5 million Trump administration settlement [] with her family for wrongful death and other claims against the U.S. Government. Also in August, a Georgia state court issued an order [] in our lawsuit for Georgia District Attorney Fani Willis to provide new information and potentially conduct a new search for Trump-related records because her affidavit to the court made no reference to whether any searches of the devices of former Fulton County Special Prosecutor Nathan Wade or those of Chief Investigator Michael L. Hill, who was involved gathering evidence and coordinating investigative efforts, and likely met [] with the January 6 Committee. In May 2025, we sued [] the U.S. Department of War for records regarding a reported 2021 meeting between then-Attorney General Merrick Garland and then-Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff General Mark Milley during which they discussed President Trump. During the meeting, Milley is alleged to have pressured Garland to target “far-right” militia movements (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Defense [ (No. 1:25-cv-01330)). In April 2025, we filed [] a FOIA lawsuit against the Internal Revenue Service to obtain records related to possible improper targeting of January 6, 2021, Capitol protesters, their supporters, and related nonprofits (Judicial Watch v. Internal Revenue Service [] (No. 1:25-cv-01290)). In February 2025, Judicial Watch sued [] the War Department for information about two conference calls involving then-Chairman of the Joint Chief of Staff Mark Milley with the Departments of Justice, Interior and Homeland Security regarding coordination for the January 6, 2021, election certification (Judicial Watch v. U.S. Department of Defense [] (No. 1:25-cv-00439)). In December 2024, we sued [] the Justice Department for details of a reported meeting between Attorney General Merrick Garland and. Milley in which they discussed President Trump and during which General Milley pressured Garland to target American “far right” militia movements (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice [] (No. 1:24-cv-03380)). MEDICAID MAKES $289 MILLION IN “UNALLOWABLE PAYMENTS” TO DEAD PEOPLE Recent events in Minnesota have made it clear that your tax dollars are carelessly tossed hither and yon. This is particularly true with Medicaid, as our Corruption Chronicles blog reports []. A decade after Judicial Watch reported [] that Medicaid, the government’ s fraud-infested health insurance program for the needy, spent $26 million to provide dead people in one state alone with benefits, a federal audit reveals the problem continues full-throttle with hundreds of millions of dollars in “unallowable payments” on behalf of “deceased enrollees.” It is an unbelievable story that illustrates government inefficiency, especially when it involves welfare programs. The waste has been well documented for many years, yet little has been done to correct the problem. With an annual budget of about $900 billion Medicaid is jointly funded by federal and state governments. The Centers for Medicare & Medicaid Services (CMS) administers the program at the federal level and states have CMS-approved plans to run their Medicaid programs, which provide low-income residents with medical coverage. In some states the government contracts with insurance companies and makes fixed monthly payments to provide coverage. For years, the payments have continued even after the patient died. In other cases, millions of dollars of “unallowable payments” are made on behalf of incarcerated individuals, who lose Medicaid benefits once they are imprisoned because healthcare is provided by correction facilities. In a recent example, Illinois spent at least $9.5 million [] to provide ineligible inmates, who had been enrolled in Medicaid prior to incarceration, with medical benefits. As in many states, the Illinois Department of Corrections Prison Data Match collaborates with Medicaid Managed Care Enrollment Termination to provide a weekly list of incarcerated individuals, and the information is matched against the state’s Medicaid enrollment data to identify incarcerated enrollees, so Medicaid benefits are terminated. Although the system has been in place nationwide for years, a recent Health and Human Services (HHS) Inspector General (IG) probe examined Illinois records and determined that, between 2020 and 2023, at least $9.5 million in unallowable payments were made on behalf of imprisoned Medicaid recipients because the state failed to terminate managed care enrollment after being notified of incarceration. The failure is similar involving dead people, though the price tag is much higher. Since 2016 the HHS IG has conducted 18 audits identifying that Medicaid agencies improperly made about $289 million [] in payments on behalf of recipients after they died. Even after all these years, “states continue to struggle with the issue,” according to the recently published audit. Investigators found that Medicaid agencies throughout the country doled out the money for the healthcare of deceased beneficiaries even though the deaths were officially recorded in the Social Security Administration’s Death Master File. In most cases the cash kept flowing, the HHS watchdog confirms, writing that “we determined that Medicaid agencies made unallowable capitation payments after enrollees’ deaths for 99 of the 100 sample payments.” Some of the overpayments were recovered by the government but the overwhelming majority were not, sticking it to American taxpayers as so many bloated welfare programs regularly do. Improper payments have been a long-standing and significant problem in the federal government, according to the Government Accountability Office (GAO), the investigative arm of Congress, and Medicaid is among the biggest offenders. In fiscal year 2024 the GAO found that Medicaid made an estimated $31.1 billion [] in improper payments, which is equal to about five percent of the program’s total spending. A year earlier the HHS watchdog reported that 14 states made over $249 million in unallowable payments on behalf of dead people with 11 of those failing to consistently identify and process beneficiaries’ death information. A few years ago, an Oregon state audit revealed that $445 million in Medicaid benefits were paid to beneficiaries enrolled in one or more other states, including tens of millions for people covered under California and Washington state’s Medicaid program. NIH TO RECONSIDER FROZEN DEI, GENDER IDENTITY GRANTS WORTH MILLIONS Feeding at the federal trough continues, with various leftwing groups and officials fighting in court to retain a grab bag of questionable grants. Our Corruption Chronicles_ blog explains []. A portion of diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) grants frozen or denied by the National Institutes of Health (NIH) last year will be reviewed and possibly reinstated by the Trump administration to appease the left. Worth hundreds of millions of dollars, the rejected grants also fund research related to LGBTQ+ and transgender issues as well as gender identity, areas of study that do not meet the administration’s priorities. That is why last spring the NIH, which invests most of its $48 billion budget [] [ medical research, nixed grants flagged for DEI, transgender, LGBTQ+ and other leftist projects that received large sums of taxpayer dollars under Biden. Some were buried among the 50,000 grants the NIH awards annually to more than 300,000 researchers at over 2,500 universities and medical schools nationwide, but the Trump administration plucked them out and revoked them. Thousands of grants worth billions of dollars were targeted over DEI, gender identity and LGBTQ+ research. Predictably, legal action ensued and several lawsuits were filed by researchers, unions, civil rights groups and a coalition of Democratic states that saw $783 million in frozen DEI grants. That federal lawsuit, filed by attorneys general in Massachusetts, California, Maryland, Washington, Arizona, Colorado, Delaware, Hawaii, Minnesota, Nevada, New Jersey, New Mexico, New York, Oregon, Rhode Island and Wisconsin alleges the Trump administration violated the U.S. Constitution and the Administrative Procedure Act by unreasonably delaying the review and disposition of applications for NIH grants submitted by researchers. Another lawsuit [], filed by a leftwing civil right group, says a plaintiff whose research focuses on sexual violence in minority communities had six grants terminated and another that studied the promotion of mental and physical health among black men. An Ivy League professor lost her NIH grant focusing on obstetrical outcomes for lesbian, gay, bisexual and queer women, while another frozen award funded research on the mental health impacts of laws targeting the LGBTQ+ population. In the case filed by the states, a trial court and an appeals court in Massachusetts sided with the attorneys general, but the U.S. Supreme Court later ruled [] [ the trial judge lacked the authority to compel the grants to be paid. The states asked the Supreme Court to leave the lower court’s order in place, claiming that the termination of the DEI grants “caused unrecoverable loss of scientific knowledge” and would inflict incalculable losses in public health and human life. The high court did not agree with its 5-4 decision setting aside the lower court rulings and allowing the Trump administration to cancel hundreds of millions of dollars in NIH grants involving DEI. The ruling certainly makes it tougher for grant recipients who challenge the Trump administration’s changes to federal funding based on its new DEI and gender identity policies. The Supreme Court decision undoubtedly gives the government the upper hand to withhold taxpayer dollars for research that involves wasteful projects prioritized by the previous administration. That makes the Trump administration’s decision to review and possibly reinstate the canceled DEI grants puzzling. In a settlement agreement [] recently signed by the Department of Justice (DOJ) and the attorneys general who sued the administration, the NIH agrees to consider hundreds of grants worth $783 million without taking into account DEI. The document was filed in Massachusetts federal court on Dec. 29 and the state’s attorney general, Andrea Joy Campbell, calls it a victory against unlawful directives [] that targeted NIH projects based on their perceived connection to DEI, transgender issues, vaccine hesitancy and other topics disfavored by the Trump administration. Under the agreement NIH officials “will complete their consideration of the Applications in the ordinary course of NIH’s scientific review process, without applying the Challenged Directives.” This clearly refers to the Trump administration’s ban on funding controversial DEI, transgender and gender identity research. The NIH also commits to “evaluate each application individually and in good faith.” Until next week, [Contribute] [] [32x32x1] [] [32x32x2] [] [32x32x3] [] [32x32x3] [] Judicial Watch, Inc. 425 3rd St Sw Ste 800 Washington, DC 20024 202.646.5172 © 2017 - 2026, All Rights Reserved Manage Email Subscriptions [] |

name: Committee To Elect Zuri For CD5
subject: Event Today: March for Renee Good
body:
Today, Saturday January 10th, 3:30pm Acacia Park

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/f7ed20f6b737/happy-new-year-a-bit-of-what-ive-been-up-to-4792651?e=738470dca6)
---
|
---
| | | | | |
# Hi Everyone!

---
| | **I missed sharing this event:********Also:** Check your voter registration.You must affiliate as a Democrat in El Paso County, CO by **February 1st, 2026** to participate in EPCO Dem Caucus and Assembly in March.
Go to the Secretary of State’s [Website](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=8c0d216aaf&e=738470dca6) to check your registration and change your affiliation to Democrat.
**Campaign event: Please join us for a Caucus/Assembly training on****Sunday, January 11th, 2026 between 10am-1pm.****Respond to this email for the address.** If you can’t make it in person we will have an online training Wednesday, January 14th at 6pm.Register [here](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=12208a5ea5&e=738470dca6)****
**Then go to the ICE out of Colorado protest in honor of****Renee Nicole Good, the mother murdered by ICE:******
**Here’s a picture from one of Renee friends and a little bit about her:**

**Update on Edwin and Mari: Colorado Springs community member abducted and abused by ICE in Texas and Oklahoma:** We have been able to connect them with local immigrant rights organizations. The Pikes Peak Bulletin just did an [in depth story](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=762ca3e7ed&e=738470dca6) and will have updates. Mari was also interviewed on [Don Lemon](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=7b214e5a15&e=738470dca6). We have also reached out to AG Weiser’s office, three CO US Representatives, and both Colorado Senators.We want to continue to protect Edwin and the four men who (allegedly for legal purposes) witnessed an elderly man being pulled naked out of the shower and then beaten in Blue Bonnet detention facilities in Texas. We do not know the condition of the elderly man who left bloody on a gurney. Here’s a link to the audio recordings from [ICE custody](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=a21312220e&e=738470dca6)
See you at [Caucus and Assembly in March](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=0473e75f14&e=738470dca6).
Let’s fight for a better country.
With heart,Zuri Horowitz

**No Contract, No Coffee.**
****
---
| | **Listen to my**[**podcast**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=0c1ef299f5&e=738470dca6)**episode with Loving the Springs!****We talk about the importance of putting people first when it comes to all areas of policy.**
---
[|
---](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=eb3e436c7f&e=738470dca6)
| | **Updates:**[**Donate**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=41ec75dc8d&e=738470dca6)**-** We made our first [ad](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=91ef4abda7&e=738470dca6) with an Emmy winning editor. Now we need enough money to hire staff, and expand our outreach via door knocking, texts, postcards, and mailers.
[**Volunteer**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=c597e786cd&e=738470dca6)**-** Our outreach strategy will rely on volunteers & minimize paper waste. If you haven’t signed up already, please do!
**Social Media \- **We have the biggest community on [**TikTok**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=927c10c64c&e=738470dca6)**** out of all of the candidates (we made it to 1700+ people), second biggest community on [**Instagram**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=feafa037c7&e=738470dca6) , and we’ve got a ways to go on [**Facebook**](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=f9eba13478&e=738470dca6).
Your _follows_ , _likes_ , and _shares_ help a lot to let people know about our campaign!
---
| [Subscribe to my email list](https://zuriforcd5.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0f6e59d8f916735599a3b9efd&id=d808055e82&e=738470dca6)

name: James O'Keefe
subject: The investigations that made them sweat in 2025
body:
I shared the numbers. Today I want to share the stories. Because behind every statistic is a corrupt official who thought they'd never be caught.

Dear Friend,
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqnc7g17675poh4vuluiu7lj9s3prhpjq01k8mvg_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1gm6ob4clh2bs) Yesterday I shared the numbers. Today I want to share the stories. Because behind every statistic is a corrupt official who thought they'd never be caught. A bureaucrat who assumed no one was watching. An institution that believed it was above accountability. **They were wrong. And we have the footage to prove it.** Here are five investigations from 2025 that changed the game:
* **1\. THE $100 BILLION FEDERAL CONTRACTING SCAM (October)**
* We exposed ATI Government Solutions exploiting the SBA's 8(a) minority contracting program -- outsourcing 80% of their work while pocketing over $100 million in no-bid contracts. This wasn't a one-off. It was a systemic scheme across multiple agencies.
* **THE RESULT:** SBA suspension. $253 million in contracts halted. A $9 billion Treasury Department audit. Seven additional companies suspended. And a 15-year review of 8(a) contracts across every federal agency.
* **2\. GAO DATA THEFT CONFESSION (November)**
* A GAO director admitted on hidden camera that staff "stole and backed up" vaccine data specifically to block RFK Jr.'s HHS reforms. They weren't just resisting policy -- they were breaking federal law.
* **THE RESULT:** The director's profile was scrubbed. A federal investigation was launched. And the nation finally saw what "deep state resistance" actually looks like.
* **3\. NIH PORTRAIT DESTRUCTION (December)**
* NIH contractor Joseph Olmert confessed on camera to destroying official portraits of President Trump, Vice President Vance, RFK Jr., and Dr. Jay Bhattacharya. That's a potential 10-year federal felony -- destruction of government property.
* **THE RESULT:** Contractor FIRED. NIH internal investigation launched. And a national conversation about the defiance embedded in our federal agencies.
* **4\. GEORGETOWN PROFESSOR EXPOSED (December)**
* We caught a Georgetown professor on hidden camera calling Black conservatives "coons" and mocking "stupid white people." When we confronted him, he tried to assault our cameraman. Police were called.
* **THE RESULT:** Georgetown wiped his bio from their website. The footage went viral -- over 2 million views. And elite academic bias was laid bare for all to see.
* **5\. INSIDE EPSTEIN 'S ISLAND (May-December)**
* We released the first-ever footage from inside Jeffrey Epstein's private island mansion. We confronted a DOJ Deputy Chief who admitted plans to redact Republicans from the Epstein files. We published unredacted photos that Democrats tried to hide.
* **THE RESULT:** DOJ was forced to respond. Media outlets issued corrections. Joe Rogan covered our findings. And the truth about elite corruption reached millions who had been kept in the dark.

_This is what your support produces._ Not theories. Not speculation. **Results.** We're now at **$81,000 raised** -- just **$19,000 away** from hitting our $100,000 goal. [**Every dollar you give is still matched.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpq2p1oam8cv4r79253daptulsg4il3db1ri60to_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1gm6ob4clh2bs) And [**every donor**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpst3igceqgga1hh8qphrsjttagu1ate9uund53o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1gm6ob4clh2bs) receives our exclusive 2025 Year-End Review. **SPECIAL DONOR THANK-YOU GIFTS:**
* **$100+:** Hardcover copy of _American Pravda_
* **$250+:** Personally SIGNED hardcover
* **$500+:** Personal phone call from me

**Midnight is right around the corner. $19,000 to go.**[**Let 's finish this together.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi6e1n7o7qacdv2bhd1fbc3tvb8bke0665afst1g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1gm6ob4clh2bs) For the truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group
**P.S.** These investigations don't happen by accident. They happen because you fund them. **[**Give now and double your impact before the match expires**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfmv1tfi0bpi74i572kea241bafkvacnjf7v24ro_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1gm6ob4clh2bs).**

---

name: Must Read
subject: SHOCKING FBI REPORT: China Attacks U.S. Power Grid
body:
Govt officials send chilling warning
---
| | | | | |
---
| | | | | [View in browser](https://view.parlermailer.com/?qs=09e54052ba48dd85ab2d1a3e89779a4d2addf2a11e14c9c8e544292aa5ac6256d30c147d28f4e9fdc62e76c64f53e3644dc0d286fe6b1e2b5730faa7533f7efa3867381a8d39609dc33569873c3a9448 "View in Browser")
---
_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| SHOCKING FBI REPORT: China Attacks U.S. Power Grid | **SHOCKING REPORT:** **CHINA ATTACKS U.S. POWER GRID** [](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=67d5ea8b7dfd6a975f42a246133be1e4cb54a825aecd37115eba62acd684ec8fc953a799b2189b3bcf7d561db35e0499bc84c7da1d8524b69c47d0ea6a851975) **National Security Reports China's Attacks On Critical U.S. Electric Grid, Food Supply and Water Systems** The FBI warns that China has gained access to electric companies throughout the U.S., and experts are now urging Americans to protect their homes. A new alarming report reveals over 70 attacks on America's power grid in just one year, and these are calculated strikes designed to weaken our nation's most essential lifeline. Security experts have raised the alarm for years about the most vulnerable aspect of infrastructure in the United States that puts you and your family in critical danger: **Our crumbling electric grid.** _Officials report that attacks on just 9 of the nation's 55,000 electrical substations could result in nationwide blackouts for up to 18 months._ Your life would be frozen in time right at the moment the power fails. Lights all over the country would go out, throwing people into total chaos and darkness. | | |
---
### District 46,
As we go into our second week of session, I want to tell you how thankful I am for all the engagement and participation I am continuously seeing from our community.

Even during this first week, I have seen constituents in our Statehouse, have had folks reaching out about legislation and have seen neighbors educating friends and loved ones about important updates in our state. We have seen time and time again that this is what it takes to create change, and it is so inspiring every time our community rises to the occasion.

To stay engaged, use** [iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf398d06cb5971653b40abd54156b4f9786175831879a0171e1db02a57fd90bf98e3b9226c6120c9e1ed8532a67d6e3040a1 "iga.in.gov") to follow legislation, watch committees and find more information to stay involved. **
**⬇️ Watch my Welcome Back Message below ⬇️**
---
| [](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf3961344148eeb79c7831d4a704cf48e077a645c233143afa29027572e89c0baa60f57020820dfea03871b1853d9526fa30)
---
* * *
---
|
---
### We are working on real results, right now.

My colleagues and I have been hearing directly from Hoosiers from every corner of our state, and so many folks are saying the same thing: **there is an affordability crisis. **

Hoosiers from every background are having to work too hard just to get by.

**What if we created an Indiana where Hoosiers could thrive?**

Your Senate Democrats are working alongside you to deliver that Indiana by:
* Easing the stress of rising utility bills
* Addressing the child care crisis head-on
* Creating affordable housing
* Ensuring families are not bankrupted because they need health care

We have an opportunity this session to get one step closer to an Indiana where every Hoosier can live with dignity, but we need your help.

**Stay Engaged. **

If there is a bill you are passionate about, call the chair of the committee the bill is assigned to and ask them to hear it.

If there is a bill being heard in committee, come to the statehouse and testify.

Remember this is your government, this is your statehouse and your legislators work for you.
**⬇️Read more about our legislation below⬇️**

# **This Week in Committee**
---
|
---
### During the first week of session, I served on the following committees:
* [Pensions and Labor](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf392c7ebe6bcad4e684fe63027ed1779cafb248bf8490a4fad1c3958af39a7e05cf11cd355ce8ab4d426a81b7eeb5de3864 "Pensions and Labor")
* [Education and Career Development](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf3933e867e3efdd8d9ce069f4a48864c8d14b4fe33a1bc2d7b2d0c2523f591a48697bbe0775300f93ffad686d09d7cffc59 "Education and Career Development")
* [Commerce and Technology](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39b7440730df9d77f08fa55aca5bc3596b0a2624f525ce6206f726a4e3b16e4fdc56cc23f41bc29828dfcf88de62b306ed "Commerce and Technology ")
* [Tax and Fiscal](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39f83f5c9dbdbabda977eea357786335325ee5a519749eec68d570578520aba18139969344fe839dffb6f5754e1e1a8005 "Tax and Fiscal ")

**Session is in full swing this week, and with that comes a full committee schedule. **

I served on four different committees tackling a wide range of legislation.

In**Pensions and Labor** , we passed a bill ([SB 63](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39dad88bcab1a772886e95659a77d14ed79b12b3c11de5643224c5b914b9aa015627381798189207ef15158cb52bc695d3 "SB 63")) guaranteeing a needed 13th check for our public retirees who spent their careers serving our state.

The **Education and Career Development** Committee brought the topic of phones in the classroom to the forefront with [SB 78](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf3999144b6dcdccf35e79351f98d6f72bb075b5f4dee3a9f06a8f09da3807411e844ae2114fe917fe90fe49c213e855ac4b "SB 78") as we work to limit distractions in the classroom.

We have a state bird, a state flower and a state snack. Could a state sandwich be next? This became one step closer to reality with the**Commerce and Technology** committee advancing a bill ([SB 21](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39aa2eb1db4ee0d7b7c09b406ca6bb84aa08e20a0d89850c7f387e9914380cd0f89a87d6d3c52955d70fdd1912ff3cbb1d "SB 21")) that would make the pork tenderloin, made with Indiana-raised pork, our state sandwich.

This summer, **[we learned of the damage that would be caused by the federal reconciliation bill, sometimes referred to as the Big Beautiful Bill.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39059291218e65815dde230c9c26aadef10c0edf114205037e0be2fcf6d9542c92fca735093ab39cbd00ff2b620104f209 "we learned of the damage that would be caused by the federal reconciliation bill, sometimes referred to as the Big Beautiful Bill.") **In the Tax and Fiscal committee, we heard legislation ([SB 212](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf3964d08ef1d71a1c4249d0c5c6d8a507b8cfc709de4d1bc5c94ab238f5da6e7627296a952ed7c1ca0351d1661abf4f27c7 "SB 212")) that would conform the Indiana code to the federal reconciliation bill.

Bills passed out of these committees next go in front of the entire Senate to be potentially amended on second reading and then voted on for a final time on third reading.

Stream committees and follow along with legislation at: **[iga.in.gov](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf398d06cb5971653b40abd54156b4f9786175831879a0171e1db02a57fd90bf98e3b9226c6120c9e1ed8532a67d6e3040a1 "iga.in.gov")**
* * *
---
# **Martindale-Brightwood Data Center Public Comment Opportunity**
---
|
---

* * *
---
# **IBLC Announces Working Families, Winning Futures Agenda**
---
|
---
I was happy to join my Indiana Black Legislative Caucus colleagues in unveiling the legislation included in our _Working Families, Winning Futures_ platform for the 2026 legislative session.

For this platform, I authored **[SB 152](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf3943976174dce2ed72233bb31046488acaa45b0372a1756d4c2e5b0964a00cb0ddabc87b78046034f8777ce4de5a116c29 "SB 152")** to address rising utility bills head-on.

**Did you know utilities can pass lobbying, legal or entertainment costs to ratepayers?**

My bill would change that.

It would also **protect households from service shutoffs during extreme weather and eliminate reconnect fees** , as well as**ensure a local municipality or charitable trust has the right of first refusal in the sale or transfer of a public utility. **

I am excited to work with my colleagues in the IBLC to create an Indiana that works for all.
* * *
---
# **All the Bills I Filed this Session**
---
**I am so excited to share the seven bills I authored for this legislative session.

All of these bills represent real conversations I have had with constituents, and I am so honored to advocate for these issues and opportunities this session. ** **⬇️ Read more about my bills by clicking below ⬇️**
---
|
---
* * *
# **NAACP Advocacy Day**
---
|
---
**I was thrilled to share highlights from the Senate Democrats ' Affordability Platform with members of the NAACP alongside my colleague Sen. La Keisha Jackson.**

I was inspired by the passion and shared determination for a better Indiana on display today, and I am so grateful to work alongside you in that endeavor.
---
* * *
---
|
---
### **Applications close January 15th. **
Blind or Disabled Hoosiers can receive a $125 tax credit towards their property taxes if they own a home or are buying one on a recorded contract.

Even if you had received the deduction in the past, please apply for the credit by Jan. 15 to ensure no disruptions.
**[Marion County Residents Can Apply Here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39936b8d7819c1428982e13418f35dfbf1aafee42fc930e2632454705fb20303c1ebccc537594a6e98158eb5b67eeb7f16 "Marion County Residents Can Apply Here")**
* * *
---
|
---
### Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program
The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply [online](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf3989f8c1374c38fe910529a657258d7fca151cb7c6314b6388fc0daca6a498a1e91d31a5cfc590502f15f4d969d63b0032 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$"), by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's [LIHEAP site](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf3989f8c1374c38fe910529a657258d7fca151cb7c6314b6388fc0daca6a498a1e91d31a5cfc590502f15f4d969d63b0032 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.in.gov/ihcda/homeowners-and-renters/low-income-home-energy-assistance-program-liheap/__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHdM0-IFVw$").

In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find _[AES's program here](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39299864cb8089a7b2ffc43702515e19e5c23a84b01596ec7760c2065c7d5536b66ae49300171d6fd73713bf6915fb91e3 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https://www.aesindiana.com/payment-assistance__;!!FlTQaCg!jwpfitqHKx4bP-5cnhYvoAX1m8Q0kv3P901-pv7dMHXQdpRgas_bRhhF66AOaSuHe8tMuc2p6moGi_XjArAanOEmX3Q$") [.](https://click.subscription.in.gov/?qs=27aedb56f67fbf39d523a160fc5f5a7330d1decbb35e77915d57fba785fda6ea882d3507fe788e383df74e41a64b8d993d8ddda91ad17546 "https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/www.nipsco.com/bills-and-payments/financial-support__;!!FlTQaCg!i0IlNmwztWy24u3OfjflEyvBopYLxqtX54ZBOGpkRIGHfA-g0F4tvn2RkRjwIClxVywwPaZ8QxM8BqUkhHfV2_ol6Q$")_

As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility.

Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on.

The Education and Career Development Committee brought the topic of phones in the classroom to the forefront with "SB 78" as we work to limit distractions in the classroom. We have a state bird, a state flower and a state snack. Could a state sandwich be next? This became one step closer to reality with theCommerce and Technology committee advancing a bill ( "SB 21") that would make the pork tenderloin, made with Indiana-raised pork, our state sandwich. This summer, "we learned of the damage that would be caused by the federal reconciliation bill, sometimes referred to as the Big Beautiful Bill." In the Tax and Fiscal committee, we heard legislation ( "SB 212") that would conform the Indiana code to the federal reconciliation bill. Bills passed out of these committees next go in front of the entire Senate to be potentially amended on second reading and then voted on for a final time on third reading. Stream committees and follow along with legislation at: "iga.in.gov" Martindale-Brightwood Data Center Public Comment Opportunity | IBLC Announces Working Families, Winning Futures Agenda | I was happy to join my Indiana Black Legislative Caucus colleagues in unveiling the legislation included in our Working Families, Winning Futures platform for the 2026 legislative session. For this platform, I authored "SB 152" to address rising utility bills head-on. Did you know utilities can pass lobbying, legal or entertainment costs to ratepayers? My bill would change that. It would also protect households from service shutoffs during extreme weather and eliminate reconnect fees , as well asensure a local municipality or charitable trust has the right of first refusal in the sale or transfer of a public utility. I am excited to work with my colleagues in the IBLC to create an Indiana that works for all. All the Bills I Filed this Session I am so excited to share the seven bills I authored for this legislative session. All of these bills represent real conversations I have had with constituents, and I am so honored to advocate for these issues and opportunities this session. ⬇️ Read more about my bills by clicking below ⬇️ | NAACP Advocacy Day | I was thrilled to share highlights from the Senate Democrats ' Affordability Platform with members of the NAACP alongside my colleague Sen. La Keisha Jackson. I was inspired by the passion and shared determination for a better Indiana on display today, and I am so grateful to work alongside you in that endeavor. | Applications close January 15th. Blind or Disabled Hoosiers can receive a $125 tax credit towards their property taxes if they own a home or are buying one on a recorded contract. Even if you had received the deduction in the past, please apply for the credit by Jan. 15 to ensure no disruptions. "Marion County Residents Can Apply Here" | Low-Income Home Energy Assistance Program The Energy Assistance Program's (EAP) application is now live until April 20, 2026. You can apply "$", by mail or in person. To apply in person or request a paper application form, applicants must contact their local service provider (LSP). For more information on which LSP serves an area, be sure to check the map available on Indiana's "$". In addition to this program, Indiana's utilities have financial assistance programs available, as well as other tools that can help customers manage their bills. You can find "$" "$" As a reminder, the winter moratorium runs from December 1 through March 15 and prevents disconnection of residential energy utility service to any customer who is eligible for and has applied for the Energy Assistance Program. Moratorium protection applies once a household submits an application and allows the Local Service Provider time to determine eligibility. Utility bills continue to rise, and what should be an essential service has become an overwhelming burden for many families. If you're eligible, please take advantage of the available resources so you don't have to choose between keeping food on the table and keeping the lights on. | | | News Around Our State | | "State senator files bill to create state oversight office for mental health facilities" | "$" "$" "$"_ COMMUNITY RESOURCES To view my community resources guide, "click here. " | | | | | | | | | Created and distributed by the Indiana Senate Democratic Communications office mailto:Nancy.Singh@iga.in.gov mailto:Chester.Bryant@iga.in.gov mailto:Molly.Neary@iga.in.gov ---|---|--- | This email was sent by: Indiana General Assembly** 200 W. Washington St. Indianapolis, IN, 46204, US

name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsd0ljaso785u9cve7ec62hlvdesosm1ff8qt4k8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfphkrpl1lpchmio34a4unm9oekrn95ni135l0j0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsff5pecbue5jdbne6iompup8f35k9cgh4743j5o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdns25jv11qv3e8ce71j7nghse7fbpm5igapb098_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5fq07t438lkodhtm9i24mhdr1n627ot24b25jn8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjfvfm0oue42q17sgeanq3fa51n2n2kontun65so_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp8rrvt61j7940e5sgqubj6kjmkltdu6vobkm34o_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0e65ars8atdeknimomut3392gcar2b4s7eie8fo_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0d6o31jb0fpikupgojj3m1luvfapoockq63l3f8_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z2ger2k72np3b0gb4ttnkjtufpkuuv8qvhagjfq0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)
---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**
---
| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z1v8o3lg71p2giht1r4t6upaincl27r81gls27d0_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)
---
| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqp9l0sq42jqo80oiom4e97523128k4mf67tu64g_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zjojds24nt232lkgj7iclopkd14qj124ktjb1n80_rp22sh2s8i6eor0s1imcor2chh2bs)**
---

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 1.9.2026
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-azdkdt-didthutlhu-v/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-r/) Patriot,We hope everyone had a wonderful Christmas and New Year's! With 2026 kicking off, our team is hitting the ground running as we head into the non-partisan elections on April 7th, then the General Election in November!This year is bound to be busy, and getting involved now is the best way to stay informed! Join your local county party by visiting [wisgop.org/county-parties/](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-y/).-Team WisGOP **Defeat Radical Progressive Chris Taylor****Chris Taylor is a radical progressive who will use the Wisconsin Supreme Court to push far-left values.** As one of the most liberal members of the state legislature, Taylor's extreme record has stayed mostly hidden outside Dane County. Now, after her "liberal express lane" elections and appointment by Tony Evers, she must answer for her partisan past. Wisconsinites will reject the radical policies she represents.**Taylor prioritizes left-wing agendas over blind justice.** She has shown blatant political opportunism, reversing positions to chase big donors and special interests, as exposed by the [Milwaukee Journal Sentinel](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-j/). Her campaign mirrors far-left tactics to keep money flowing, proving she bends principles for power. Wisconsin needs justices who prioritize the state's interests, not dark money or activism.**Taylor chose ideology over protecting victims and families.** She voted [**NO** twice on Marsy's Law](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-t/), defying the 75% of Wisconsinites who approved victims' rights in 2020. Worse, her own campaign treasurer helped challenge this popular amendment. She also pushed [anti-ICE measures, immigration protections, in-state tuition for illegal immigrants, and driver's licenses for non-citizens.](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-i/) Taylor is unfit for the bench.**It's time to act!** Chris Taylor's radical views on victims' rights, immigration, and judicial activism make her a danger to Wisconsin's courts. [Volunteer](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-d/), [donate](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-h/), and [spread the word](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-k/) about her record. Educate every voter before the April 7, 2026, election. Let's keep the judiciary focused on justice, not far-left agendas. Get involved today! **Take Action!****We need Letter to the Editor Signers!**
Become a Letter to the Editor (LTE) signer and help get the Republican message out to every community across the state. LTE volunteers are critical to continuing to advance our Republican values. Our goal is to have groups in every county who submit LTEs regularly. These groups will have resources provided from our team, including talking points, draft LTEs, and submission instructions. If you have any questions, please reach out to our Communications Director, Anika Rickard, at [arickard@wisgop.org](mailto:arickard@wisgop.org). [BECOME A LTE SIGNER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-u/) **Become a Poll Observer!**
Missed the poll worker deadline? Don't worry, there's still time to become a poll observer. Sign up below! [BECOME A POLL OBSERVER!](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-o/)
# **Top Shareable Content**
[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-b/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-n/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-p/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-a/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-f/)[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-azdkdt-didthutlhu-z/) | [ Share ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-fb-azdkdt-didthutlhu-g/) | [ Tweet ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-tw-azdkdt-didthutlhu-w/) | [ Forward ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.forwardtomyfriend.com/y-didthutlhu-931243C5-azdkdt-l-yd)
---|---|---

Johnson Street | Madison, WI 53703 [Preferences](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.updatemyprofile.com/y-azdkdt-931243C5-didthutlhu-yh) | [Unsubscribe](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-u-azdkdt-didthutlhu-yk/)

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | China just launched a new kind of threat — and it’s already in mass production. The YKJ-1000 hypersonic missile hits Mach 7, twists mid-air, and slips past U.S. defenses — for just $99,000 — as cheap as a disposable attack drone. That’s not a typo. At that price, China could launch swarms at Taiwan, U.S. bases, or allied fleets — overwhelming American defenses in minutes. Intercepting just one could cost the U.S. up to 40× more — with no guarantee it’ll work. For the first time in U.S. military history, a foreign weapon this cheap can outrun every defense system we have. And yet... no one in Washington is saying a word. | | Sponsored Content | • | Salem Media Group ---|--- • | Behind the Markets • | FinanceBuzz | | | | | brоught tо уоu bу **Іnception Media, LLC. tо stоp rеcеiving mаrkеting cоmmunicаtiоn frоm us. Fееl frее tо еmаil ussupport@firstinvestmentupdates.com 600 N Broad St Ste 5 PMB 1 Middletown, DE 19709 Іnception Media, LLC. Аll rights rеsеrvеd ** | | |

name: The Flyover
subject: Taking Greenland, NFL Wild Card Weekend, and a Bear Squatter
body:
President Trump said Friday that the U.S. will acquire Greenland [“whether they like it or not”](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMHO2yAMgJ-G3FwRQkty4LBLbv-uO0YUnMQrgQ7cVnn7iU3aC0yyLEu2Pvvzj6_ly1GktH13B1pe85LwUyMyY1nYPShtW0FM0aWQ1vihGLwri5LqBrKHXi7BUTwX3QW7IiocOrS9uY1SD0qbbrdTuE_jODod9HXQepi8u0tvhslNxgRnOrKNJvu-hVHmMhh59WHA8X7VUksltMRAnMvlZ6bEO67xzG8sF5-PLtqd-VnF8E2oWag5nc9cubWEmhtYqFn2LU1Cza8Kze9v9aEYwflfLyoI_yzhsyPvWIB3PCHSA4EYcoGUGbi8jidUd1bgDPeY_QP8Tsm1gfKqlRysJR8QMqUNahZq7ooNz7aL6s0ILbfDUfxzO__Xw99W_Q4AAP__nUeVTQ) because “if we don’t do it, China or Russia will.”

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM3OnDAMRZ8m7EDOD4RvkUWl0eym2y4jQwy4DQGFMKN5-4pp1Reo5JXPlX11fjz8Azlymr_jSq5Mm0_0OiKVQtkX_MVpnjNRiphCmuKLYxgxewWqq0HWEnxAjm9vquAmIkW6Iidt14PRythqcbbXMJgWUCoMKK225muQw9Aq6FpFQ8XuugZSXmOVbbSFdgya-qE1YEAJAxS4bLn5uXEqC03xvT0pN-O2VtEtpeyH0N-Eugt15_SkozRT3lJhynhcqQvp-1lWf2xnHknoG63IUajuWq4U-FyFvu3Iod4xl0T5WHj_y0dcd-Q5fRL_oOyh1q32fzSciQt6A1-9AmM7K6vswv7iGPnorDAwXw8_lct_eX469TsAAP__i3eQzA) | |
# Saturday, January 10, 2026
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1776, Thomas Paine published [_Common Sense_](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ8GOqO1ceykcHENXa69Em3wApszNrKdIN7-lOje4Jem-0aj0ffnPt6RA8flN27k6pzGSEcJVCvlseJfjsuSiWLA6OMcDg5-wjwqUEaAFBJGjxzOUbfezUSK-pactOYKulfatquzEtWkZ22gvyCCAaM9Xc1tBkm3B-iW3WcNpPzEKtv1Fi6T7-n6uGjQoBoN5Lmm3D0Tx7rSHM70ptxNaWuDW2vdS9P_atTQqOE4jm7lUlM-P7xRQ125CI-n4Cj-k0YNT4wvzKeQ8K2kDYvYkSOJ_fUIXFYqYkrblqIoFAu12fn94BC4GNtoWDbk8H1Qf6Tt7dS_AAAA__8-Q4Jp), presenting arguments for American independence. Pamphlets, although rarely used today, were crucial for spreading ideas from the 16th to the 19th centuries. ## Border Patrol Agent Shoots 2 in Oregon
Two people were wounded Thursday in east Portland when a [Border Patrol agent shot them](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuxCAQRL8Gd7Zgwfa5oEjj7tKmtLBZMAkHJ7w6dH8fkV-ItMVKM5rRm6_7djchhuQ_zQM1ubwlrFdEIiwbmZ-QvC-IKZpkk4s1RHuYsgGHqeeiF3yzJsT3pjqrHSKg7FCLebpxJUHN3alHmEbnQIK6LWaESSzgpl2iW9QOchFd0C2NC9FuhnmQMx8PK_G2j4orDkxxtIFyGb5zSHSii-_8wjIc-dFFfRI9LyY_GKwM1lrrcOxXo2g6g7W9DNZnLtQo-lzQ59RfZ84Uku8dWiwm9sZjoubsirbPGmIM1zQzxf3DhPhXRv9a6KXhNwAA__-SwXpx) during a targeted vehicle stop that the Department of Homeland Security says turned into an attempted ramming and self-defense shooting. DHS identified them as Luis David Nico Moncada and Yorlenys Betzabeth Zambrano-Contreras, a married couple that U.S. officials said were suspected associates of Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua gang, charging that they entered the country illegally in 2022 and 2023, respectively. Police said officers arrived after an afternoon 911 call, then [found the injured man and woman](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuxCAQRL8Gd7Zgwfa5oEjj7tKmtLBZMAkHJ7w6dH8fkV-ItMVKM5rRm6_7djchhuQ_zQM1ubwlrFdEIiwbmZ-QvC-IKZpkk4s1RHuYsgGHqeeiF3yzJsT3pjqrHSKg7FCLebpxJUHN3alHmEbnQIK6LWaESSzgpl2iW9QOchFd0C2NC9FuhnmQMx8PK_G2j4orDkxxtIFyGb5zSHSii-_8wjIc-dFFfRI9LyY_GKwM1lrrcOxXo2g6g7W9DNZnLtQo-lzQ59RfZ84Uku8dWiwm9sZjoubsirbPGmIM1zQzxf3DhPhXRv9a6KXhNwAA__-SwXpx) about three miles away a few minutes later. Both were hospitalized in unknown condition. Portland Police Chief Bob Day said police were assisting an FBI-led probe and Oregon’s attorney general opened a separate review.

You can read how it turned out in our Et Cetera section below. As AI drives an unprecedented surge in global energy demand, today’s sponsor is developing a groundbreaking way to deliver clean, scalable power using America’s most abundant resources. | Trump Outlines Hemisphere Plans President Trump said Friday that the U.S. will acquire Greenland because "if we don't do it, China or Russia will." Trump also said he had called off on Venezuela, citing cooperation with Venezuelan officials following the U.S. capture of President Nicolas Maduro. Speaking during a meeting with oil executives to discuss Venezuela's oil investment needs, Trump said the U.S. needed to own Greenland: "I would like to make a deal, you know, the easy way. But if we don 't do it the easy way, we're going to do it the hard way." He also suggested in a Thursday interview that the U.S. military could launch . " We've knocked out 97% of the drugs coming in by water. And we are going to start now hitting land, with regard to the cartels," Trump said. Border Patrol Agent Shoots 2 in Oregon Two people were wounded Thursday in east Portland when a during a targeted vehicle stop that the Department of Homeland Security says turned into an attempted ramming and self-defense shooting. DHS identified them as Luis David Nico Moncada and Yorlenys Betzabeth Zambrano-Contreras, a married couple that U.S. officials said were suspected associates of Venezuela’s Tren de Aragua gang, charging that they entered the country illegally in 2022 and 2023, respectively. Police said officers arrived after an afternoon 911 call, then about three miles away a few minutes later. Both were hospitalized in unknown condition. Portland Police Chief Bob Day said police were assisting an FBI-led probe and Oregon’s attorney general opened a separate review. NFL Wild Card Weekend Kicks Off Today The begin today with Wild Card Weekend: six win-or-go-home games over three days to open the path to Super Bowl LX on Feb. 8. Saturday kicks off with the Rams visiting the Panthers, Carolina’s first home postseason game since Cam Newton led them to . That's followed by this evening’s night game, a divisional grudge match between the Packers and Bears on Prime Video, the for Chicago quarterback Caleb Williams and head coach Ben Johnson. Sunday’s three-game schedule starts with Josh Allen’s Buffalo Bills taking on the red-hot Jaguars, followed by the defending Super Bowl champion Eagles hosting the San Francisco 49ers in Philadelphia. The night closes with a pair of big-armed quarterbacks—the Patriots’ Drake Maye and Chargers’ Justin Herbert—dueling for the of either one’s career. Three police departments collaborated to [arrest porch pirate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdEbexRgoXPwNXf72SmSWdbBkYmR8IXn7E7lHuHI00qf55us23VyI4XH_7za25eXT9ODziFwK52lPmdY9ZFfY5cxH2b6PNae0TajQSAUS1LS4EN-TrhY7q2WAii10plfatA1Uq12876g35MlDA25W1NGM0PYdgyFUVbAXTAEoQIUA9UCD0v2A2Dfa0dAKrXgJJeW6rFz45Q4f3-nJuaa0VdGupeyHaP4JHAWO53nWp3fuKgWOLpdAkQWOl5fAkXLYrkgpRn4_Q4wsP1D5sZW_ugJH7DvZNW1roNVyHjxL7VlL14CRvlc0g2-9n-cq22U_Q4zhMJ3Q6r65ED_Tyt8OfVr8CQAA___RqokT) Danielle Copeland this week and found around 50 packages in her car.

**Good Morning!** On this day in 1964, work began on the [Jesse H. Jones Hall](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFyrCAUgOGnwQ4HEHUpKG5jt7dN6aAchQ2CczhZd98-k7xCXuD_Z76P-3x3McW8_3cHWHptZc5w1QREgPNZcA1nREfgEKHS8VUDlnLMSqiBC8mlmL2L6T3rxttFeCMbsHIcbkIPfSebYGUPRg_L2GshFrUYZYZODtCvvhvHcfFNtD8xIaWQSigpW7MaoW9GqVun3Wp6pgX4SAVbCkDwcnVL7_IEbNdyNMkGorOy7h9TE1PTdV0t1eBKTjFDW3Bnagou-6WUT6YmyIQRKlPTA2oFHvijZKg8uJT4VpBTAH4CbgWPmHfukGqD1p9XTCnWYWRa7IeL6fdOfzN7WvUdAAD__4LfglU) for the Performing Arts in Houston.
