## Joint Police Effort Nabs Porch Pirate
Three police departments collaborated to [arrest porch pirate](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOszAQhJ_GdEbexRgoXPwNXf72SmSWdbBkYmR8IXn7E7lHuHI00qf55us23VyI4XH_7za25eXT9ODziFwK52lPmdY9ZFfY5cxH2b6PNae0TajQSAUS1LS4EN-TrhY7q2WAii10plfatA1Uq12876g35MlDA25W1NGM0PYdgyFUVbAXTAEoQIUA9UCD0v2A2Dfa0dAKrXgJJeW6rFz45Q4f3-nJuaa0VdGupeyHaP4JHAWO53nWp3fuKgWOLpdAkQWOl5fAkXLYrkgpRn4_Q4wsP1D5sZW_ugJH7DvZNW1roNVyHjxL7VlL14CRvlc0g2-9n-cq22U_Q4zhMJ3Q6r65ED_Tyt8OfVr8CQAA___RqokT) Danielle Copeland this week and found around 50 packages in her car. The 42-year-old can be seen in a [video captured by a doorbell camera](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAMwPGnCVtQYlIKQ4ZvYeu33ohC4oJ1pkFJDtq3P9E-ws2W__LPX7fx5ojpMf93K9ryvMfxgUdmLAXTuMXkl42SK-hSwlzWn7ykGNcRFLRSaanVGBzxazRVsJMKva7Q6mvbKdNeGl0tdgoO_LWdsGsuDWBvtPZTZybjHGjwpiJ7xpTWSoMCreve98p0PUDXGOf7izAKA5WY6rJgwafLd37FHVPt41qxXUrZsmj-CRgEDMdx1H7Kp-KcCxjeKwKGnQJGAYOPzPjaiRnlFpk8yo9OOmacMci3W37gkmP8pscs7zHJNSaUO_lC61mskg3bQcyU26swal4d8fuq8rdf7hZ-AwAA__8VoYvz) wearing a face mask and keeping her face down as she grabs a package from a porch. Police said that, during her heists, Copeland would wear a hood when it rained and a wig when it was warm. Residents across Colleyville, Keller, and Hurst reported an increase in package heists during November and December, prompting those police departments to crack down on porch thieves. A recent study suggests that porch pirate thefts could approach [nearly $2 billion](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkD2S6yAQhE-DMqlghJEICF6izC_dUDWGkUUtMioY_91-S94jbN79dX39dZ7PGFO8Xf_jRo5fS55v9KyJmKnMey5-3WNBJiyFKm_3upactxkkmFaqVsk5YEzvWTfBXWSwqiGnBjNKbU69alY3wkiLGS6DJrSLCTCgDdJqv5hLT6NuojtgUimpQIJSnfVW6tECjL1Gb09CSwqRc-l4JaYX1iW984NK5_PWJLcy71X0_wRMAqaAKWHt_D3xvdCG-5ESMB1aAiYf-d2muJCA6aPX_vrV9kNuKxOmdkf_jVc6Ck1xYX_GlGI1g9DyumFMn2X-218PBz8BAAD__yligSg) in value in Texas in 2025.
## Highland Park ‘Mushroom House’ Demolished
The iconic mushroom house in the Highland Park neighborhood of Dallas has been [demolished](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1uwyAURp8Gb1j8GZuBoYu3dO1oEbgJqNhYcB0nb1-1ap-g-6dP55yPy3JxKaft_u5WsPi8lWWDs2VAhLrspfq4p-oQXK3QcD1arKWsi2BCU8YpZ0twKb8W1QV7ZcHwDiwf9cSUHiTvolWTkGqQgwyD4UboAaT2AfwwTeOotOyS_T5jnDMumOC8N94wNRkhJqmcNwNRDELCUnuMgPB07ZZf5QG192Xtso2IeyPyjYiZiPk8zz64nF0r1wb1d0bE7Co26o-MRwUi5pp2ioXGdI_ZbYHurn42mnzZkqd_njSWowFVTEvJ5ETE3FUb9jPlnJoeiWL31aX8A4L_y_ew4isAAP__VWyEnA) to make way for the new home of a car dealer, leaving the area without one of its quirkiest architectural pieces. Built in 1997 and designed by architect Tom Workman, the home’s curves and slopes gave it the distinctive look of a [mushroom](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL1u7CAUhJ8Gd6wOGGO7oLiNu71tSgvD2YUEGwvO_vjtI0fKE6SZZqRvNN_Hdb7amOJ2_29XNPS-5XnDV01IhGXec3Fhj8US2lKw0vqooeS8zhKk5iC4gNnbmI5ZNd4s4EfRoBG9HkDprhVNML7VQ-fVANprt-i2A8RlWbzrde9vg26iOWEgBAgJUojL6EZQwyjl0Crrxo4pQB8plwsFJHzbektHfmK5uLw2yQSivbL2H5MTk5Ozmz-qj4XOmsnppDM5gTijZ3Kym-efj0o8xS_kFCxxCsh_v_GQHxV5rPyeN2Ryaorx-yumFKvumYL7amP62aa_GXsa-R0AAP__vWJ_Xw) and were an aberration in a neighborhood of Neoclassical homes with Doric columns. Preservationist Larry Good said that "[Workman] and his wife dreamed up this vision, and it was [personal and unique](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGu3CAURL8Gd1hwDcYUFGncvbQprWtzvaBgYwH7vPv30UbKF6QcjTSac359LV8YUzwfP_Eg1157Xk66a6LWqCxXLlu4YsFGWArVdjxrKDkfCwgYuZBcisVjTO9Fdd6twlvZkZNmnIQa9SC74NbdkEGYpF2VgV1LjWSksZ84qkF00X3GhJRCggApe7tZoSYLMA0KN6uZEuRjy6VvgRq9sO7pnb-p9Fs-uuRCa1dlww8GM4P5vu_-3hE_JYMZS4tbIgbzkU96M5jXZ40n1cpgDvEREp6eX1h-839wPORnJe7pyCnWQJ7BDJPhSq9y0Ba496S58tvEJ7MBHwYN0wgKUcuuOH_dMaVYR8OUeBwY09-f7f_sfjv4EwAA___KroxI),” adding that “the little parts and pieces...should have been kept.”
## List: Ranking Cities by Active Lifestyles
Two Texas cities are in the top 25 of U.S. cities for people with [active lifestyles](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQAF9jOkdr44ApXFxDl2uvRIu9BEsGI3sTkt-fcl-4eqQZaX5u0w1jivv9Gzdy_FrytNNZEzFTmY5c_HrEgkxYClXeHnUtOW-TBt1JUFLBFDCm92Sa4GYIg2rIqb6zYLprq5rVAfbdYC0p07bzMiMs4Uowaz_QbI3CJrqPDJQCpUErdRn8AMYOWtvWoB-uwgCFyLlceCWmF9YlvfOTysXnrUluZT6qaL-EHoUeT0yJeH3MHyr0SOEh9DhTZYl7kGculaWPHKnKJReJu0TP8UkyxYUqvxMJPVqr-qa4cJwxpVi7Xhi4bxjTX5P_d-rp9G8AAAD__9vLfks), according to a new ranking from _WalletHub_. Austin ranked 18th, and Houston landed at No. 23, on the list of America’s 100 largest cities. Dallas and San Antonio ranked at No. 40 and No. 42, respectively, while Plano was the last Texas city in the top 50 at No. 49. Average monthly fitness-club fees, bike scores, and the percentage of physically-inactive adults were among _WalletHub’_ s 35 key indicators for the ranking. You can check out the [full list here](https://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOgzAQAF9jOkdr44ApXFxDl2uvRIu9BEsGI3sTkt-fcl-4eqQZaX5u0w1jivv9Gzdy_FrytNNZEzFTmY5c_HrEgkxYClXeHnUtOW-TBt1JUFLBFDCm92Sa4GYIg2rIqb6zYLprq5rVAfbdYC0p07bzMiMs4Uowaz_QbI3CJrqPDJQCpUErdRn8AMYOWtvWoB-uwgCFyLlceCWmF9YlvfOTysXnrUluZT6qaL-EHoUeT0yJeH3MHyr0SOEh9DhTZYl7kGculaWPHKnKJReJu0TP8UkyxYUqvxMJPVqr-qa4cJwxpVi7Xhi4bxjTX5P_d-rp9G8AAAD__9vLfks).

The 42-year-old can be seen in a wearing a face mask and keeping her face down as she grabs a package from a porch. Police said that, during her heists, Copeland would wear a hood when it rained and a wig when it was warm. Residents across Colleyville, Keller, and Hurst reported an increase in package heists during November and December, prompting those police departments to crack down on porch thieves. A recent study suggests that porch pirate thefts could approach in value in Texas in 2025. Highland Park ‘Mushroom House’ Demolished The iconic mushroom house in the Highland Park neighborhood of Dallas has been to make way for the new home of a car dealer, leaving the area without one of its quirkiest architectural pieces. Built in 1997 and designed by architect Tom Workman, the home’s curves and slopes gave it the distinctive look of a and were an aberration in a neighborhood of Neoclassical homes with Doric columns. Preservationist Larry Good said that "[Workman] and his wife dreamed up this vision, and it was ,” adding that “the little parts and pieces...should have been kept.” List: Ranking Cities by Active Lifestyles Two Texas cities are in the top 25 of U.S. cities for people with , according to a new ranking from WalletHub. Austin ranked 18th, and Houston landed at No. 23, on the list of America’s 100 largest cities. Dallas and San Antonio ranked at No. 40 and No. 42, respectively, while Plano was the last Texas city in the top 50 at No. 49. subject: Beaudoin Hammers Harriman After Osman Resigns—Citing “Pattern” of Lapses as Councilor’s Own Scandals Trail Him
body:

LEWISTON, Maine — House District 94 candidate Janet Beaudoin blasted opponent Scott Harriman, Thursday after Ward 5 City Councilor Iman Osman resigned amid a residency investigation and felony firearm charges, accusing Harriman of blocking accountability when it mattered, and pointing to what her campaign describes as a broader record of controversy surrounding the Lewiston councilor. body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
Get Involved: Register to Serve as a Delegate for the 2026 Nebraska Republican County Conventions
Dear Fellow Republicans,
As we kick off 2026 with renewed energy, it's time to strengthen our grassroots foundation. The Nebraska Republican Party (NEGOP) is excited to announce that delegate registration is now open for the 2026 County Conventions and the upcoming State Convention being held on Saturday, June 6th!
County Conventions: The Heart of Our Party
Every two years, county Republican parties across Nebraska hold county conventions to conduct essential party business and elections. In even-numbered years like 2026, these conventions also elect delegates and alternate delegates to the NEGOP State Convention. These gatherings are crucial: they're where we elect county party officers and select representatives to influence leadership and key decisions at the state level.
Date and Time
County conventions will be held between March 15 and April 15, 2026. Each county sets its own date, time, and location, with notice published at least seven days in advance as required by law. To find your county's details, isit your county Republican Party's website or social media pages, or contact your county chair via the directory at: [https://ne.gop/about-your-party/in-your-county/](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS9sFOpapGobsMSqwpFTSuxAX84tcyjElO2QefnAJen0vLsZY4XffnmpsMJCFF2XMXZ595smP7k73NNnIPieGUCgsW2Lqn4n7pu8JViT4pnjtdQ6yIQ3C6YQNTYSrd4D0VfSRr0-RFdLn&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==)
The Role of a County Delegate
Serving as a delegate is a rewarding way to get involved--no prior experience required! Delegates must be:

* Registered Republican voters in their county
* Willing to actively participate in county and state party activities for the two-year term
* Ready to represent their precinct or district
* Committed to volunteering for party business and electing Republican candidates
* Engaged in selecting party leadership

How to Register as a Delegate
The Delegate Registration process has changed this year. The Unicameral passed a bill last session removing the County Clerks and Election Commissioners from the process. All interested individuals must register this year through the official Nebraska Republican Party process.
Online Registration Steps: Visit [https://ne.gop/delegateform](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS9sFOpapGobskdjrEc4BYshIW19Thl8Lx9F8yLDDvXR8TntQRz0jiuRu1CONOE7U8tLicovE7bGYu-MpSuJv48c71qsKeThLJq3F37haSQKv&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==) (available now!) Complete the form with your name, address, county, and contact information Submit the required $5 delegate filing fee by credit card Registration is complete upon submission of the form and payment.
Key Dates and Deadlines Registration Period: January 1 - March 1, 2026 Delegate Filing Fee: $5 per delegate
Participation Matters
County conventions are the bedrock of our party in Nebraska. Becoming a delegate is one of the most direct ways to shape leadership, priorities, and our future success. We encourage every interested Republican to step up and make their voices heard! Together, let's build on our victories and keep Nebraska red.
Sincerely, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
Follow us: [Facebook](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS9sFOpapGobsmRrxtcDcuLjPRQZHBhQ3OBA4MqogIm1jpduZLQ_ZfdmWM4R92H4T9whNRCnWXLestKiuFzJ4uzZg_d0HRhz2fwRwqxIqnLzr0m9K8Z1fxFU=&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==) | [X ](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS9sFOpapGobsMf9qSYlzFOV6hIogLu61zUmokWFlTEEzPvZXOfyO9C8tQQ2EYCMAYVuwS9ZRKKmIGfwZ_RvIvzAD-EkoBIbqjQ==&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==)| [TikTok ](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS9sFOpapGobsArpaYXEd9ZxUo8crIttYs3w-PEpVd5U-V_iwNDWiZM_3BtIw4RzVr_EO-wDN5NFkGDjmMVJCWnyC8SStDfM-YxnSPivSxYwkGE5bTbNFACQYl0wv29u1GzwDR_xKCuc5SZ4MRDE3jpo=&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==)| [Instagram](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS9sFOpapGobsF5P8rtJBDr0p7zg4JsNTJS5SNv1m8N5Vo31jfghHkRaP5Tt4PG_62qfMIQqknGqpRIwsrkMDN083EftmdmBIMP4SvweefCEc&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==)
Donate today: Support the NEGOP at [https://ne.gop/donate](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS_F52OzNxCLg-xbYE9Vxf7VbZiLndgY9touJlk30Y5ip37TWPpDbwElSz_Dnr6KdEsQdHM3q3KakcV7nX85DquAULtaYXeSp8DhLOP_rN-wJjL4IMqFPgJV8ACiJFnnZuA==&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==)[ ](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS_F52OzNxCLg-xbYE9Vxf7VbZiLndgY9touJlk30Y5ip37TWPpDbwElSz_Dnr6KdEsQdHM3q3KakcV7nX85DquAULtaYXeSp8DhLOP_rN-wJjL4IMqFPgJVb7bvNpcgCwQ==&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==) For more information, visit [https://ne.gop/](https://feyrpzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001u68ZaNLEQZYOvw0Jjdq64fkn3ttUHq4k-5uAN0JRuiz_C48KA6RGS_oREhD__gbQivCILrM8SjssymPz1b-2Nk1LOo4uxu9Uum0uiCkGYNw79EEIUBIKfzoK1jMyiTUcfnM3SwD15kc=&c=zJkEjKHQzQ-vsNTDYijureYJ5HaYHTExBZ2IhCNqyhsVDLbz6jUlJA==&ch=7Wq3m_xfJBtJ88HPcvUMbp0juZHW6tktQST4ugItQPSrLSOzDd0ulQ==)

| A message from Nebraska Secretary of State Bob Evnen:
"Last fall, my office received a letter from the Department of Justice, as did every other state, requesting our voter rolls. This request was made to ensure every state is properly maintaining their voter rolls, and to check for any non-citizens who may have registered to vote. Before I could comply with this request, I was blocked by a lawsuit brought forth by a left-leaning organization called Common Cause. This lawsuit, also filed in other states, is an attempt by the democrats to blockade President Trump's election integrity efforts nationwide.
After months of waiting for this issue to be resolved, I made the decision to release our voter rolls to the Department of Justice by February 12th. This has resulted, unsurprisingly, in a letter which was sent to my office this morning by the Democratic National Committee, threatening to sue the State of Nebraska simply for working with the Trump Administration on election integrity. It should surprise nobody that the democratic party wants to prevent us from removing non-citizens from our voter rolls. The Democrats have been opposed to President Trump's election integrity initiatives for years. I, for one, refuse to be bullied by Washington Democrats.
Here in Nebraska, we have voter ID, we have paper ballots, we have hand-counted audits, and we will verify the citizenship of every voter on our rolls. It's time to call the democrats out for their rampant mismanagement and abuse of elections in states like California, Colorado, and Minnesota. We will continue to take a stand here in Nebraska, and we will never back down."
Contact the Nebraska Secretary of State at 402-471-2554

clean_body: News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong. | | | | | | Letter from the Chair Get Involved: Register to Serve as a Delegate for the 2026 Nebraska Republican County Conventions Dear Fellow Republicans, As we kick off 2026 with renewed energy, it's time to strengthen our grassroots foundation. The Nebraska Republican Party (NEGOP) is excited to announce that delegate registration is now open for the 2026 County Conventions and the upcoming State Convention being held on Saturday, June 6th! County Conventions: The Heart of Our Party Every two years, county Republican parties across Nebraska hold county conventions to conduct essential party business and elections. In even-numbered years like 2026, these conventions also elect delegates and alternate delegates to the NEGOP State Convention. These gatherings are crucial: they're where we elect county party officers and select representatives to influence leadership and key decisions at the state level. Date and Time County conventions will be held between March 15 and April 15, 2026. Each county sets its own date, time, and location, with notice published at least seven days in advance as required by law. To find your county's details, isit your county Republican Party's website or social media pages, or contact your county chair via the directory at: == The Role of a County Delegate Serving as a delegate is a rewarding way to get involved--no prior experience required! Delegates must be: Registered Republican voters in their county Willing to actively participate in county and state party activities for the two-year term Ready to represent their precinct or district Committed to volunteering for party business and electing Republican candidates * Engaged in selecting party leadership How to Register as a Delegate The Delegate Registration process has changed this year. The Unicameral passed a bill last session removing the County Clerks and Election Commissioners from the process. All interested individuals must register this year through the official Nebraska Republican Party process. Online Registration Steps: Visit == (available now!) Complete the form with your name, address, county, and contact information Submit the required $5 delegate filing fee by credit card Registration is complete upon submission of the form and payment. Key Dates and Deadlines Registration Period: January 1 - March 1, 2026 Delegate Filing Fee: $5 per delegate Participation Matters County conventions are the bedrock of our party in Nebraska. Becoming a delegate is one of the most direct ways to shape leadership, priorities, and our future success. We encourage every interested Republican to step up and make their voices heard! Together, let's build on our victories and keep Nebraska red. Sincerely, Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party Follow us: == | ==| ==| == Donate today: Support the NEGOP at == For more information, visit == | | | A message from Nebraska Secretary of State Bob Evnen: "Last fall, my office received a letter from the Department of Justice, as did every other state, requesting our voter rolls. This request was made to ensure every state is properly maintaining their voter rolls, and to check for any non-citizens who may have registered to vote. Before I could comply with this request, I was blocked by a lawsuit brought forth by a left-leaning organization called Common Cause. This lawsuit, also filed in other states, is an attempt by the democrats to blockade President Trump's election integrity efforts nationwide. After months of waiting for this issue to be resolved, I made the decision to release our voter rolls to the Department of Justice by February 12th. This has resulted, unsurprisingly, in a letter which was sent to my office this morning by the Democratic National Committee, threatening to sue the State of Nebraska simply for working with the Trump Administration on election integrity. It should surprise nobody that the democratic party wants to prevent us from removing non-citizens from our voter rolls. The Democrats have been opposed to President Trump's election integrity initiatives for years. I, for one, refuse to be bullied by Washington Democrats. Here in Nebraska, we have voter ID, we have paper ballots, we have hand-counted audits, and we will verify the citizenship of every voter on our rolls. It's time to call the democrats out for their rampant mismanagement and abuse of elections in states like California, Colorado, and Minnesota. We will continue to take a stand here in Nebraska, and we will never back down." Contact the Nebraska Secretary of State at 402-471-2554 | | | == | == | | == | | | UPCOMING NEGOP EVENTS | | == | | | | == | | | | | Help Republicans win in 2026 and beyond. name: Douglas Carswell
subject: HB2 – Mississippi’s School Choice Bill is Here!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/alookahead-12851343?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| _**If you're not in front of our Saturday email, you're behind.**_
---
| Dear Friend,
**House Speaker Jason White has just unveiled HB2, the Mississippi Education Freedom Act - the most exciting and ambitious advancement for school choice in our state in years, perhaps ever!**

This comprehensive bill delivers everything supporters of parental power have long hoped for, and it aligns perfectly with President Trump’s strong commitment to education freedom.

This isn’t some minor adjustment or performative law – **it’s the real thing for anyone who believes in putting parents in charge of their children’s education.**
---
|
---
| Here’s what the bill does and why we at MCPP are so enthusiastic:

* **Magnolia Student Accounts** : Families will be able to direct around $7,000 per child (drawn from the base amount in the new Mississippi Student Funding Formula already allocated to their child) into a Magnolia Student Account (an Education Savings Account). Parents can then use those funds for private school tuition, homeschooling, therapies, or other tailored educational needs.

In the initial phase, up to 12,500 accounts will be available, with priority for low- and middle-income families, and a balanced split between current public school students and others. The program will expand each year until every family that wants one can have access. Homeschool families participating can also receive $1,000 annually to help cover costs.

* **Easier Public School Transfers** : Currently it’s difficult to switch schools from one public school to another. HB2 makes it easier by ensuring you will no longer need the approval of the district you are leaving, just approval from the new school you want your child to attend.

* **Statewide Charter Schools** : Mississippi has had charter schools for over a decade, but strict limits have made it nearly impossible to open them outside select low-performing districts. HB2 opens the door statewide, allowing charters to launch wherever there’s demand and need.

* **Literacy** : Mississippi has become a national leader in raising reading standards through phonics-based early education. HB2 builds on this success by extending targeted literacy support into higher grades.

* **Smart District Consolidation** : Consolidation of districts would always be a challenge, but the bill takes a practical, conservative approach: It consolidates specific districts (like Copiah County and Hazlehurst) as a model, providing a template for future efforts without mandating widespread closures.

HB2 is Speaker Jason White’s flagship reform for the 2026 session, fulfilling his promise that “all Mississippi families, regardless of income or zip code, have real choices and the freedom to pursue what works best for their children.” He deserves strong support for the most significant conservative education reform our state has seen in a generation.

**Dozens of Mississippi business leaders, along with former Governors Haley Barbour and Phil Bryant, have already voiced strong support. Team Trump is behind it too.**

**_In short: If you oppose this bill, it’s hard to credibly claim to be a conservative._ **That’s exactly why the progressive left is already fighting it tooth and nail – they fear real parent power and will twist the facts to stop these reforms.

HB2 is now moving through the legislature, with real momentum in the House. Having had a massive conservative majority in Mississippi for years, here at last is the opportunity to implement a conservative reform in our state that will change our state for the better.

Real change is happening – and Mississippi is leading the way!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=134c7d1d27&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")
---
| |
---
Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell
President & CEO
---
|
---
| | _ _
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Mississippi Center for Public Policy520 George StJackson, MS 39202-3013
[Add us to your address book](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://mcpp-c58f.mailchimpsites.com/manage/preferences?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&e=5703353baa&c=edcebd7bb7) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=2f68021ebd&t=b&e=5703353baa&c=edcebd7bb7).

_Copyright © 2026 Mississippi Center for Public Policy, All rights reserved._
---

name: Wes Moore
subject: You aren’t just a spectator, Peter
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1191%2E1086043%2EHaVsCy)
This is a big moment, Peter.
**We have to stop all fundraising on Tuesday at midnight — and we’re still short of our $62,000 pre-freeze goal.**
I know this team is committed to our work making this Maryland’s decade, so I know we’ll be able to make up this gap in no time. If you’re ready to add your support today, we made this custom link for you to use:
**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20260110-1?refcode=em-20260110-1&personal;=dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/444?c0=wes-em-20260110-1.sqtG9V&refcode=em-20260110-1&t=2&akid=1191%2E1086043%2EHaVsCy)**
We’re fighting for an ambitious agenda to continue making progress in Maryland, and what we’re able to raise before the fundraising freeze will determine the course of the rest of the year. It will take all of us coming together to win reelection and stay in this fight.
Folks who chip in $5, $15, or $50 where they can aren’t just spectators to this work. _Your donations make you part of this movement to make Maryland a state where we leave no one behind._
If you’re on board, I would be so thankful for your help closing this fundraising gap. Here’s that custom link again so I know that it’s coming from you:

Thank you, Peter!
Elevate,
Wes

name: Senator Angela Alsobrooks
subject: I hope you’re staying nice & warm!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alsobrooks for Senate
body:
|
---
[ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/2092?t=1&akid=3427%2E52803%2E-c0sv0)
| | Hey Peter! I hope you’re staying nice and warm this morning. Although 2025 was a hard year for Maryland families, we managed to accomplish some great things. I co-led 2 bills that became law, sponsored 18 bills and resolutions and sponsored 23 amendments, and cosponsored 264 bills. I worked on issues ranging from health care costs, to uterine cancer research, anti-corruption, economic empowerment, child care, affordable housing, voter protection, community investment, and infrastructure. **So, as the new year gets underway, I want to check in about your top issues and see how I can ease your burden in 2026.** I wish I could sit down with you personally, but instead my team and I figured out the next best thing: **my 2026 Priorities Survey!** Your feedback helps me decide where to focus my efforts. For instance: Many constituents expressed concerns about unaffordable housing, so I worked on several bills to lower rent prices and make it easier to buy a home. Your concerns are my concerns, so please, **[pour yourself a fresh cup of coffee and share your hopes and priorities for this fresh new year!](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/survey/EM_BS_AAL_260110_EN_NewYearSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=7&akid=3427%2E52803%2E-c0sv0)** | | | [New Year Check-in! ➙](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/survey/EM_BS_AAL_260110_EN_NewYearSurvey_A0_na_U1_X1_M1/?t=8&akid=3427%2E52803%2E-c0sv0)
---
Have a wonderful day,
Angela
| | [ ](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/89?t=2&akid=3427%2E52803%2E-c0sv0)
---

Angela is so thankful for this grassroots team’s support and is eager to get to work for Marylanders in the Senate. That’s why you’ll be receiving fewer fundraising emails from us moving forward, in an effort to not clog up your inbox for the next six years.

Instead, we’d rather send you emails you want to read – like updates on Angela’s work in the Senate, or rundowns of key issues and news stories from Washington.

But to make this possible, we’re relying on supporters like you to consider making a small, monthly recurring contribution of $3 or even $5 to keep our operations running while Angela is busy fighting for Maryland families.

[Make a recurring contribution to Angela Alsobrooks' campaign here.](https://act.angelaalsobrooks.com/go/33703?t=3&akid=3427%2E52803%2E-c0sv0)

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line
body:

Peter,
MAGA just dropped a bomb on Democrats.
In a dramatic splitscreen, Gov. Ron DeSantis called for a special session in April to begin the redistricting process in Florida and the Missouri Secretary of State moved to block an anti-redistricting measure that would have stopped their election dead in its tracks:

| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUMb09TFj_PzIQGLb5N7yQaH8GRteVpw90k9495CO9mvAU_Mh4Thl_n_quWbwbbGyO8z5K0eGxV3PTM7jhWJJWXIVPfMvftIhynmcRk8W9BmbFnf2wGG_Y2ETFgGZzoejfdk_frXU6_-qNQoLk6vbmRtcO0HYGRpBKm--VdTIYtuB8iDE6lVU9aaZOwbUW_3tpkfj_zRw-mahmjBvInVGQX-SaGbJRa5&c=Ajtx-TaTlfUv4El4fi28a1uGf6GQnfT-PZXM0HPPZOaQITa1naw8Aw==&ch=OXOyG0uAvVzytu_3gx-JCSdyBiiamFtkPayitWe9jSHsbTM3Jm9Lwg==)
---
Peter, the 2026 democratic blue wave is collapsing before our very eyes at breakneck speed.
Six Democratic seats are gone in the blink of an eye, with even more to be erased.
MAGA is turbocharging their efforts. Trump's plummeting approval rating is threatening to drown their entire party in 2026 and beyond. Election rigging is the only liferaft MAGA has to save themselves.
Democrats can't let this powergrab go unanswered or we'll be the ones drowning in what was supposed to be our blue wave year.
Thankfully, Colorado Draws the Line is leading the counterattack. We're spearheading a ballot initiative that would give Democrats up to three additional seats in Colorado. Coloradans refuse to let MAGA enshrine one party rule into law. We are hitting back. Hard. But we need to match MAGA's lightning speed before it's too late.
[Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever is meaningful to you to help us strike back before it's too late?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001WUMb09TFj_PzIQGLb5N7yQaH8GRteVpw90k9495CO9mvAU_Mh4Thl_n_quWbwbbG3l2wg3pnKUGZt_pKs1p-PaumBdczSUMi9GYPzR2HGuUDXyo_1A-miVUVUlERxtjAPv47QEO8GlLOhN7jAmczlp0lJOO_GOlKfZtQJTlc76YQZ6mNqZyuRRV8O2LDgVTQ3g4SLx6lDssuBl0KKYQUnODUdwTBqUg5aIMw1MSus-xfREVnYjGzug==&c=Ajtx-TaTlfUv4El4fi28a1uGf6GQnfT-PZXM0HPPZOaQITa1naw8Aw==&ch=OXOyG0uAvVzytu_3gx-JCSdyBiiamFtkPayitWe9jSHsbTM3Jm9Lwg==)

name: Massachusetts Democratic Party
subject: Trump Truth: Trump Halts Five Blue State Based Wind Farms For “Security Reasons”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP31/1/93809/images/Logo.png]
Hello Peter,
On December 22nd, the Trump Administration’s Department of the Interior announced it was “pausing” five wind farms, including Vineyard Wind, which has been producing power for over a year. The notice bucks a federal judge's ruling that Trump’s executive order to pursue wind farm developer permits issued under the Biden Administration was unlawful.
Surprising no one, all five projects are in blue states: Virginia, New York, Rhode Island, Connecticut, and Massachusetts; and began their construction under Biden Administration permissions.
Trump has long made clear his dislike for offshore wind, repeatedly calling “offshore wind turbines ugly, costly and inefficient... [disparaging] the clean energy source ever since, 14 years ago, he failed to stop an offshore wind farm visible from one of his golf courses in Scotland.” ( New York Times [https://www.nytimes.com/2025/12/22/climate/trump-offshore-wind-farms.html] )
In Massachusetts, the almost-completed Vineyard Wind I has been online since January, and will ultimately be capable of producing power for over 200,000 homes and businesses. As our New England winters get colder and residents are seeing the cost of heating their homes increase, this is the time of year when the energy produced by offshore wind power is most critical.
Across the Commonwealth, our leaders have been clear: Donald Trump’s attack on wind energy is a direct assault on the wallets of Bay Staters. Offshore wind creates good-paying jobs, lowers energy costs, and strengthens our local economies.
Governor Maura Healey responded to the order by promising to “stand up against this unlawful action by the Trump Administration to protect Massachusetts’ ratepayers and workers. We are working closely with impacted states and developers to ensure the projects are completed and continue to provide affordable power to our communities.”
Senators Elizabeth Warren and Ed Markey issued a joint statement, stating, “Earlier this month, the courts rightly threw out Trump's unlawful executive order and agency actions that attempted to ban offshore wind, so today’s groundless blind-side against the industry should not be allowed to stand. And as sitting lawmakers, we demand to see the classified reports the Trump administration is waving around to justify this bizarre attack on our grid.”
And Congressman Bill Keating doubled down on the economic impact, saying, “Donald Trump’s stop-work orders targeting offshore wind are yet another assault on providing sustainable, more affordable energy to the Commonwealth - and beyond utility bills, this is also an attack on the working people throughout Southeastern Massachusetts who took the leap to join the burgeoning offshore wind workforce and the local small businesses that support the industry. New Bedford didn’t become the national hub of the offshore wind industry by accident - it happened because leaders in the Commonwealth recognized the need for renewable energy, saw a path for the Commonwealth to lead, and took action, and our state is better for it.”
The truth is clear: Donald Trump is using his office to settle long-standing personal grievances, rather than serving the best interests of American residents.

Paid for by the Massachusetts Democratic State Committee
Massachusetts Democratic Party
11 Beacon St
Suite 410
Boston, MA 02108
United States

name: Roy Cooper
subject: This is a privilege
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I wouldn’t be here without you.
#
Peter,
There have been some hard days during my career working to serve North Carolina.
Days when we couldn’t get done the things we set out to accomplish. Days that we couldn’t stop far-right legislation from hurting our people.
But there have been many, many more days when we were able to make a difference together. Expanding Medicaid. Getting some raises for public school teachers. Paid parental leave. Bringing good-paying jobs to the state. _Those achievements matter._
There are hard days on the campaign trail, too. This is a competitive race, and the national GOP is aligned against us, trying to stop us from flipping this seat blue for the first time since 2008. Earlier this month, Donald Trump even called me out at one of his rallies.
On the hardest days, knowing that you’re with me helps me keep up the fight. And no matter what, I am reminded that the opportunity to serve is itself the greatest privilege.
Our nation deserves leaders who care about more than personal pride or party loyalty. Leaders who are ready to do real work, not just play petty grievance politics. The opportunity to fight for you as the next Senator from North Carolina would be an honor I could never repay — but I will spend every day trying.
**[I wouldn’t ask for even more support from you unless it was urgent, and right now, it really is. Our mid-January fundraising deadline is January 15th, and we’re still short of our goal. Please, split a donation between our campaign and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99443?refcode=em20260110-9932&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9932%2E614464%2EjGEIFI)**
**[DONATE](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99443?refcode=em20260110-9932&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9932%2E614464%2EjGEIFI)**
Thank you,
Roy Cooper

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=3&akid=9932%2E614464%2EjGEIFI).

name: Team Shontel Brown
subject: "A +++++"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
He’s completely out of touch.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123040684/594255643/-153530995?refcode=EM_F_260110econ_N_TSB_90DO_4_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTZmOThlZC0zMmVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qgd4tf54Stn8uli3_O9za491ZZXX4gzuqTtcgKsfL7I=) Peter,

It’s officially a make-or-break election year, and it’s more critical than ever before that Democrats win control of Congress.

As we all feel the strain of skyrocketing costs, Trump is calling the issue of affordability a “Democratic hoax.” He – and his MAGA party – are completely out of touch with reality. And you don’t have to take our word for it:

Despite health care premiums becoming unaffordable for millions and a recession impending, **Trump graded his economy in an interview as "A +++++."** We’re sure it must feel that way for the millionaires and billionaires that Trump and his cronies in Congress have been prioritizing since their administration came into power.

[**We have an incredible chance this year to take back the House and hold Republicans accountable for their chaos and destruction – but we need your support. Peter,
---
Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film _Sound of Freedom._ But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation.** A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal:

**I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds** to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City.
---

That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies.
$50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds.
$100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies.

When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. clean_body: A hospital bed can stop a child from being trafficked There are no ICU beds left. That's what we're changing, right now. | | | Peter, Mexico City is my home. It's where I was born, where I learned to believe in God's purpose, and where I first saw the kind of poverty and pain that can break your heart.When I speak with our partners there, the stories of children in need make my heart ache.You may know me as the producer of the blockbuster film Sound of Freedom. But what you may not know is that the film became the foundation for a massive movement, the Sound of Freedom Foundation. A humanitarian organization that rescues children from sex trafficking, supports their recovery, and helps stop exploitation before it begins. In hospitals across Mexico city, vulnerable children, including those rescued from trafficking and abuse, are now fighting to survive. But there aren't enough ICU beds to care for them.Some lie on stretchers or floors, waiting for a chance at healing that may never come.That's why I've set a goal: I want to raise $20,000 to deliver $200,000 worth of ICU beds to hospitals and medical centers that serve God's children in Mexico City. These beds are lifelines. They are where a fragile heartbeat stabilizes, where a child's breathing grows stronger, where healing happens. Every $1 you give becomes $10 of real medical value.How?Because through the Sound of Freedom Foundation's partnerships with trusted humanitarian distributors, we're able to secure bulk discounts on high-need medical equipment. That means every dollar raised helps unlock $10 worth of ICU beds, monitors, and lifesaving hospital supplies. enough to care for children who are sick, weak, and desperately in need of help.$25 -> provides $250 worth of ICU equipment and supplies. $50 -> provides $500 toward children's ICU beds. $100 -> provides $1,000 in needed ICU supplies. $250 or more -> helps equip an entire hospital ward for rescued children. When these beds arrive, they will go straight into hospitals that have been praying for help, to doctors who refuse to give up, and nurses who comfort frightened children through the night.And the impact doesn't end there. Because when desperate families can access medical care for their children, they no longer face the unthinkable choice of selling a son or daughter just to survive.In communities where poverty and sickness make children vulnerable to traffickers, a single hospital bed can mean the difference between a child staying with their loving family or being trafficked and abused. This is what we can change together.We have the plan. We have the partners. But this mission can't launch without you.Peter, the next few days will decide how many children we can help, how many will have a bed instead of the floor, and hope instead of fear. If we reach our goal, those hospital rooms will be transformed. The caregivers will have the tools they need. And the children will finally be able to rest, to heal, and to live, safe from the predators who prey on desperation.If we fall short, vulnerable children will not receive the medical care they need and their families may be forced into the kind of impossible decisions that result in more children being trafficked and exploited for profit. For God's children, Eduardo Verastegui Sound of Freedom, Producer For the Sound of Freedom Foundation 6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074

Meet Royce White:

**Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards.

_After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy._

Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc.

Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. clean_body: The Radical Left must be held accountable while they play theatrics to appease the Somalians | Peter, I told people the fraud in Minnesota was going to end up being over $10 billion. How can "Democrats" turn a blind eye to this. Regardless of how I feel about Minnesota's Republican establishment, and they are a part of the problem, Tim Walz and the Dems have to own this. It can't be President Trump's fault this time. $10 BILLION! Somali immigrants invading the Twin Cities and stealing over $10 billion from taxpayers, while White Liberal politicians like Tim Walz, Peggy Flanagan, and Mayor Jacob Frey act like complete fools while either covering up the fraud or turning a blind eye. This isn’t normal. Jacob Frey is speaking Somali in public speeches, sounding like Jabba the Hutt from Star Wars. And my Senate opponent, Peggy Flanagan, is wearing a Somali hijab in public. The worst part is these White Liberals do these things and think they’re coming off as genuine. Real Americans see through the act, though. If I lose my Senate Race, Peggy Flanagan might actually try to speak Somali on the Senate floor while wearing a hijab. I’m not sure America is ready for such a disingenuous act in Washington. | Thank you, Royce White Meet Royce White: Born and raised in the Twin Cities, Royce White was the son of a single mother and started playing sports at the age of 5 years old. Living in various neighborhoods growing up, much of his family remained in the Rondo community, where he spent much of his time and received schooling. White excelled at basketball and recieved a scholarship to play basketball at the University of Minnesota, and later transferred to Iowa State. He would go on to make Dean's List while receiving All Big-12 first-team honors and many other basketball awards. After being selected 16th overall by The Houston Rockets in the NBA draft, White began to voice concerns about the NBA’s collective bargaining agreement (CBA), specifically regarding mental health policy, which at the time did not exist. Eventually, his concerns became a public dispute between White and the NBA. This resulted in White demanding that the NBA, as a representative of the global corporate community, take up the responsibility of spearheading the mental health conversation – not just posturing through press statements, but through policy. Royce then went on to win two championships in Canada before moving over to play Big 3 Basketball. White appeared at a game in a t-shirt that read “Free The Uyghurs.” After a game-winning basket, White did a post-game interview on CBS, where he called for 2 Million Uyghurs to be freed and released from concentration camps. As the season went on, White would touch on taboo topics such as Gain of Function Research, The Federal Reserve, Julian Assange, Edward Snowden, Larry Hoover, Jeff Fort, Muammar Gaddafi, The Great Reset, Ivermectin, Me Too, etc. Now, Royce White is running for Senate in Minnesota to take down the Radical Left. Republicans have not seen recent success in Minnesota, but Royce's campaign is different: a grassroots movement that's sick of the Radical Agenda pushed by Far Left Democrats Tina Smith and Ilhan Omar. Royce needs your help to pull off a fourth quarter comeback victory and FLIP Minnesota Red for Republicans. PAID FOR BY ROYCE WHITE FOR SENATE P.O. name: Colin Allred
subject: I made a difficult decision to end my campaign
body:
Peter,
I officially ended my campaign for U.S. Senate and filed to run for Congress in Texas’ 33rd Congressional District.
I didn’t come to this decision lightly – I’ve put everything I had into my Senate campaign over the last five months, traveling to every corner of the state, talking to as many Texans as I could, building on the incredible grassroots campaign we started last year.
While it was clear that many Texans were ready to support me to the end, it was also clear that the Democratic primary would end up in a bruising and costly runoff in May. And if we want to prevent another MAGA loyalist from representing our state for six more years, that’s simply a risk we can’t afford to take.
So, today I am announcing my campaign to represent the newly drawn 33rd district in Texas. If you’d still like to see me head to Washington in November, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between me and Real Texas to get my new campaign off to a strong start today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=011025_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to Colin Allred and The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=011025_1&amount=5]
DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=011025_1&amount=10]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=011025_1&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=011025_1&amount=100]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?express_lane=true&refcode=011025_1&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=011025_1&amount=25]
District 33 was racially gerrymandered by Republicans in an effort to further rig our democracy, but it’s still the community where I grew up attending public schools and watching my mom struggle to pay for our groceries. It’s the community where Aly and I are raising our two boys. It is my home.
The threats that our democracy and our way of living are facing right now are real. It’s harder than ever for kids like me to get a shot, and for single moms like mine to afford their basic needs. But I am more confident than I have ever been that together, we can beat these threats. That’s why I am humbly asking for your help to return to Congress to fight for North Texans, our democracy, and the American Dream.
If you can, please split a donation of a few bucks between my campaign and Real Texas to help me get started. Thank you for reading, and for all of your continued support as we fight to get Texas representation we can be proud of. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=011025_1]
Colin Allred
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=011025_1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-allred?refcode=011025_1]

Only U.S. citizens or legal permanent residents are eligible to contribute. An Individual can contribute up to $5,000 to The Real Texas PAC per calendar year. Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. Once a federally permissible source has contributed $5,000 in a calendar year, The Real Texas PAC will transfer any amounts in excess of $5,000 to its non-contribution account. All contributions from corporations and labor unions will be deposited in the non-contribution account. Please contact us at realtexas@mbacg.com if you would like a different allocation.

Peter,

Coach Tommy Tuberville here.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I tried to mail this to your house:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
clean_body: You have been selected to participate in this important nationwide PATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION survey project. I tried to mail this to your house, Fellow American - but I never heard back from you. It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm sending this message directly to your inbox because you are one of our top Patriots in your area. I know this is longer than our usual messages, but please take a moment to read it from start to finish - and please don't forget to Thank you for everything you do. \- Steve Scalise ORIGINAL MESSAGEPATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION SURVEY You have been selected to participate in this important nationwide PATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION survey project. I offered to conduct this project as part of our Republican Party's mission to ensure that every single patriotic American citizen is registered to vote and fully empowered to guide our nation's future. Your record stands out as a proud American, law-abiding taxpayer, and a registered voter living in: your area. Please ensure our records are as accurate as possible by completing the VERIFICATION SURVEY below. You are identified as a loyal patriot, so I am really counting on your prompt response. This project's results will be incomplete if we don't hear from you. And frankly, with everything at stake, your voice is urgently needed in our country's system of self-government. As House Majority Leader, I am proud of everything I am doing to help President Trump enact his America First agenda. And I will not stop. Not ever. But the Democrats are spreading lies about the policies and getting their base of supporters riled up. We've already seen left-wing "resistance" activists in communities across the country (including near your part of your area). And we are seeing Democrat Party committees and liberal PACs smashing fundraising records. All due to anti-Trump hatred. If loyal patriots can't organize and mobilize on our own, the Woke Democrats will take back power and shut down our MAGA agenda. And they will spend President Trump's final two years in office attacking him with more Witch Hunts and impeachment drives. That is why your immediate response is so important, Fellow American. I was honored to be selected by my colleagues to serve as Majority Leader. But I do not lead "from the top down." I listen to the grassroots . . . to patriotic men and women like you who love our country, share my conservative values, and want the best for our kids and grandkids. And I am confident that the best way to strengthen our movement - and score big victories at the polls in 2026 - is by continuing to work shoulder to shoulder with you and other caring citizens. To defeat the Woke Left and pass the rest of President Trump's MAGA agenda, we'll need REAL Americans to vote in large numbers. And we'll need them to cast informed votes. That means pushing back against left-wing propaganda at every turn through next November. So please complete your VERIFICATION SURVEY and submit it TODAY. And when you respond, I urge you to include one important gift of $250, $100, $50, $35, or any amount you can spare to my campaign. As I push the Trump Agenda through the House, forcing tough, narrow votes and speaking up for facts and the truth, I am coming under relentless attack from the left-wing campaign machine. So please complete our voter verification survey as soon as possible. And don't forget to include your important gift of $250, $100, $50, or $35. Every dollar will fuel my fight to pass more pro-America policies and mobilize a surge of MAGA voters to the polls next year. Thank you and God bless! Steve ScaliseHouse Majority Leader Q1. Are you a registered voter in your area?. Do you intend to vote in the 2026 midterm elections? . Did you vote in person in the 2024 presidential election?. Do you want your state's law enforcement officials to cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), when it comes to detaining illegal aliens? - HOW IMPORTANT IS IT THAT YOUR PUBLIC OFFICIALS WORK TO: 1\. Secure the border.\. Protect parents' rights. 3\. Cut the debt.\. Stop socialism. \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:| | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to %%Emailc%% because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. **Dear Fellow Michiganders,**
Across our state, citizens are coming together around a simple but vital principle: protecting the integrity of our elections. A statewide ballot initiative to require voter identification in Michigan elections and to ensure that only U.S. citizens are registered to vote has entered its final stretch, and your participation is critical.
Faith in our elections depends on closing gaps that undermine public confidence. As former Michigan Secretary of State and current State Senator Ruth Johnson has noted, voter ID and citizenship verification address two of the most significant weaknesses in our current system. Voter ID enjoys broad, bipartisan public support and provides a straightforward way to ensure that each voter is eligible and that every ballot cast is lawful and counted once.
Recent events have underscored the urgency of this effort. Federal authorities charged a non-citizen for illegally voting in Ann Arbor during the 2024 general election, and a subsequent review identified additional instances of apparent unlawful voting. While these cases are limited in number, even isolated violations erode trust in our democratic process.
This ballot proposal is about safeguarding elections for everyone, regardless of party, by ensuring that only eligible citizens vote, that those voting are who they say they are, and that our system remains fair, secure, and transparent.
You can take part by signing the petition at statewide signing events being held **TODAY** at locations across Michigan:
**Here is a complete list of today’s events:**
Lenawee County GOP115 E. Maumee Street (Mezzanine Level)Adrian, MI 4922110:00 - 2:00Contact info: [chair@lenaweegop.com](mailto:chair@lenaweegop.com) Gladwin County GOP112 W. clean_body: sign the petition, tell your friends | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Michiganders, Across our state, citizens are coming together around a simple but vital principle: protecting the integrity of our elections. A statewide ballot initiative to require voter identification in Michigan elections and to ensure that only U.S. citizens are registered to vote has entered its final stretch, and your participation is critical. Faith in our elections depends on closing gaps that undermine public confidence. As former Michigan Secretary of State and current State Senator Ruth Johnson has noted, voter ID and citizenship verification address two of the most significant weaknesses in our current system. Voter ID enjoys broad, bipartisan public support and provides a straightforward way to ensure that each voter is eligible and that every ballot cast is lawful and counted once. Recent events have underscored the urgency of this effort. Federal authorities charged a non-citizen for illegally voting in Ann Arbor during the 2024 general election, and a subsequent review identified additional instances of apparent unlawful voting. While these cases are limited in number, even isolated violations erode trust in our democratic process. This ballot proposal is about safeguarding elections for everyone, regardless of party, by ensuring that only eligible citizens vote, that those voting are who they say they are, and that our system remains fair, secure, and transparent. You can take part by signing the petition at statewide signing events being held TODAY at locations across Michigan: Here is a complete list of today’s events: Lenawee County GOP115 E. What we're seeing right now should worry every person in this country.

RFK Jr. has spent years pushing debunked vaccine conspiracies. And now, those fringe ideas aren't staying on podcasts or Reddit threads— _they're showing up in real policy decisions._

He's making dangerous changes to vaccine schedules, undermining COVID vaccine access, and casting doubt on science that keeps our kids, seniors, and immunocompromised neighbors safe. _This isn't abstract._ When leaders play games with public health, **real** people get hurt.

We're already seeing the consequences play out in real time. Measles cases are at their highest level in decades and doctors and public health experts are sounding the alarm. But instead of listening to science, RFK Jr. keeps doubling down, despite having no medical training and no experience running a public health system.

Peter, this has never been about party labels; it's about trust in science and trust in our government to do what's best for our nation's health outcomes. It's about whether the person in charge of our nation's health believes in facts, empirical evidence, and the responsibility that comes with protecting millions of lives. [**So I want to hear directly from you: Do you think RFK Jr. is qualified to serve as Secretary of Health and Human Services?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123051594/594267076/-72158628?ms=em26_260109_rfkpol_e1srv_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em26_260109_rfkpol_e1srv_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em26_260109_rfkpol_e1srv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260109_rfkpol_e1srv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=GuT037d+vzPTuyYHrCfX12CWDLsSOwpxKYyDONgvBVQpl10vbaeS4LrdsKMT+mr4vTLFkgOKR8X/XT4qXjZoYKLwy91zP2HiPOX6kKFkmMCOGIvi7DMFcSbQ/oLuAb90dQpogVSVIQTy3KyUht6bdfmX7rYkiNjIif1V1hmAWLc=&refcode2=c11e3f1f-37ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYzExZTNmMWYtMzdlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=geNicppaN2JEnSYnZXChKdwFEdQXKh7fqPr6sswHEOk=&emci=a1d6626f-dcec-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=c11e3f1f-37ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=1020964)

Thanks for your input,

Wesley

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: No matter what happens…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
There comes a point in every man’s life...
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=5b37490fb71943899d526d325b2f87a7&_e=Ec4wTXz9jfvGjePGdgMCS8eZpPz3F93UN8I9sAT_ybU0R21ft2sP0KAc24m0V9v2Hm65pduDdqBSlX9PHLjIKJujRhghuqT6T35pfivRiHx2RPJnS5MLIRE58PU9KenzIX7v_Yq1DXSp0oO8QB9yLj-Iv6H4nwRMRdRsP3x--JZB_OfMJ7slnT0lyvEdVTFiLvz8mDflJXbPNfqam8JqJwloTJdQFx3nhzxhqJNdGQFL9Hy_unJNTs7peYVMmZLqLyQg914d3n2iiNf4Y2SJbz31j9uORMs4DkEXP19sCte-umSUD2tlf4bn_DeptFBIBcliTKHSzLQXRms59MNu9tOghJk85WQj49F1GIRcaVUDymNY1jRkxNuRCtHr9KAU7-9902aFJO_fyiHE2uni7Af7I7TRxDffM3ZAzxvX6BrIiwMd0ND6HNn8ObSFIg1MM8pTs_Wbk31AiPJ4twlZC1uQrO2oLHHje3J2lyhXzplgLDKGAlivkmmRyS3m4ZL3utLHbygRSkVzyRMi4PJCRY2PxtWCacfheq2JhBq8I2FLZObKlguDc7Cnb4VrKsRhjIsL7P_TObY5XWnUS9UTOH7uXQKxW7Wkh1AbF8Pz3eA%3D)
__
---
**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**
---
_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._
---
**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._
---
But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.
---
_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._
---
With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!
---

clean_body: There comes a point in every man’s life... | Dear Fellow Patriot, There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you. No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE. Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day. Thank you and God Bless you! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

**➤➤ DEVELOPING: Trump’s DOJ offers states confidential deal to remove voters flagged by feds**
* * *
Friend, this is disturbing. Trump’s DOJ is quietly pressuring states to sign confidential deals giving the federal government power to flag and remove voters from the rolls – all behind closed doors. **At least 13 states have received these draft agreements – and in 11 of them, Republican officials have signaled they’re ready to comply.** Under these secret agreements, states would be required to hand over unredacted voter data – including Social Security numbers and driver’s licenses – and then purge anyone the DOJ flags as “ineligible” within 45 days. Let’s be clear: states control elections – not the federal government, and certainly not Trump’s DOJ. Two Democratic-led states – Colorado and Wisconsin – have already said no. clean_body: | = ➤➤ DEVELOPING: Trump’s DOJ offers states confidential deal to remove voters flagged by feds Friend, this is disturbing. Trump’s DOJ is quietly pressuring states to sign confidential deals giving the federal government power to flag and remove voters from the rolls – all behind closed doors. At least 13 states have received these draft agreements – and in 11 of them, Republican officials have signaled they’re ready to comply. Under these secret agreements, states would be required to hand over unredacted voter data – including Social Security numbers and driver’s licenses – and then purge anyone the DOJ flags as “ineligible” within 45 days. Let’s be clear: states control elections – not the federal government, and certainly not Trump’s DOJ. Two Democratic-led states – Colorado and Wisconsin – have already said no. But if Trump gets his way, we’re looking at a blueprint for mass voter purges, a national voter surveillance system, and unprecedented federal overreach. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | =** Thanks for being in this fight, Team DASS | Thank you for your dedicated support of The Democratic Association of Secretaries of State -- the only organization dedicated to electing and protecting Democratic Secretaries of States. These networks exploit U.S. welfare systems, launder tax dollars, and operate with corrupt political cover.

| Peter,
2026 is a make or break election year for democracy.
All of the talking heads are talking about the House and Senate elections, and yes, those will be consequential. But here's the truth most political pundits and election analysts are missing:
The fate of Democracy will also hinge on often overlooked and underappreciated state Supreme Courts races.
As MAGA witnessed the formation of a massive blue wave in 2025, they started working on desperate countermeasures, launching an all-out blitz of anti-democratic election rigging efforts at the state level--rewriting elections laws to make it harder for Democrats to vote and gerrymandering maps.
The constitutionality of their actions will ultimately be decided by state Supreme Courts. That means whoever controls these courts will control the fate of our Democracy:

---
| [](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010G8OQADbMPQD-flZ1oB-NBEjEgxXIviRKSy6CoccMR0jcFh4TqX5j3oiMyCNrUaVUXhKH7kcjGNXPjqo53XYbVUkWfkVDWDuog6UtFh_5_QeqwUp58LaTyYXN6HqDK5JrV5CgwdILB2IJKXf-eo12m8v2SJpevO0x2F8v0Q363OCssJ4uOXixSu6QjG72-ts3pHgBIiuWaqEBY5qwAuLuGlo8K8_dkzeJ43vcGuXoPo=&c=JvkdriH-HFZDYn4I5_yap-8yGK2KNz34zk723_goB29l_pvAcfa-CQ==&ch=dnlejXGQxVK9x5WHggdgQRKm2SnIU8KwTbMrlqNLv8hCTba2ih6wRQ==)
---

32 states will have state Supreme Court elections in 2026 including the key swing states of Arizona, Michigan, Georgia, and Wisconsin. If MAGA loyalists capture these courts, they'll green-light voter suppression and rigged maps as "constitutional".
That's why Defend Our Courts is stepping up once again. In 2025, when control of the PA Supreme Court was on the line, we helped lead the defense of the court and secure a 30+ point victory for the Democratic justices.
Now we're taking that winning formula national.
The national party is going to be stretched thin. With dozens of competitive House and Senate races, state court elections will risk being ignored. We can't let that happen, not when the entire guardrail of democracy is on the line.
[The sooner we get moving, the stronger we'll be in every state. We need to start preparing our defense now and we can't do it alone. Will you rush a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you can spare to help defend these crucial courts in 2026?](https://yfq78zhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010G8OQADbMPQD-flZ1oB-NBEjEgxXIviRKSy6CoccMR0jcFh4TqX5j3oiMyCNrUaVUXhKH7kcjGNXPjqo53XYbVUkWfkVDWDuog6UtFh_5_QeqwUp58LaTyYXN6HqDK5JrV5CgwdILB2IJKXf-eo12m8v2SJpevO0x2F8v0Q363OCssJ4uOXixSu6QjG72-ts3pHgBIiuWaqEBY5qwAuLuGlo8K8_dkzeQwujg9uQHbI=&c=JvkdriH-HFZDYn4I5_yap-8yGK2KNz34zk723_goB29l_pvAcfa-CQ==&ch=dnlejXGQxVK9x5WHggdgQRKm2SnIU8KwTbMrlqNLv8hCTba2ih6wRQ==)

It was an operation that even the Trump administration acknowledges, could have ended in disaster. The late night/early morning raid in Caracas, Venezuela was daring and could have resulted in more assets being needed to deploy to help with an unforeseen problem.
Instead, the highly complex operation to arrest dictator Nicolas Maduro at his compound was extremely successful. Keep in mind, Maduro had months of warnings that something like this would happen. It's part of the reason why he would hold public events surrounded by loyalists, who conveniently acted as human shields if the United States wanted to do something during the day.
* * *
## Replace the mainstream media with bold independent journalism! Become a PolitiBrawl member today:
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BM-typRHpAb0P4tpHjmRaX91JA88tkfbdSXHlvYm5ew?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184058590)
* * *
All of the propaganda videos showing the "might" of the Venezuelan military amounted to nothing since, according to President Donald Trump, the U.S. was able to "turn off" the country's defensive infrastructure when the raid started. U.S. forces were quick and lethal. Maduro's Cuban bodyguards were quickly eliminated. No U.S. service member was killed and no vehicles were lost. This was certainly not a repeat of Operation Gothic Serpent's "Black Hawk Down" episode.
And, for good measure, the U.S. military blasted at the mausoleum hosting Hugo Chavez's body. Why? Because we don't like communists, that's why.
As you can imagine, the success of the raid has shaken the leftist governments of Latin America. Next door, Colombian President Gustavo Petro has spent the last two days denouncing the U.S., while also stating he is not worried about anything happening to him.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/124584c3-90cc-4af2-9b54-d4308df86350?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|

**With President Trump 's return to the White House, we could be primed for the start of an economic renaissance that will transform retirement for millions of Americans.**
For retirees and those planning their golden years, this could mean more money in your pocket and unprecedented opportunities for wealth creation. This economic shift brings both incredible opportunity and hidden risks for those with traditional retirement accounts such as 401(k), IRAs, and TSPs.
**The fatal flaw in traditional retirement vehicles relies on a stock market free of manipulation and economic crisis for you to benefit from its rise.**
However, a single untimely event is all it takes to destroy decades of your hard earned savings. A Trump approved wealth protection strategy puts the power in your hands to control the direction of your financial future. **It is detailed in our 2025 Wealth Protection Guide** **[[click here to download your copy for FREE]](https://substack.com/redirect/124584c3-90cc-4af2-9b54-d4308df86350?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
**Inside this guide, you 'll discover a wealth saving IRS loophole that Trump fought hard to preserve**. It allows you to move your retirement savings tax-free and penalty-free into a time-tested vehicle, free of chaos and market manipulation.

* * *
_**Piece continues**_
"The USA is the first country in the world to bomb a South American capital in all of human history. Neither Netanyahu did it, nor Hitler nor Franco nor Salazar. What a terrible medal that is because for generations South Americans will not forget," Petro said on X. "But the first South American capital bombed, like the Hitlerian bombing of Guernica, cannot be forgotten. Friends do not bomb."
Trump has hinted at targeting Colombia since Petro's government has not done enough to stop production of cocaine.
At Mar-a-Lago, Trump told me he stands by his initial statement on Petro needing to "watch his ass" because of the illegal drugs flowing from the country.
As usual, you can't talk about the drug war without talking about Mexico. On the morning of the raid, President Claudia Sheinbaum said she did not approve and called for the United Nations to get involved to prevent further conflict.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..BM-typRHpAb0P4tpHjmRaX91JA88tkfbdSXHlvYm5ew?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=184058590)
"The Government of Mexico strongly condemns and rejects the military actions carried out unilaterally in recent hours by armed forces of the United States of America...Latin America and the Caribbean is a zone of peace, built on the basis of mutual respect, the peaceful settlement of disputes and the prohibition of the use and threat of force, so any military action seriously jeopardizes regional stability," Sheinbaum's government stated.
Trump has clearly gotten fed up with cartels in Mexico still exerting power in large swaths of the country. While he still thinks Sheinbaum is a "good" leader, he always makes it known it is the cartels who are in control. The corruption that goes alongside the cartel problem, he says, makes it difficult to work with the Mexican government.
It goes without saying that Trump allies in countries like Argentina are happy with the outcome of the operation. The rightward shift in Latin America will make it easier to ensure meaningful cooperation produces results.
With the U.S. now running Venezuela, it is more important than ever to not repeat the mistakes of the past. That is something I believe the Trump administration is clear-eyed about. The security and stability of the Western Hemisphere is paramount to the U.S.
* * *

The late night/early morning raid in Caracas, Venezuela was daring and could have resulted in more assets being needed to deploy to help with an unforeseen problem. Instead, the highly complex operation to arrest dictator Nicolas Maduro at his compound was extremely successful. Keep in mind, Maduro had months of warnings that something like this would happen. It's part of the reason why he would hold public events surrounded by loyalists, who conveniently acted as human shields if the United States wanted to do something during the day. Replace the mainstream media with bold independent journalism! Become a PolitiBrawl member today: All of the propaganda videos showing the "might" of the Venezuelan military amounted to nothing since, according to President Donald Trump, the U.S. was able to "turn off" the country's defensive infrastructure when the raid started. U.S. forces were quick and lethal. Maduro's Cuban bodyguards were quickly eliminated. No U.S. service member was killed and no vehicles were lost. This was certainly not a repeat of Operation Gothic Serpent's "Black Hawk Down" episode. And, for good measure, the U.S. military blasted at the mausoleum hosting Hugo Chavez's body. Why? Because we don't like communists, that's why. As you can imagine, the success of the raid has shaken the leftist governments of Latin America. Next door, Colombian President Gustavo Petro has spent the last two days denouncing the U.S., while also stating he is not worried about anything happening to him.
