As usual, you can't talk about the drug war without talking about Mexico. On the morning of the raid, President Claudia Sheinbaum said she did not approve and called for the United Nations to get involved to prevent further conflict. "The Government of Mexico strongly condemns and rejects the military actions carried out unilaterally in recent hours by armed forces of the United States of America...Latin America and the Caribbean is a zone of peace, built on the basis of mutual respect, the peaceful settlement of disputes and the prohibition of the use and threat of force, so any military action seriously jeopardizes regional stability," Sheinbaum's government stated. Trump has clearly gotten fed up with cartels in Mexico still exerting power in large swaths of the country. While he still thinks Sheinbaum is a "good" leader, he always makes it known it is the cartels who are in control. The corruption that goes alongside the cartel problem, he says, makes it difficult to work with the Mexican government. name: The Democrats
subject: Help shape the future of the Democratic Party:
body:
---
Derek, **We’re at a critical moment, and your voice matters more than ever.** The midterms are fast approaching, and we can’t leave anything to chance. We’ve seen over and over again that when Democrats invest, and when we compete everywhere, we can win anywhere. Last year, we won races all over the country — from Mississippi to Wisconsin to Arizona and beyond. We flipped seats in places that hadn’t had a Democratic leader in decades. As we prepare for the 2026 midterms and beyond, the Democratic Party is listening closely to our base. We want to know what issues matter most to you, where you think we should focus our efforts, and how we can better communicate, organize, and fight for the values we share — _because we can’t move forward without you._ That’s why we’re reaching out today to ask for your input. We’ve put together a survey to hear directly from our supporters across the country. Your answers will help guide our strategy, messaging, advocacy, and investments in the months ahead. [**Whether you’re a longtime activist, a first-time voter, or somewhere in between, your voice will shape the future of this Party and the future of our country. So please take 3-5 minutes to make your voice heard to strengthen our movement.**](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260110_supporter_survey_copy/?refcode=em_20260110_5735_fr&amount=7&akid=5735%2E22930333%2EkjLMyh) **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://ak.democrats.org/signup/20260110_supporter_survey_copy/?refcode=em_20260110_5735_fr&akid=5735%2E22930333%2EkjLMyh)** **Your answers won’t just sit in a spreadsheet.** When Democrats across the country take the time to make their voices heard, that is how we create a vision for the future of our Party. In solidarity, The Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: YOUR SIGNATURE IS MISSING via Fight For Reform
subject: Live Electoral College Petition [Trump HATES this!!!]
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23806%2E4449941%2EG7uIhD) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23806%2E4449941%2EG7uIhD) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71823?t=3&akid=23806%2E4449941%2EG7uIhD) We thought all hope was lost, team.

**UNTIL** Elizabeth Warren stepped up and spoke out in favor of abolishing the Electoral College!! | [ **“Everyone’s vote should count equally - in every election - no matter where they live.”
-Elizabeth Warren** ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71823?t=4&akid=23806%2E4449941%2EG7uIhD) | [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71823?t=5&akid=23806%2E4449941%2EG7uIhD)
---|---
So, we’re launching a HUGE petition to showcase just how many Americans are in favor of abolishing the Electoral College.
[ **Sign onto our petition before it closes at 8AM TOMORROW if you support abolishing the Electoral College >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71823?t=6&akid=23806%2E4449941%2EG7uIhD)
[ADD MY NAME →](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71823?t=7&akid=23806%2E4449941%2EG7uIhD)
---
Here are the facts, team:

➡️ If the Electoral College didn’t exist, Hillary Clinton would have been elected President in 2016.

➡️➡️ **Donald Trump wouldn’t even be in the picture!!**

➡️➡️➡️ NOW – we have to deal with the consequences of the Electoral College system and make sure that we NEVER allow another unpopular candidate to be elected EVER. AGAIN.

But Trump’s MAGA Minions have already started fighting back to make sure that the Electoral College stays for good.

**_They know it’s their only hope at winning another Presidential election!_**

body:
| | | ******There is a death penalty U.S. Supreme Court case that could have grave consequences** **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQspAbPSpPuaj1jgwGWpjiBAgePscIpYXv9ygB3e1J1-ofldDfPIzOIMQlLP18Jn8YfJ6FdO4z5Q1z1bBnTP8kn55qvqu-NDdX7q6SjfSEj22ldwTQvEDENFo_j_QFZfu8PIm2cqRjVhyDTjfeRqldwQkfSqMff4itR_BL9_ljQ2qR4W1Id1ZvzxjFNVHKbwmyFipY4M3dpQS8RLwZgbDmbiP0bv9nk2cG_AkypISRogVzNBBMtcxr1C4L7D4OzkyJb7stV9vUFteEH8f-KyW0DeDj4oCZOD4l1CuCNOX4qU0a/4n6/e8CdQ4KhS1OBaCQE3UWBTw/h0/h001.sGYC94kZPWuuP7Y-bSkeJfbUIm8utVPeWlgld1F0Q8A)**[**Donate to help elect champions with disabilities and our allies to Congress to protect the dignity and the rights of all, regardless of ability.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcSzgOvaKukkllACdq2W1GjsIpnuN7dRM32VN5VpgllDu3u7bvDc0HZfeHI1CrA0FdjoWmpCzXLJfdedd4kQ8YOjW6MNt_TY4MvP6dpa0ETGDi6sMatnapiSDyVHLy9qIOQZpa2aC8asiBqcV4SKUCxoXTiHjfyExXmaI-84QJAKTtZLND4TWYYvnFzCXalcvVR_5MziYuOXS4PE0coNzurUjo9AUGj9t3tDQjMPMz5ac/4n6/e8CdQ4KhS1OBaCQE3UWBTw/h1/h001.dXvKDiMeP9nqc2OC7GQcyJd0h0Y3jqCkrD1tBQ1TnW4)
* * *
The U.S. Supreme Court is considering whether IQ scores should be used when determining if a death row inmate’s intellectual disability is severe enough that it would be cruel and unusual punishment to execute him. **Now this might seem a little unconnected to disability rights, but it has serious consequences for eligibility for government services for people with disabilities, such as health care, education services, and income support.** Someone’s IQ does not determine someone’s ability. If we start relying solely on IQ tests and count out other factors, such as information about someone’s ability to navigate daily life and how early any problems started. We need folks in Congress who understand the complexities of different abilities and the different needs of each person. [**Donate $10 to ensure dignity and that the rights of all are respected, regardless of ability.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8Qh9jkKzoHgDlenfIyxDNP3UK3R9edUq1OJhfOH3SxtF_c6GwOkowK_u2qzk8Sz_PrbM1MLi6b9rtiCjlPeM1MF6mpgTb5D5EpisMcHqR_8ii5EAk3bdBQgoxa6dNOLBApKW-TjHK--FYjmn7bc1NEER1-Vu7vNqalTYEzsS7rSO4LCEBgI0omVwOrnOOsXyqZd0bAOgMP8qSofaQiUT_aYMb4Y4a2jjEVKnx-qH6_SWg/4n6/e8CdQ4KhS1OBaCQE3UWBTw/h2/h001.brQgCHDf8CWT80U21FUVjBB_xCuvKNxVWiEWEqQI5cY) ****_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | ****There is a death penalty U.S. Supreme Court case that could have grave consequences The U.S. Supreme Court is considering whether IQ scores should be used when determining if a death row inmate’s intellectual disability is severe enough that it would be cruel and unusual punishment to execute him. Now this might seem a little unconnected to disability rights, but it has serious consequences for eligibility for government services for people with disabilities, such as health care, education services, and income support. Someone’s IQ does not determine someone’s ability. If we start relying solely on IQ tests and count out other factors, such as information about someone’s ability to navigate daily life and how early any problems started. We need folks in Congress who understand the complexities of different abilities and the different needs of each person. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. ** Thanks for your support. -Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: Team Marsha Blackburn
subject: The clock is ticking, Peter...
body:
And the Democrats aren’t wasting a SECOND!

| | | | The clock is ticking, Peter...
Election year is finally here, and the Democrats aren’t wasting a SECOND to try and get the upper hand in November.

* They’re convincing TOP recruits to go against GOP leaders in vulnerable seats that will decide the House and Senate Majorities.
* They’re raising MILLIONS to prop them up with all the resources they need to succeed.
* And they’re even redistricting the maps in KEY states to put even more races in their favor!

If they succeed, Peter, they’ll have control of the House and Senate, erase all of the progress our MAGA agenda has made, and worst of all:
"If we don't win the midterms, it's just going to be — I mean, they’ll find a reason to impeach me. I’ll get impeached,"\- President Donald Trump[HELP US FIGHT BACK
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDExMF9QTC1QRS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3OTEzODUtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNjAxMTBfUEwtUEUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzkxMzg1LTEwNDMifQ/0c_uljB5uQ6N0ZL_YihORA)In other words, Peter, if we’re going to ensure President Trump has the time and momentum to carry out his FULL agenda and Make America Great Again, we need to act NOW!
We need to give GOP leaders the tools they need to fend off these latest schemes from the Left and ensure BOTH of our Majorities stay RED!
But we can’t do it without you, Peter. We need our top MAGA supporters to step up now more than ever and help us keep fighting to put America First.
[So please, join the fight today and chip in anything you can spare to ensure MAGA Republicans win BIG again this November and give President Trump all the resources he needs to get our nation on the right track.](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDExMF9QTC1QRS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3OTEzODUtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNjAxMTBfUEwtUEUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzkxMzg1LTEwNDMifQ/rI4ABqoYj08Q-BRWsSMM5A)[CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDExMF9QTC1QRS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3OTEzODUtMTA0MyZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNjAxMTBfUEwtUEUuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzkxMzg1LTEwNDMifQ/Z2famM8wVlWIe2zrGIxGBw)Thanks in advance!
\- Team Marsha Blackburn| | |

null, Trump’s Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth is facing increased criticism from both sides of the aisle – and for good reason:
* A Pentagon watchdog says Hegseth may have **endangered U.S. troops** by leaking classified military strike plans via a messaging app.

* Hegseth ordered a strike that killed 9 people at sea, and then a second strike **killed unarmed survivors** clinging to the wreckage – potentially committing a serious war crime.

* **Hegseth kicked journalists out of the Pentagon** and replaced them with MAGA influencers. Now, _The New York Times_ is suing him over unconstitutional media restrictions.

Some Republicans in Congress are questioning whether Hegseth can stay in his role.

**Now, we need grassroots supporters like you to weigh in. We're looking for 100 responses from 18326 before midnight, null.**_[Tell us where you stand:](http://act.haleyformi.com/go/11553?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1882%2E49239%2EhtGgu8)_

Friend, Trump and his violent immigration agents are terrorizing our communities, kidnapping and killing our neighbors. The ICE shooting of Renee Nicole Good in Minneapolis is the latest in a string of deaths related to ICE raids, traffic stops, and detention facilities. **Last year 32 people died in ICE custody―the most in more than two decades.** While my Democratic colleagues in Congress are outraged at the killing of Renee Nicole Good, we need to raise our voices to demand congressional action. [**Add your name to demand Congress investigate all ICE-related deaths and take action to defund and abolish ICE.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmFh7XUX7TIpR1gwjMlsHvCUPm-MlaHukMmQ8j_hN8KX0kwAWp5T2ia9ENxw1cnmOawiA_5R44eMHUGo3HNt7jKTjEIu07bd06yEG7Ma7DMi_RO_5nc4cJmXv6oslOk_7AvUmq_8LyBkVqxwvWfwcbKUguYdEF_UslXfv-nZF_mZlwjAjY_bVZWeiGpt1dXwP4IFiOpzSMMewGn49k-UcoDEEHgEmORNnOX4benBfxeKIsr_by1MMbczW531MCjm6ARd2YjlX_UgwkNwRHbacCGNXkXkGj3DtVF9quL46qRA7aNKiSVNgaRRoOfIfX_h_umCz1ERPZckPdUw5A0oEyRA4pdSQIxdNwGf-HQ2EktA_wDyiINQmwGlc5AWr1HYxsDMVCkS5wCPtiAct5aFGK1GpGTr2866zwX0-I7NN5tm8/4n6/YxMR1Q7DTjuZUm3-i62hDw/h1/h001.yzRl20L2Nuqyn19Bco22vdbLtWPwfDsnmlw0-R3hrfg) | [TAKE ACTION](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmFh7XUX7TIpR1gwjMlsHvCUPm-MlaHukMmQ8j_hN8KX0kwAWp5T2ia9ENxw1cnmOawiA_5R44eMHUGo3HNt7jKTjEIu07bd06yEG7Ma7DMi_RO_5nc4cJmXv6oslOk_7AvUmq_8LyBkVqxwvWfwcbKUguYdEF_UslXfv-nZF_mZlWIEbZFdA7tfg3XXDl3Qp2sam0-pzjxqrZPzeF3QaLqvQ1M3yvIwchmTc506Kbc2DwtY2keUwyYA4pKiSNk-wcg5kNvyT4N1F7t78fxrAj96ll3pkFcE13luW7h9iSYEIaIJI3qk__-aVI_crQyI-RDJC9ysBlYJjCoxz9mMzD6_LlNBvlEMy97nxXsBi6JS2KOS_hK6ZDh5_864FkzJnc9sYz-x6DObI8ul-zSQDV2WAVfNLyX_-JftArmV4W_14/4n6/YxMR1Q7DTjuZUm3-i62hDw/h2/h001.QfCefYbpKXHp6-NpRmEQE0qxhXxpc97PAJdl5afH6RE)

Last year was the deadliest year in decades for ICE—only matched by the record set in 2004, one year after ICE was created.
It’s time to dismantle ICE and hold the Department of Homeland Security (which oversees ICE) accountable. We will not be silent as the Trump administration—including Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem—blames victims, terrorizes our communities, and silences dissent.
Thank you for taking action for our rights and our neighbors.
With you in this fight,
Rashida

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Rashida Tlaib******
Date: Fri, Jan 9, 2026
Subject: Abolish ICE now [add your name]
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
This week, an ICE agent murdered Renee Nicole Good at point blank range―a mother of three who loved to sing and write poetry. She had just dropped her 6-year-old off at school and was following agents’ instructions to drive away. But an ICE agent shot and killed her. She was in her car next to her wife and you can hear her screams immediately after.
> _“ICE is terrorizing our communities with zero accountability. ICE makes our neighborhoods less safe, vindictively and cruelly tearing families apart.”_
Those are my words from seven years ago. No matter who is president, ICE has been militarizing our neighborhoods. They just got the green light to do it out in the open for everyone to see, so they can invoke fear. We must demand Renee’s killer be held accountable and this rogue masked agency be removed from our neighborhoods. Republicans so far have blocked the Oversight committee from receiving DHS information on the incident.
Abolish ICE now. [Join tomorrow’s protests across the country and here at Clark Park.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMYKt_PNbTZJM77xb-PM80u6pYKVCzVEyWZIn5eiVbmoJAyxyPz8bxzns3cxhM-W40rbATlqKWzQ3CZ3a7mhetD7Lwwa-A6N4BW0TsV5rK5HGfpJW3ajvS2zjhkfSfM1b8xZKncyeujLy71DKYad3l702aNXBFQ7ouSPBHm6sVhVkQ0j6Gj9a6_e4zfgh5Tqi8qfok_9anwgiY8rUpE0xrrsoVHqAQeDf6yc1cUJ22Xj6rgfuhgKMZMgsy1UrJpN4Fn-m2Pwukmrynp9upOlLhNKJTjGZ9BWeKh5IgE56ZtoT/4n6/YxMR1Q7DTjuZUm3-i62hDw/h4/h001.eDiCEAuk-B4eCXgxDmSHCoCuB3wJODvBn3k-pjBwazY)
**We must demand her killer be held accountable—and for this rogue agency of masked and militarized bullies to be removed from our neighborhoods.**
Congress created ICE, and Congress can end ICE too. Congress can also take immediate action to hold ICE and Trump’s administration accountable by investigating all ICE-related deaths.
[**Sign if you agree: It’s time for Congress to abolish ICE and hold the agency accountable.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmFh7XUX7TIpR1gwjMlsHvCUPm-MlaHukMmQ8j_hN8KX0kwAWp5T2ia9ENxw1cnmOawiA_5R44eMHUGo3HNt7jKTjEIu07bd06yEG7Ma7DMi_RO_5nc4cJmXv6oslOk_7AvUmq_8LyBkVqxwvWfwcbKUguYdEF_UslXfv-nZF_mZlKw2EiFh3upkD0YAd3sWcJ6LfymfZq6NeRo5HZ2hiMFc2RMCJ-89FgBg_StQJyX8smfYZNwPwpjd4z58jxPgcfW8a52lfu4F36hEEQFS7xNiaBjm7gKhtFI-Vo0J9WqB58VwAUaCmUtW4IopQibR1l_-fx4SGpTPRRI5fSCctzq94LjjQ0Frjcn88SwlMm1d9pn_KYMtdY6ciE6OsHzNpMR10JrhJc1oEmqdwczBUqDfGwy_gGpvfqAOGvCqyGWuM/4n6/YxMR1Q7DTjuZUm3-i62hDw/h5/h001.3lhSKlR-OxmXwKAUX-ylmNFaIWJcWHTvzGwV4iCf1SI)
[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmFh7XUX7TIpR1gwjMlsHvCUPm-MlaHukMmQ8j_hN8KX0kwAWp5T2ia9ENxw1cnmOawiA_5R44eMHUGo3HNt7jKTjEIu07bd06yEG7Ma7DMi_RO_5nc4cJmXv6oslOk_7AvUmq_8LyBkVqxwvWfwcbKUguYdEF_UslXfv-nZF_mZkP-zg-U56tIt8f3jyewiAr5q8iW1gJ68H2yRDToL5UThidWavup1LpwYvFihCbXEYoiV0LypTQiq8RwG2qttvhonjPL8QjyxSfCqE6VEQcsakDwyVR-O7FdnXjvvLkfUkAPXkQUvzDoXjBU-Y7t1_li3mL3b5N5XWJoQQHAgYwO1JQHlIqOCrSNDvjIDubI1HIeogqFCpjmGC_ZA4bex-H8lZuN8HYl8n74smiw2RPfdoKVIBw_KAxm2Q644AwHP4/4n6/YxMR1Q7DTjuZUm3-i62hDw/h6/h001.pQoZzh947aZn_X5bFspdusCGS_rd4pjxZa0pnQpK42E)
---
Contradicting clear video evidence, the Department of Homeland Security, which oversees ICE and Border Patrol, is falsely slandering Good as a “domestic terrorist,” to try to cover up this deadly shooting.
The president and vice president have joined Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem in blaming Good for her own murder. This follows an outrageous pattern of smears and lies from the Trump administration after federal immigration agents commit fatal and non-fatal shootings.
Since September alone, ICE agents have fired guns on people eleven times while on duty.
At a traffic stop near Chicago, they killed Silverio Villegas González, a father of two who had just dropped his children off at school in Chicago. An off-duty ICE agent also killed another father of two, Keith Porter, in Los Angeles.
Border Patrol agents—also overseen by the Department of Homeland Security—have killed a civilian in Texas and shot people in Chicago. Like ICE, they regularly point their guns at bystanders and protesters, and this week they shot multiple people in Portland.
**People around the country are protesting the killing of Renee Nicole Good and protesting federal immigration officers’ violence in our communities.**
**We must keep pushing back and demanding accountability for these shooting victims and for the 32 people who died in inhumane ICE detention centers in 2025.** 1
[**Add your name to demand Congress investigate all ICE and Border Patrol related murders and deaths now, and take action to defund and abolish ICE.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmFh7XUX7TIpR1gwjMlsHvCUPm-MlaHukMmQ8j_hN8KX0kwAWp5T2ia9ENxw1cnmOawiA_5R44eMHUGo3HNt7jKTjEIu07bd06yEG7Ma7DMi_RO_5nc4cJmXv6oslOk_7AvUmq_8LyBkVqxwvWfwcbKUguYdEF_UslXfv-nZF_mZkajVN5SzjZIkrAm6VoSvxyJOLTKW4lVip3yXpAmQKdMRiwFE_9ecN_-o9m-eFuDRSW6W-llZKQyTH7OPZZUKXv-IGqzbh9vBFVQvAGD-XIsgQQG1nz_wE1wVvFeqJB9Wb-Gfi-0I3-51flDfQ45E_n9Ck47UofprXLbfJSZ6L-ximaJLJoFqp8ZDnQBo_Vr8AoIqISrOR_OKvb2ETKw4WfAvoyR46ToAtKKJhbT72Jm2xZP4imN2ei3m4r0An2MsQ/4n6/YxMR1Q7DTjuZUm3-i62hDw/h7/h001.B46XW4WzSMnicdJD10hg7sjTRpo-bjB1S7LUDIEivvk)
Right now, Congress is negotiating government funding bills, and some of my Republican colleagues are suggesting _increasing_ funding for ICE detention camps.
**Instead of expanding Trump’s deadly mass deportation scheme, we need Congress to defund ICE and hold the Department of Homeland Security accountable.**
I’m on the Oversight Committee in Congress, and so far, my Republican colleagues are blocking the committee from receiving the Department of Homeland Security’s information about this incident.
Instead of expanding ICE’s ability to separate families, racially profile and kill our neighbors, and terrorize our communities, we demand oversight, investigations, accountability, and an end to this violent government agency.
[**Join me in holding DHS, ICE, and this lawless administration accountable. Add your name to demand Congress immediately investigate all ICE-related deaths and defund and abolish ICE.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39uDKkapQVnT18L0ER7M9FmFh7XUX7TIpR1gwjMlsHvCUPm-MlaHukMmQ8j_hN8KX0kwAWp5T2ia9ENxw1cnmOawiA_5R44eMHUGo3HNt7jKTjEIu07bd06yEG7Ma7DMi_RO_5nc4cJmXv6oslOk_7AvUmq_8LyBkVqxwvWfwcbKUguYdEF_UslXfv-nZF_mZmTI5WaDdRpnI4PSSpk7BVUzqezPGSA4SDUJG9-A3GmqDI_7biQBpB17LgJORMG9Ld2nSkpz3VHt_e4qlmLDPv5f5bBXneC2cKuqOMDUUYxzkOfOQKjDVwpUWaLC8fkk-5uKcVIGkgdxTPkRxnTTNRvx9JUuPlJeSyUUXTRjnEYlKX_9Ftik4N2fv3AMfPHlcWRVLQYB7zORvjaQizw7Jx4Ia5qC_E85b10YNxCRY9aV13rB6u-RgE4U-kyEnMOu9A/4n6/YxMR1Q7DTjuZUm3-i62hDw/h8/h001.PAMAWY7pHJ_3nxxjjaniTPh3M-d0ehd9q5TOAtQenVo)
ICE and the Trump administration are making our streets and communities less safe. They want to silence us through fear and intimidation. But we fight fascism by continuing to speak out and show up for our neighbors.
People power has won major changes. Together, we will continue demanding the world we deserve, where everyone’s rights and humanity are respected.
In love and solidarity,

clean_body: ICE is making our communities less safe. | | | Friend, Trump and his violent immigration agents are terrorizing our communities, kidnapping and killing our neighbors. The ICE shooting of Renee Nicole Good in Minneapolis is the latest in a string of deaths related to ICE raids, traffic stops, and detention facilities. Last year 32 people died in ICE custody―the most in more than two decades. While my Democratic colleagues in Congress are outraged at the killing of Renee Nicole Good, we need to raise our voices to demand congressional action. | Last year was the deadliest year in decades for ICE—only matched by the record set in 2004, one year after ICE was created. It’s time to dismantle ICE and hold the Department of Homeland Security (which oversees ICE) accountable. We will not be silent as the Trump administration—including Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem—blames victims, terrorizes our communities, and silences dissent. Thank you for taking action for our rights and our neighbors. With you in this fight, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Jan 9, 2026 Subject: Abolish ICE now [add your name] To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, This week, an ICE agent murdered Renee Nicole Good at point blank range―a mother of three who loved to sing and write poetry. She had just dropped her 6-year-old off at school and was following agents’ instructions to drive away. But an ICE agent shot and killed her. She was in her car next to her wife and you can hear her screams immediately after. “ICE is terrorizing our communities with zero accountability. ICE makes our neighborhoods less safe, vindictively and cruelly tearing families apart.” Those are my words from seven years ago. No matter who is president, ICE has been militarizing our neighborhoods. They just got the green light to do it out in the open for everyone to see, so they can invoke fear. We must demand Renee’s killer be held accountable and this rogue masked agency be removed from our neighborhoods. Republicans so far have blocked the Oversight committee from receiving DHS information on the incident. Abolish ICE now. We must demand her killer be held accountable—and for this rogue agency of masked and militarized bullies to be removed from our neighborhoods. Congress created ICE, and Congress can end ICE too. Congress can also take immediate action to hold ICE and Trump’s administration accountable by investigating all ICE-related deaths. Contradicting clear video evidence, the Department of Homeland Security, which oversees ICE and Border Patrol, is falsely slandering Good as a “domestic terrorist,” to try to cover up this deadly shooting. The president and vice president have joined Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem in blaming Good for her own murder. This follows an outrageous pattern of smears and lies from the Trump administration after federal immigration agents commit fatal and non-fatal shootings. Since September alone, ICE agents have fired guns on people eleven times while on duty. At a traffic stop near Chicago, they killed Silverio Villegas González, a father of two who had just dropped his children off at school in Chicago. An off-duty ICE agent also killed another father of two, Keith Porter, in Los Angeles. Border Patrol agents—also overseen by the Department of Homeland Security—have killed a civilian in Texas and shot people in Chicago. Like ICE, they regularly point their guns at bystanders and protesters, and this week they shot multiple people in Portland. People around the country are protesting the killing of Renee Nicole Good and protesting federal immigration officers’ violence in our communities. We must keep pushing back and demanding accountability for these shooting victims and for the 32 people who died in inhumane ICE detention centers in 2025. 1 Right now, Congress is negotiating government funding bills, and some of my Republican colleagues are suggesting increasing funding for ICE detention camps. Instead of expanding Trump’s deadly mass deportation scheme, we need Congress to defund ICE and hold the Department of Homeland Security accountable. I’m on the Oversight Committee in Congress, and so far, my Republican colleagues are blocking the committee from receiving the Department of Homeland Security’s information about this incident. Instead of expanding ICE’s ability to separate families, racially profile and kill our neighbors, and terrorize our communities, we demand oversight, investigations, accountability, and an end to this violent government agency. ICE and the Trump administration are making our streets and communities less safe. They want to silence us through fear and intimidation. But we fight fascism by continuing to speak out and show up for our neighbors. People power has won major changes. Together, we will continue demanding the world we deserve, where everyone’s rights and humanity are respected. In love and solidarity, Rashida 1 * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Rashida Tlaib for Congress, please .

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: The consequences are devastating
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20260110-1807-foote&t=1001&akid=1807%2E342411%2EsL5iCC ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

Trump is sending ICE and the National Guard into our neighborhoods, not to
“fight crime,” but to intimidate, terrorize, and deport at a mass scale.
It’s a deliberate assault on our communities.

Families are being ripped apart, innocent people are at risk, and lives
are being lost. People are living in fear of being arrested or detained
while simply leaving their homes, walking their dogs, or visiting loved
ones.

This is what happens when one man uses power to bully and terrorize, and
the consequences are devastating.

Alexandria, Ayanna, Ilhan, and Rashida aren’t backing down — not now, not
ever. They’re standing shoulder to shoulder, speaking truth to power, and
putting themselves on the front lines to protect our communities from
Trump’s terror and intimidation.

While Trump sends ICE and the National Guard into our neighborhoods, our
four champions are fighting to defend families, defend immigrants, and
defend the safety and dignity of everyone in our streets.

The Squad knows what’s at stake: lives, homes, and the very fabric of our
communities. And they are leading the fight so that no one has to live in
fear of stepping outside their front door. And they need all the support
they can get.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260110-movement.WATGgP&refcode=em20260110-1807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1807%2E342411%2EsL5iCC ]Will you chip in $3 to the Squad Victory Fund to fight
back against ICE and Trump’s militarization to protect our communities?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20260110-movement.WATGgP&refcode=em20260110-1807&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1807%2E342411%2EsL5iCC ]Contribute ››

Thank you,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1807%2E342411%2EsL5iCC

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

subject: Kicking corporate money out of our elections
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado

We need you with us to rebuild our politics.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123061066/594279614/1239926708?refcode=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmQ3MDI2OC0zZGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqnotrjomzZJqEIwpC7EIktIOYY6Xq8vQ19WzDAqFUU=&emci=7c260a9b-aeed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=51844520) Here’s something that won’t surprise you: Big money from corporations and secret donors have corrupted our elections and eroded confidence in government. The Supreme Court’s decision in _Citizens United_ is to blame for most of this. **But here’s the good news:_we don’t have to wait for the Supreme Court to fix the mess we’re in._** **[As your next governor, Phil will support efforts to get dark and corporate money out of our politics — because he’s in this for everyday Coloradans like YOU, not billionaires or corporations. Can you help us prove this is a winning agenda by contributing $25 to our people-powered campaign today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123061072/594279639/-246109695?amount=25&refcode=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmQ3MDI2OC0zZGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqnotrjomzZJqEIwpC7EIktIOYY6Xq8vQ19WzDAqFUU=)** | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123061083/594279667/-246109695?refcode=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmQ3MDI2OC0zZGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqnotrjomzZJqEIwpC7EIktIOYY6Xq8vQ19WzDAqFUU=)

The painful reality is that, given the importance of campaign donations, far too many politicians focus on the needs of the wealthy and powerful companies — not on the needs of the people who voted for them.
**Citizens in Montana are working to change that with a ballot initiative to get corporate money out of politics._We deserve the same protections right here in Colorado._**
Maybe the best part? There’s precedent for this kind of solution. States have legally defined what corporations are (and are not) allowed to do since the 1700s. Our state legislature has modified these laws four times in the last thirty years — and we can do it again to prevent corporations from influencing elections. **Now’s the time for us to change them for the better.**
**[Friends, let’s make a New Year’s resolution to get dark and corporate money out of our politics together. As your governor, Phil will always support efforts to make politicians more accountable to the people. If you’re with him, can you chip in $25 to our campaign right now?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123061094/594279698/-246109695?amount=25&refcode=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ms=ea.16d70268-3dee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmQ3MDI2OC0zZGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bqnotrjomzZJqEIwpC7EIktIOYY6Xq8vQ19WzDAqFUU=)**

name: Brad Finstad
subject: Minnesota’s future doesn’t begin in November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finstad for Congress
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friends, The future for Minnesota Republicans doesn’t begin in November.
It begins on **Tuesday, February 3** , at precinct caucuses across the state.
That night determines your local precinct leaders, who becomes a delegate, which candidates get momentum, and ultimately who our party puts forward in critical races up and down the ballot. If Republicans don’t organize early, we spend the rest of the cycle playing catch-up.
That’s why we’ve launched the **Finstad Caucus Fund.**
Caucuses don’t run themselves. They require:
* Volunteer organizers on the ground in every precinct
* Coverage at hundreds of locations district-wide
* Outreach to first-time caucus-goers who don’t know how the process works
* Turnout operations to make sure conservatives actually show up at 7:00 p.m.

Every cycle, Democrats invest heavily in this stage of the process. Republicans can’t afford to treat it as an afterthought.
If you’ve never attended a caucus before, February 3 is your chance to:
* Support conservative candidates early
* Influence the party platform
* Help select the delegates who will endorse strong and capable candidates for Governor and Congress

But none of that matters if turnout falls short.
**The Finstad Caucus Fund exists for one reason:** to make sure conservatives show up, are organized, and are ready to win.
If you believe Republicans need to start strong in 2026 — not scramble later — I’m asking you to contribute today and help us mobilize for February 3.
---
| | [Donate Today](http://link.finstadforcongress.com/api/LinkHandler/getaction2?%3d)
---
| Thank you for standing with us at the very beginning of this fight. **Team Finstad**

name: Senator Maggie W. Hassan
subject: This is about my son Ben:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
This is Maggie Hassan. I’m outraged.

I’ll tell you why: RFK Jr. continues to push radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and attacks on folks with disabilities.

I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that folks like my son, Ben — who was born with cerebral palsy — would have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123061106/594279751/-671935818?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.10_Ben-New_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjViNmY2MS0zZGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BXFGjRXxdCfpsjO6LuEckb1j0L0VDrSieaoraZONBL8=) Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and RFK Jr. attacking key rights and protections for people with disabilities, that mission is more important than ever. They’re attempting to undo the progress we’ve made — slashing Medicaid and planning cuts to Social Security, disability grant programs, and affordable housing access.

I’m not afraid of RFK Jr. I’ll continue going head-to-head with him in the Senate, but I need your support:

clean_body: This is Maggie Hassan. I’m outraged. I’ll tell you why: RFK Jr. continues to push radical conspiracy theories, dangerous anti-vaccine rhetoric, and attacks on folks with disabilities. I got my start in public service as an advocate, helping to ensure that folks like my son, Ben — who was born with cerebral palsy — would have the same opportunities that all parents want for their children. = Now, with extremists like Donald Trump and RFK Jr. attacking key rights and protections for people with disabilities, that mission is more important than ever. They’re attempting to undo the progress we’ve made — slashing Medicaid and planning cuts to Social Security, disability grant programs, and affordable housing access. I’m not afraid of RFK Jr. I’ll continue going head-to-head with him in the Senate, but I need your support: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = With every good wish, Maggie Hassan If you'd like to support Maggie Hassan for Senate, =. = We believe that emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. name: Demand Justice PAC
subject: Why is Trump picking these judges?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260110-61065&t=1001&akid=61065%2E1407376%2EBF1_nO ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260110-61065&t=1002&akid=61065%2E1407376%2EBF1_nO ]Demand Justice PAC

They are not letting up: Trump just announced four more awful nominees to
federal courts.

And no — this isn’t about “merit.” His picks include...

* A Ted Cruz loyalist fresh off the Senate Judiciary Committee;
* A judge so notorious he once handled nearly a quarter of all U.S.
patent cases in his own courtroom — drawing bipartisan outrage given
that some individuals and companies made money by filing these
lawsuits;
* A right-wing lawyer who backed Trump’s crusade against diversity in
STEM fields and led a conservative assault on class action lawsuits.

Perhaps more importantly than their so-called qualifications is that they
were all selected because they are personally loyal to Trump, not the
Constitution.

When Trump breaks the law, he wants judges who will look the other way.
When he abuses power, he wants judges who will rubber-stamp it.

It’s the Senate’s job to reject these crony nominees. But some Democrats
have been voting for them. We need to make it crystal clear: there is no
“bipartisan compromise” on packing the courts with extremists.

Demand Justice is organizing a mass movement to protect our courts from
becoming Trump’s personal shield. But we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260110.VedMn2&refcode=em20260110-61065&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61065%2E1407376%2EBF1_nO ]Can you chip in $5 right now to help us block Trump’s

name: Mark Kelly
subject: I will not give up on our country.
body:
It has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.
| Peter, If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. It didn’t stop when the FBI wanted to talk to me and other members of Congress. Because now the Department of Defense has announced that it is escalating its investigation into me. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. And if you’d be willing to help support me, please: **[Split a donation between Roy Cooper and me. It would mean a lot.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3787?t=2&akid=327%2E124072%2E2urtGs)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately and be split between Mark Kelly and Roy Cooper:_ | [SPLIT $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3788?t=3&akid=327%2E124072%2E2urtGs)

It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. It didn’t stop when the FBI wanted to talk to me and other members of Congress. Because now the Department of Defense has announced that it is escalating its investigation into me. All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear. If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, Peter. I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution. There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None. If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming. subject: I will not give up on our country.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_ots_header]
Folks,

If you can believe it, things didn’t stop when Trump called for my hanging. It didn’t stop with the threat of a court-martial from Pete Hegseth, either. It didn’t stop when the FBI wanted to talk to me and other members of Congress. Because now the Department of Defense has announced that it is escalating its investigation into me.

All for saying things the president didn’t like to hear.

If you’re feeling like this isn’t the country you grew up in, I don’t blame you. But I hope you aren’t giving up on it, folks.

I certainly haven’t. This country has given me too much, and I’ll never be able to repay that debt. I still believe in our democracy, our values, and our Constitution.

There’s no chance in hell that somebody like Donald Trump is going to stop me from serving the people of this nation. None.

If he thought all of this was going to shut me up, he’s got another thing coming.

And if you’d be willing to help support me, please:

name: Morgan Stahr, United for Democracy
subject: ICE killed Renee Nicole Good
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Democracy
body:
The Trump administration is using the kingly powers the Supreme Court granted them to sanction murder. | |
---
Peter, **This week, an ICE agent in Minneapolis murdered Renee Nicole Good on camera, in broad daylight.** The Trump administration’s response? To vehemently defend her killer, and all ICE agents harming and abusing Americans: [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39jrk8_2fFX_qnwxGkMsTuYbhriwOXWwXzLZLu8I4Pizvm9iqvyMwVSCF4Cq-z8LsLbdBysovnhpcntoGzdJZnu7ISBJai8OeANRifMaFxHlh-pYy1fmsa2jl2KOn4AQQtk8nJV6f7FejfVRwe1y4mugusIos4eKzRRn_eDGTtFrAF0GawrxkXmzCLjVR6rkuSRIANzIou6k4odukYhZiIyG7A46yQh5yjhmt3OKPETV089_H_HTKd4gzrLOZG6Gods2WC0WqvK1BJSbxn4I4SbeaAuWXBWrpOf9BGthHWlYp1TwILArvAhG3Y013SWIBFR9kx8G07HgfE37aURZWTU-YYkVxeMLNu6QnSb_TDNhNJFXmfzvpjYNcF_7ipnpQMsCi_WrvKKp7xYEwewign511u_1isnKR1cpb2bAy3tilcl-rYsNqc6_mSA1pG9Uk2b8ibuwTeSw5c0hOwLngLYOCMsW5oghryq6SaIJ5QgOJ1FRjzkazezZJ98e7qT60Q/4n6/_KtE3NU6TWmiOqLvxRfuNQ/h0/h001.xVmRaarErHjI9KwMrCpb6hkWPsYosscD4bgOyVbPaS4) This is what abuse of power looks like. **These are the very kingly powers the Supreme Court bestowed upon Trump and his cronies in action.** The entire Trump administration, down to the individual ICE agent, is acting under the shield of lawlessness that the MAGA justices gave them. If the Supreme Court won’t protect everyday Americans, Congress must. [**We have a right to know exactly how Trump’s lawlessness is harming our friends and neighbors. Send a message to your members of Congress demanding they investigate all ICE-related deaths now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39jrk8_2fFX_qnwxGkMsTuYbhriwOXWwXzLZLu8I4Pizvm9iqvyMwVSCF4Cq-z8LsLbdBysovnhpcntoGzdJZnu7ISBJai8OeANRifMaFxHlh-pYy1fmsa2jl2KOn4AQQtk8nJV6f7FejfVRwe1y4mugusIos4eKzRRn_eDGTtFrAF0GawrxkXmzCLjVR6rkuSRIANzIou6k4odukYhZiIyG7A46yQh5yjhmt3OKPETV089_H_HTKd4gzrLOZG6GofEzxoYa_naM2GurevBH9g9Xhc0Pt-kd_4KH-CKbkogsF8c6bPsHl02OzGMewjvR6cu0NY-tynZAHFE7unofIPGswKzDBz9RUr4fyGbiSEzltfAoJ1O8gPwofrd-ZgBDrad8scrSE8yRdyBAEb0jmxt_0fRI4aUnsbQfbATCDAov-HFleo4vjqn3ob9DQj9prgGqRJZ4T6KJK-CBDjKbArcMxQlAz1lfWZXRR5TwDn_dc37csC7tnAOIHpQCStLz2Q/4n6/_KtE3NU6TWmiOqLvxRfuNQ/h1/h001.XXRi6y4iAgOfK8yHZaVgTAVPuV4Em3Riu50zF736j7w) **Renee Nicole Good is not the first victim of ICE unaccountability.** Silverio Villegas González was killed at a traffic stop in Chicago. Jaime Alanís Garcia and Roberto Carlos Montoya Valdez died fleeing from ICE raids in their towns. 2025 was the deadliest year in decades for people in ICE custody. The constitutional crisis created by the MAGA justices have plunged us into a very dark era for our democracy. Will we allow the president to sanction murder in our streets? Or will we hold ICE accountable? **None of this is acceptable, and we need our leaders to act.** Congress has a responsibility to subpoena evidence, require testimony under oath, and fully investigate every ICE-related death. [**Tell your member of Congress: Defend your constituents and our democracy. Investigate all ICE-related deaths now.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm39jrk8_2fFX_qnwxGkMsTuYbhriwOXWwXzLZLu8I4Pizvm9iqvyMwVSCF4Cq-z8LsLbdBysovnhpcntoGzdJZnu7ISBJai8OeANRifMaFxHlh-pYy1fmsa2jl2KOn4AQQtk8nJV6f7FejfVRwe1y4mugusIos4eKzRRn_eDGTtFrAF0GawrxkXmzCLjVR6rkuSRIANzIou6k4odukYhZiIyG7A46yQh5yjhmt3OKPETV089_H_HTKd4gzrLOZG6GodCuo14vHuviIHzrsDSI5C0a8FBojz6C-9fBReeu8ldODS9EgBzg99pxMjflCjgGJZSEPyQCach7eLb3m7ys10Qf5frCykECxy2y1ZHQUmxg6m_8rO8xFGPGuoDAxlH6SdtRWX8TiYAHR8iGH0AUQ9USNaxe4wE1TejUoaYyBUzEnrD57ribveism13hfaqfHukGEe-A1je3drOP6K0uoFakQbdTZknxgRiNKZnYYCe0vALljyunjwdy_hx3AqDodU/4n6/_KtE3NU6TWmiOqLvxRfuNQ/h2/h001.wOsTKmJkx8IB-nE-ejnwPd4RNzzWZDeczAS27LK6wXU) Thank you for fighting back against lawless unaccountability, Morgan Stahr

name: Randy Villegas
subject: this didn’t have to happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
# [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123069968/594289254/1733485174?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMxMWRlOWMtNDFlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jS-oN82wqb840agA4AOnwdy6nqkbiYFScuVKmAn8Ubw=)
Peter, On top of violent ICE raids, the threat of another foreign war, and an out of control cost of living crisis, politicians in Washington continue to make life hard for us here in the Valley. After letting Affordable Care Act tax credits expire and premiums spike, House Republicans finally caved to public pressure and voted to restore them. David Valadao went along, but only after months of needless uncertainty and stress for tens of millions of us who didn’t know if our family could see a doctor without going bankrupt. Health insurance costs shot up, and Valadao stayed silent. He voted to gut Medicaid even though nearly 70% of our district relies on Medi-Cal. And now he wants credit for papering over a problem he created. A lot of us feel overwhelmed right now. But yesterday's vote proves that _we have power when we work together_. If you want to keep this momentum going and bring steady, people-first leadership to CA-22, here are a few ways you can take action right now: -** [Sign up to volunteer](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123069969/594289255/-507209790?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMxMWRlOWMtNDFlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jS-oN82wqb840agA4AOnwdy6nqkbiYFScuVKmAn8Ubw=&emci=7e09bd6f-a3ed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=4c11de9c-41ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=18276767) **with our campaign
-** [Share what issues matter](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123069970/594289256/352107598?refcode=em-1.10.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMxMWRlOWMtNDFlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jS-oN82wqb840agA4AOnwdy6nqkbiYFScuVKmAn8Ubw=&emci=7e09bd6f-a3ed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=4c11de9c-41ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=18276767) **most to you in our community
- **[Make a contribution](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123069973/594289257/949478007?refcode=em-1.10.26-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNGMxMWRlOWMtNDFlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=jS-oN82wqb840agA4AOnwdy6nqkbiYFScuVKmAn8Ubw=) **to hold Valadao accountable and flip this seat Change doesn’t happen by accident. It happens when regular people like us decide we won’t settle for leadership that sells us out and takes us for granted instead of doing their job. We deserve better.
Let’s build better together. clean_body: | = Peter, On top of violent ICE raids, the threat of another foreign war, and an out of control cost of living crisis, politicians in Washington continue to make life hard for us here in the Valley. After letting Affordable Care Act tax credits expire and premiums spike, House Republicans finally caved to public pressure and voted to restore them. David Valadao went along, but only after months of needless uncertainty and stress for tens of millions of us who didn’t know if our family could see a doctor without going bankrupt. Health insurance costs shot up, and Valadao stayed silent. He voted to gut Medicaid even though nearly 70% of our district relies on Medi-Cal. And now he wants credit for papering over a problem he created. A lot of us feel overwhelmed right now. But yesterday's vote proves that we have power when we work together. If you want to keep this momentum going and bring steady, people-first leadership to CA-22, here are a few ways you can take action right now: - with our campaign - most to you in our community - = to hold Valadao accountable and flip this seat Change doesn’t happen by accident. It happens when regular people like us decide we won’t settle for leadership that sells us out and takes us for granted instead of doing their job. We deserve better. Let’s build better together. Randy | | = | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

name: Binkley for Congress
subject: Why Faith Leaders Across America Are Standing With Me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ryan Binkley for Congress
body:
I want to share something with you

| | | | | [|
---](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=07479ab3ed&e=a4fe331f26)
| |
Friend ,

I want to share something with you that means more to me than any political endorsement ever could.As a pastor and CEO, I've spent my life at the intersection of faith and the marketplace. I understand what it takes to grow a business, create jobs, and build an economy that works for working families. But I also understand something even more important—that without our faith, without our freedoms, and without leaders willing to stand for what's right, none of that matters.That's why I'm so humbled that national faith leaders like Kelly Shackleford, Lance Wallnau, Pastor Mike Hayes, and Pastor Jentezen Franklin have endorsed my campaign for Congress.These aren't politicians. They're warriors for religious liberty, pastors who've built thriving churches, and leaders who've spent decades defending our first freedoms. And they're standing with me because they know what's at stake.Kelly Shackleford, who has dedicated his career to defending religious liberty at First Liberty Institute, said it best: _"Ryan Binkley understands that protecting faith and family is essential to preserving America's future."_ Pastor Mike Hayes, who I'm honored to call a friend, said: _"Ryan will bring both wisdom and compassion to Congress, and I'm proud to stand with him in this race."_ But here's what I need you to know: these endorsements aren't about me. They're about what we can accomplish together when we send someone to Washington who won't compromise their values.Someone who understands that our economy grows when families thrive.Someone who will fight to preserve our Christian heritage and defend our religious freedoms.Someone who will actually stand up to the establishment and get things done.**Will you stand with me today by making a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or whatever you can afford?**
---
| | | | | | | | | | | [Donate Today](https://binkleyforcongress.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a7930d2727540612917fd641e&id=87bb23a192&e=a4fe331f26)
---
| |
I'm not taking a dime from corporate PACs. This campaign is powered by people like you who believe we can do better.Together, we can send a pastor and a proven business leader to Congress—someone who lives what he believes and will fight for the values we hold dear.Thank you for your support.In faith and freedom,**Ryan Binkley** P.S. As Pastor Jentezen Franklin said, "We need good men like this." If you believe that too, please chip in whatever you can today. Every dollar helps us reach more voters and win this race.
---

name: David Seligman
subject: A lesson in Telluride
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seligman for AG,
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q1?refcode=x_260110_telluride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q1?refcode=x_260110_telluride_act]
After 13 days, Telluride Ski Resort agreed to a new contract with ski patrollers, ending a strike that garnered national headlines.
The patrollers were striking because Telluride Ski Resort—where daily lift tickets can cost as much as $330 per day —refused to pay its ski patrollers ~$30 an hour.
As we’ve seen over the last 13 days, ski resorts cannot operate without these workers. Telluride’s owner chose to shut down the mountain completely, threatening the local economy to break the ski patrollers’ demands. Outrageous.
In my day job, I sue the biggest companies in the world when they break the law. That includes Telluride Ski Resort—I’ve sued them for wage theft on behalf of immigrant workers at their hotels. Coloradans deserve an attorney general with the courage to stand up for working people when corporations screw them over. I’m ready to bring that fight to the AG’s office.
I'm proud to stand with Telluride’s ski patrollers and workers across our mountain communities, and I hope you’ll stand with me in this fight >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q1?refcode=x_260110_telluride_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

In solidarity,
David Seligman
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q1?refcode=x_260110_telluride_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_dhs_email-26q1?refcode=x_260110_telluride_act] As Executive Director of the nonprofit legal organization Towards Justice, David has taken on corporate giants like Amazon, Uber, and the biggest corporate landlords in the country—helping recover more than $70 million stolen from working people by powerful interests.
Now he’s running for attorney general to defend our freedoms, challenge concentrated power, and build a future where working people can thrive.
He’s already doing the work. Visit SeligmanforAG.com [https://www.seligmanforag.com] to learn more.

subject: Channeling frustration into engagement ⚡ 🗳️

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatWeSaw&amount=15.00&refcode2=c82a08af-41ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatWeSaw&amount=15.00&refcode2=c82a08af-41ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903]
Peter,
We know what we saw on January 6, 2021.
We know what we saw on January 7, 2026.
The federal government’s response to Wednesday’s tragedy in Minneapolis once more shows that this administration will gaslight the entire country [https://www.thebulwark.com/p/a-killing-in-minneapolis-a-gaslighting-from-white-house-renee-nicole-good-ice-dhs-shooting] at every turn, and stop at nothing to whitewash history [https://abcnews.go.com/Politics/trump-white-house-attempts-rewrite-history-jan-6/story?id=128953694] , so long as it appeases Donald Trump and advances his authoritarian agenda.
As difficult as it can be in these times, we as a resistance are by no means powerless. Working together, we can have an immense electoral impact in the midterms, but only if we get the word out and show up.
DONATE to TOP PAC to help scale up our get-out-the-vote work in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatWeSaw&amount=15.00&refcode2=c82a08af-41ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903]

Texans know their worth. We have an enormous opportunity to reject MAGA madness at the ballot box this year. It’s on us to seize that opportunity to get our state and nation back on track!
YOUR SUPPORT is essential to making this a reality.
CONTRIBUTE today to fuel TOP PAC’s voter outreach efforts. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/texas-organizing-project-political-action-committee-3?refcode=WhatWeSaw&amount=15.00&refcode2=c82a08af-41ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903]
Let’s roll up our sleeves and engage more Texans to win the changes our communities deserve.
Yours in the fight,
– Texas Organizing Project PAC

Working together, we can have an immense electoral impact in the midterms, but only if we get the word out and show up. DONATE to TOP PAC to help scale up our get-out-the-vote work in 2026. [] [] Texans know their worth. We have an enormous opportunity to reject MAGA madness at the ballot box this year. It’s on us to seize that opportunity to get our state and nation back on track! YOUR SUPPORT is essential to making this a reality. CONTRIBUTE today to fuel TOP PAC’s voter outreach efforts. [] Let’s roll up our sleeves and engage more Texans to win the changes our communities deserve. Yours in the fight, – Texas Organizing Project PAC [] Texas Organizing Project PAC P.O. Box 120296 San Antonio, TX 78212-9496 United States [] [] [] [] If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe using the link below.

Friend — Republicans are fully showing their hand, as they aim to lock in power, cheating their way toward control of Congress for the next decade. That means Virginia has a clear choice to make: **we either fight back or fall behind.** We are prepared in the upcoming Virginia General Assembly session to fight for fairness in redistricting. The truth is, if Republicans are going to rig the maps, we cannot unilaterally disarm. **_**The stakes are too high to ignore.**_** But here’s the urgency: _once our session starts, I have to stop fundraising._ This is our final window to raise what we need to ensure we keep this district blue and stay in the fight. **[If we don’t raise the resources now, Republicans will steamroll ahead. clean_body: | | | In Florida, Republicans are rushing back into session to gerrymander their maps even further. Friend — Republicans are fully showing their hand, as they aim to lock in power, cheating their way toward control of Congress for the next decade. That means Virginia has a clear choice to make: we either fight back or fall behind. We are prepared in the upcoming Virginia General Assembly session to fight for fairness in redistricting. The truth is, if Republicans are going to rig the maps, we cannot unilaterally disarm. The stakes are too high to ignore. But here’s the urgency: once our session starts, I have to stop fundraising. This is our final window to raise what we need to ensure we keep this district blue and stay in the fight. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. This moment really matters. Let’s meet it — together. Thanks for your support. Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Friends of Elizabeth Guzman PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman. name: Justice Democrats
subject: This Israel lobby group just dropped its first endorsements
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

You know AIPAC, but another Israel lobby group spending in our elections
to buy seats in Congress is the Democratic Majority For Israel (DMFI).

Formed in 2019 in response to Democratic voters’ declining support for the
Israeli government, DMFI opposed Bernie Sanders in the 2020 presidential
primary and ran ads attacking former Squad members Cori Bush and Jamaal
Bowman in 2024 because they supported Palestinian human rights and a
ceasefire in Gaza.

But don’t be mistaken. DMFI is AIPAC with another name – they’ve shared
board members, office space, and are another desperate attempt for AIPAC
to cling to power in the Democratic Party as they lose influence every
day.

Now, they dropped their first endorsements for this year’s midterms,
including Wesley Bell (who unseated Cori) in MO-01, Steve Cohen in TN-09,
and Shri Thanedar in MN-13.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260110.nUF78r&refcode=em20260110-37358&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37358%2E1203867%2EmSgJYs ]Tweet by Democratic Majority for Israel (DMFI) listing their first
round of 2026 House endorsements.

All three of these incumbents are Do-Nothing Democrats who are being
challenged by progressive, working-class candidates we’ve endorsed: Cori
Bush, Justin J. Pearson, and Donavan McKinney.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260110.nUF78r&refcode=em20260110-37358&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37358%2E1203867%2EmSgJYs ]Help us take on both DMFI and AIPAC in this year’s Democratic primaries
and WIN: pitch in $5 to fuel our fight to elect Cori,
Justin, and Donavan now!

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260110.nUF78r&refcode=em20260110-37358&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37358%2E1203867%2EmSgJYs ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260110-37358-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37358_1203867_mSgJYs&akid=37358%2E1203867%2EmSgJYs

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37358%2E1203867%2EmSgJYs

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
A lifelong Philadelphian, public servant, and fighter for justice. Join Sharif as he brings bold, thoughtful leadership to Washington. Peter,

It’s officially an election year, and that means _there’s no time to waste_.

Lots of politicians talk about fighting for their communities, **but I let my actions speak for themselves**. I secured major investments in community-based violence prevention programs, helped implement PA’s Obamacare exchange, and sued Donald Trump when he tried to delegitimize our election. subject: Self-Driving Truck Video Stunned Everyone ∕ Saturday, January 10, 2026
body:

|
---
| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. body:

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123073384/594291687/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260110_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZmOTEzNDktNDNlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=42Pghh4yLm78KxMwzxzJKam-TRK587oWuTlyFrZxdtI=)

Hi there, While Trump and MAGA Republicans attack everything from voting rights to abortion access to basic economic fairness, young Democrats at the University of Arizona are fighting back — and they're not backing down. The University of Arizona College Democrats are building partnerships between students, elected representatives, and local, state, and national Democratic parties to elect Democrats and advance progressive policy.
