name: Sheriff Bianco
subject: Skid Row is a symptom. Leadership failure is the disease.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BIANCO FOR GOVERNOR 2026 FPPC # 1479095
body:
I walked Skid Row. Open sores. Open drug markets. Open chaos. This isn’t homelessness — it’s lawlessness enabled by Sacramento Democrats. We must fix it. I’m asking you to chip in now. [ ](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/6A96yJC_Xzp7Nr3MJp_SaeEsUEOQ1PuYdNaEVJ3akoIa_NdCQJeZODpnYGR4BRn92naKmofQuHzbLeIRTv1uw6eEC8rtHtZe_3g_Nhdwgzuos1zTZL8uOFIZ8NsEg3KwiHYBfMaG-jSaBpUTuw5cZ5wCS0xn4ba5Qa6SVky1y2zi9TvXyI9Sdaoz7PqxlDX1Pph7170Z0jlR-ubPugQ5FbvSfxYefb6l6mL0mJAR2yoK_QAXwdoqtBIYeNH05vzvCrv0aXk_3BCUmbsgXuS_Zk4bj-izGYkbCP3E3hAdJ9qo5ndYldrt4L2Qy_3GNbgS2KZ6M0gCPzGC9F-iZLOByVKIrRBBJJWjxpFKcVfU-N9bOF6-L_fnxEuhTzsmOlGaOCPHRdczbWZCQCFD-s7-w8VCTB-tlb_Mxb319uW5uDkkxKS2no1eBU0MBpde8Sc9n1qX6Du7eYq3JgkOFRK7IWhKmq2ziBtKElWEGWntE4Rjkr4j_yrGoivPpwqLwi1WQ4KcOGkg0ePaZ-A9nklyclocbAASNQXT7gDVqwBQ7gDqLiAole4VK29l4BFSe4P5Es32wncUaRbBBSmNz0vWy5G9CIsG7BTE0TbjQk-F3hhqXx_uAL9Y/7RMtu9Zefd_hJyf5ZFrW9caBEwOg1Rzg/16)
---
Peter,

I saw it with my own eyes.

Skid Row — **50 blocks** of human beings living in filth, addiction, and untreated mental illness while crime and open drug dealing run unchecked.

[](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/iLLQu0DDphyicnTec9jlfcUcsZTMxH7LK_gg_yYBpzhvoJkfCsvdVDgPwoUKIt-StQS5aIjrY1NU-KONleG1P0TKbj1hMAXe7uLgpWn6DzvzCfvSB6TTyuVdRujxLzWkOaorkgVdV66Ak95TaPu6Dp06dOod0oVWG9LLV3x7gxOsO_vg_YWlMlzbdVd3xYNwPgoAJSaU6BCRUEY5pfeJmutfqHOp1BzEa8rxnTBn5mOsS2zhXiiVLQOoJJIrWiEyR2fTK7zwsLJC9slJjk3NUstl6cQg2bDLOgHabN3avzI0UvUghldwvBAB_Tr96suoqfgrKoQIb8cEAaNfbBY79BZj4Qm-Y78XlzgqLAZeb4AIHDPpUkYjO3Y_vnJew-oiBw_U8n93Jf1aO3V89yLeuOHVoCIeDnNzBStKVfqrHfA0gAKyRlYPm_1Al7ROoONQDrsfk_zbN4ZnonamKW3nfh-dF-APCclYC-b5Huj6rHxRmTXqnKleHLsELeMDHbJds12aibjP9dcdIcWA4U6Q_S4T8ssjCwBjgUT6xB55c-WVEUJBfYmR5NTWalYHPWFNj4FFiEfZROSAbB0SEbmVRnYn4WqABfqdYLSsPClXmGWxunDdtKI6/Yc8vLubYVFJEWQ0KFVKyHpohjY_h0F6E/16)

This isn't just homelessness anymore.

This is **anarchy**.

It happened because CA and LA Democrats chose ideology over **results**. They've poured billions into programs that changed nothing — while people suffer on concrete.

[](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/1zsqT78T0Zp6yx5EqwoeOQTjsOk8UNkP3lo5ju01pkP_akblNkW5OndThXbq-4WBWWTB5RItrHHMYIxr8V_LjLMKYmf3pW-aU1J2tLPGyHl_acqsz4v4sFqz3eVT9PPFbomtJYW4rsDJnzyKSzVswwiP55ZAdh6s4iwt5sI0o8dFEN9G_myj1l1YmP6eWGobHpMF4G_gTJz0BGLLrgzOAf_S4wvdQBt0PG28FTGIW1Hc9EOR2gW6tyXe7XlEDl07UiStySF9sP-j5ltJYcgiu3TCCqyAEX-t6vbeGnG7l9upxBaCKPvfb6hLR7IXak9Z7IdIKxMhTC-1n2PAmUoDyG-UBwAzQizVt9TMXNIvMwTs-2JR1v3rq3i2Jidd1LmyqPe5eiKZZHsrmOzIOVffrOZIkVWZWtYwkJaxgcS7JzqXtHlube0Qert_7nCGOg4iby7Z6_DmaAhKVTCqtQ8uAvHCeHmSdC2dbJcgrGlsbDgt7kR8d-ZNIo6939nc2LoxnOxsejIZIud4ITyJYBh4Rp7ivvjJEwrYgmXYg1PjJlPWqJnYOdQMzJJXtQjraCMvlu8Ah_PwgMZVktKj0lw02J5CyyTnu8ZXefo3MBUwNt8oVFO8CvXZ/x9HnJ59uONJqufW-DwX9tCV_pNzNjsgL/16)

People are dying in plain sight.

Families can't walk our streets.

Small business districts are boarded up.

And the folks in charge shrug it off.

**This is intolerable.**

[](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/0fnd9JDykEdoZWhkfcefJADM-R8HugYvKD77GNiIQ2L_YpPhsQu_-A1JxxESYBYCTSSYnhXpnBK_M4bVgjWYF873fKRpV9X3rzGN32QH0teeiKctY3kK5ZmaL1KRCyZMDjPbq8EN3hbEEkHt8s3TCaZk7aeMS5bdpzA8v-APW4_jNJagyRDatD-72jDtKRjUSULT3n7pRXMPIl6yIsiIoX6IR60WJAx1pXhpaF0Kl2tXml-7G849DzlBqx8XMsM750zu0NglYhNaBPrXZZGZA-l2f9_fZ3sd-stEocXokeXb-1cvp9nUxEdlXmbtwwV1qvIaaT-6mAEh1Hn_QLW4axXiXR7gON2snv2UZq4LYrP3I4GS6JMaRhQfd-1Yr85bTtVNWsDzfIDfQEKRqfs1kitNS3NauRZMHeKwUTBxMlIBtmjl_Q7L3jPxZ-Q4foJCE5wN2NKJQwt8iu9Ee7nAxS-1dmCYbk0ecAfsyE5tW1ANzRFgjKHDYwzqLwmTVmSMcYrBlArRqDvqJzu6TcG1EYniYFNjPSNLHKVpFtlmXQXY6uLb-rN0B43o0Im7ICGD7Svjav7ijSjuoxOSqS9Fg-fibhXO7tCty_Cq8W9ZDOeQd5oKaxoy/fGep87CYqusbhX6Qra6aAL1TDAIdgqPk/16)

We need leaders who fight to treat drug addiction and mental illness, not subsidize it; who put violent offenders into jails and mental institutions; and who return our streets and neighborhoods to the taxpayers.

I refuse to look away. But I need your help to build the force that can win this fight.

[Donate now to fuel our campaign for **security, true compassion, and results**](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/E1us6UL8FEZyFCjbDw1rHRaf1SwPkp-v2yKrXhJktWwTDSKBPreO-htrpkkuBdcGrq0L5U6RzG0Ztv_eQGQJJ-0J7YMdawtlcUZN4qeBvTJ0FXGedeYli-74td3-Psg4JN-OGbvwfWeo4NMoPU9h5iBRK4xkldovUPByuhEYlhWze4DNia9kMJRyIpXsvc1hIpF35CAKRBvWb-sT42gVtylad8q0e6OB3aBxD8hO8z80izcyr_nafnJ-0_uuLehlub-6ZrZkW-Acd3S34HL8908JhMgGH653B5jE5SdeyjCFE5ymrWKVu3ZCRhbliG97rT_ZWeW6X_ZZuiW7m77-Vf5PAQk0pyg0l-IrgS0sHC3XM3eoS59nvy682oSyoxtnKk-zN4zHdqUHL1sCd7a5rgYhSxZsKZ53hOD-n-EQ8vnnEHWxS7E41SJLeXaTFImuphIQTR9KOwS80gVTZgnTvfrfzStSnMcKJxgywxEanmwxqf0coYjiHJan4gy7s7D7N_JEcmZFsRukV7nc877U3gYhGelOd4ZM6FsI98yZuAeWNvVaF1m0xwm_yyzA76ycMBdSRbP5Q7XoW91bbqk-NYss19IOHXw618Zukbm3tpZnJruMAA1ZJQWAxnoDhjpJvs7EeOf7vwG8xq8/3fq4B-6ggKt2d_A2JMzmNNklBbQGq10h/16):
[ HELP ME FIX CALIFORNIA ](https://links.biancoforgovernor.com/s/c/xPawqoAyOLBoYK_u9YID3Zyt-zoePv1cB117SbA9zRqvd0KLeM2_Q9VY7vM41uTVOukIG5nG030iCCj0_5Vf8m6nccd9IXX9KyKfvqvKCXJBH3SjZs3zn0GYSf0JF1zJieA6o0ak9oiSPeH-DUgN55meid3SNhPt8vrKsBnmqvhrTgZ3L111QKAMGSL2QUvsvyDSgUV5eCg9S_cWH4-NLzF-Qykpi6HSd0Q25xkyJqkPVanB32TuQTyVQZ4ToaGYl47OgmZlv8tq-riBJIuyXP77nzQDm6Ey-Ra1yRTYKhaI-ia5Md-jSJH6kmkwhknuM8M2AIbJICdl5TueaSaRPaS9sN7MlGYkmSf4w80K3_jkrMcGAVxg-ttX48ug1lgDrRA3dkbUZtWQ3tagvTq8RJ5CczmYrG0dRCCKRlr-NJ6rI2zENI0sMPsO4vJ8Sy2y9MSd4oAxCdnkZyxDOea42r7EDYQZW_YgxbwCoi_8uwe0LYz3Zl0lpfb-whQUv3EBCGjMcj_KQxj7VbExE8DZcsXnOE22Km1IGJwTTodM4nE-yc46VwE4WO9zGOR8xRYvMTBYOZDdlQ7klhjOYSTGts-uyU0oR-mbi21rOhlZ0hRArjW_2aZ_zf83bZ7_cVPsi-FKRY-xPP1THsY/gMhW9W9bWjqllqIVixkAod2dsBQ9D4G-/16)
Thank you for standing with me.

**Sheriff Chad Bianco**

name: TN House Democratic Caucus
subject: Happy 2026 from the Tennessee House Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
body:
Happy New Year! As we kick off 2026, we wanted to take a moment to thank you for standing with us, your Tennessee House Democrats.
| | | | Can't see this email? [View in Your Browser](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KEMCRR0X6BCK67AMJWHYMZBF_0)
---
| | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KEMCRR0X6BCK67AMJWHYMZBF_1)
---
| | | | Dear Peter, Happy New Year! As we kick off 2026, we wanted to take a moment to thank you for standing with us, your Tennessee House Democrats. Your support has meant more than you know.

This year holds real promise. We're heading into this legislative session with clear priorities: reducing the costs of living, protecting and strengthening public education, expanding access to healthcare, defending voting rights, and improving every Tennessean’s quality of life. In November, Tennesseans will head to the polls with the opportunity to reshape the future of our state.

The road ahead is full of challenges, but with your help we will be successful.
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE TODAY ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KEMCRR0X6BCK67AMJWHYMZBF_2)
---
| Here's what you may not know: Once the legislative session begins, we cannot accept contributions until the legislature adjourns for the year. That gives us just a few days to secure the resources we need to be effective advocates for Tennessee families throughout this critical period.

**[If you've been thinking about supporting the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus in 2026, this is the moment. Your contribution before January 13th will directly strengthen our ability to combat Gov. Bill Lee, Speaker Cameron Sexton, and the entire GOP caucus and hold them all accountable.](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KEMCRR0X6BCK67AMJWHYMZBF_3)**
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE TODAY ](https://ctrk.klclick.com/l/01KEMCRR0X6BCK67AMJWHYMZBF_4)
---
| Thank you for being part of our work. We're excited about what's possible this year, and we're grateful to have your support.

Wishing you and yours a healthy and hopeful new year,

**Tennessee House Democratic Caucus**
---
| | | |
---
| _Paid for by the Tennessee House Democratic Caucus, Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer_
---

Hey team, We’re heading into what could be the most momentous election year ever, with challenges on every front — fixing a Republican economy that is hurting working families, fighting Trump’s destructive agenda, and protecting New Mexicans. My work has always been rooted in building a brighter future for New Mexico — including making everyday life more affordable, advancing clean energy, and preserving public lands and waters for future generations. I’ll keep doing that, but as we head into a new year, will you let me know _your_ priorities? What's on your mind and what do you want to see Democrats focus on in 2026? **[Can you spend just a few minutes filling out our Priorities Survey? You’re a valued member of this grassroots team, and I hope you’ll take a minute or two to add your input.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123077636/594293261/1185020955?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20260110_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjE0Y2Q1ZC00NWVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=08nSvN7y2w18LMEATGL-hQS9bs8iIHbuDDKE7foBNto=&emci=9fd948e7-3cee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=c214cd5d-45ee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=252045)** Thanks for your time, Martin

I know leadership means accepting the heaviest burdens, and this choice has been the weightiest of my career.
I've looked at the data, I've listened to the concerns of families in your state, and I've finally reached my conclusion. I am sharing this news only with a select few today.

Forgive my persistence, but I've reached a point where I have to move, and I desperately need to know your thoughts before I do. have spent long hours in prayer and conversation with those I trust most. I know leadership means accepting the heaviest burdens, and this choice has been the weightiest of my career. I've looked at the data, I've listened to the concerns of families in your state, and I've finally reached my conclusion. I am sharing this news only with a select few today. The fate of our movement depends on the leaders we choose to follow and the lines we choose to draw. I have drawn mine. unwavering resolve, Mike Pompeo | | | | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. name: Redistricting Action
subject: What’s happening in Utah
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Extreme anti-democracy forces refuse to give up their crusade to silence the voices of Utah voters.
|
---

Peter,
_First_ : In 2018, Utah voters approved a ballot initiative establishing an independent redistricting commission to draw voting maps.
_Then_ : Utah lawmakers passed a gerrymandered map that violated that citizen-passed initiative. A judge threw out the gerrymandered map and implemented a new, fairer map.
_Now_ : Last month, Utah lawmakers voted to ceremonially object to the new court-ordered map and extend the filing deadline for congressional candidates running in the 2026 midterms — buying time to fight back against this fairer map. This week, the GOP-controlled legislature’s lawyers filed a notice to appeal the case to the Utah Supreme Court. Anti-democracy forces are also collecting signatures to effectively reverse the 2018 initiative, and **repeal** Utah’s ban on partisan gerrymandering.
**Let’s review: The fair maps movement prevailed in court. The fair maps movement won at the ballot box. Utahns made it clear that politicians shouldn’t get to cherry-pick their voters. And yet anti-democracy politicians are still not finished with their campaign to grab power by silencing voters.**
The fair maps movement is challenging this in court to ensure all Utah residents have a voice in the next election and beyond. Meanwhile, Redistricting Action is pushing back on all fronts to make clear the American people won’t abide with these blatant power grabs.
[**Make a donation to help our grassroots movement continue to fight for fairness in Utah, Florida, South Carolina, and wherever politicians try to steal power from the people next.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123080969/594299489/742152064?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_UtahUpdate_email_20260110-AOTL-Tier1-UtahUpdate_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260110-AOTL-Tier1-UtahUpdate_&utm_campaign=UtahUpdate&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjM4ODQ4ZGNlLTQ1ZWUtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=1IBCAPQ6y1S0HsfmBBxuYi2k2yP_rc13A2GVDlw85zE=)

clean_body: Extreme anti-democracy forces refuse to give up their crusade to silence the voices of Utah voters. | Peter, First : In 2018, Utah voters approved a ballot initiative establishing an independent redistricting commission to draw voting maps. Then : Utah lawmakers passed a gerrymandered map that violated that citizen-passed initiative. A judge threw out the gerrymandered map and implemented a new, fairer map. Now : Last month, Utah lawmakers voted to ceremonially object to the new court-ordered map and extend the filing deadline for congressional candidates running in the 2026 midterms — buying time to fight back against this fairer map. This week, the GOP-controlled legislature’s lawyers filed a notice to appeal the case to the Utah Supreme Court. Anti-democracy forces are also collecting signatures to effectively reverse the 2018 initiative, and repeal Utah’s ban on partisan gerrymandering. Let’s review: The fair maps movement prevailed in court. The fair maps movement won at the ballot box. Utahns made it clear that politicians shouldn’t get to cherry-pick their voters. And yet anti-democracy politicians are still not finished with their campaign to grab power by silencing voters. The fair maps movement is challenging this in court to ensure all Utah residents have a voice in the next election and beyond. Meanwhile, Redistricting Action is pushing back on all fronts to make clear the American people won’t abide with these blatant power grabs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks for all that you do, The Redistricting Action Team Text FAIR to 88228 to receive recurring updates from Redistricting Action by automated text message. Friend — Happy New Year! With the new year comes election year, and the stakes couldn’t be higher.

That's why more than ever before, your feedback is absolutely critical in helping shape our campaign strategy.
**_[Please, will you take my new 2026 Supporter Survey and share your thoughts with my team and me? It will only take a few minutes!](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3719?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&code=jtk48-su-nd&t=2&akid=6763%2E400544%2E5H4pPP)_**

As we inch closer to November, my team will continue to ramp up our outreach efforts and work _even harder_ to earn the support of New Mexicans across the state. But as we do this, **national Republicans will spend whatever it takes to win this race — _Fox News even called this a sleeper race that could upend 2026. They know it’s a top pick-up opportunity for the GOP._**
I know I've got what it takes to win this race and lead the way toward real progress as New Mexico's next governor. But, friend, I can only get there if I have people like you in my corner. **That's why I'm personally asking for your input today, so we can kick off 2026 with the strongest grassroots strategy possible.**

**_[Can I count on you to become one of the first supporters in 2026 to share your feedback by taking my 2026 Supporter Survey?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/3719?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&code=jtk48-su-nd&t=4&akid=6763%2E400544%2E5H4pPP)_**

name: Powered by People
subject: Our timeline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240593%2E444211%2EKT_kpJ)
Here’s a fact: we can win across Texas in 2026. And the path to victory is already in front of us ⬇️
**1️⃣ January 31st: We WIN a deep red State Senate seat in North Texas.**
Democrat Taylor Rehmet—a veteran and union leader—nearly won outright in November, earning 48% of the vote against two Republicans. His runoff is at the end of this month. This is a seat Republicans never thought they’d have to defend and we can win it if we show up _now_.
**2️⃣ March 3rd: We choose the team that will carry us into November.**
This is Texas’s primary election, when voters will decide our nominee for U.S. Senate. We’ll choose who takes on Greg Abbott for Governor. And we’ll pick Democratic nominees for state legislative races across Texas. _We’re driving high primary turnout to ensure the strongest Democratic candidates win._
**3️⃣ April and May: We turn the table on local elections.**
These are low-turnout local elections where Republicans often quietly lock in control. Powered by People is changing that—by making sure voters know what’s on the ballot, what’s at stake, and exactly how to cast their vote.
**4️⃣ November 3rd: We send Greg Abbott packing, elect a Democrat to the Senate, win key Congressional races, and flip state legislative seats.**
Powered by People is getting to work right now to make these huge wins possible. **What we’re seeing on the ground in Texas lets us know we can win these races** , but only with supporters like you backing us from now all the way through the election.
Our volunteers are registering voters and staying in touch with them all the way through election day. We don’t show up once in October and ask for your vote. We start a dialogue that empowers Texans to show up time and time again.
[**We’re counting on you to help us scale up our work fast before ballots start being cast. Can you chip in $3 to help us turn out voters and win up and down the ballot this year?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260110.3hr1wf&refcode=ema20260110-240593&t=3&akid=240593%2E444211%2EKT_kpJ)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260110.3hr1wf&refcode=ema20260110-240593&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240593%2E444211%2EKT_kpJ)**
Thank you,
Powered by People
Thanks to this grassroots team, we're running incredible voter registration and organizing programs—reaching Texans where they are and building real power from the ground up.
**But scaling up to meet this moment ahead of Election Day in November will take sustained work, people power, and real resources.**
[**That’s why we’re asking if you’ll become a monthly donor today. Monthly contributions give us the stability to plan ahead, expand our reach, and keep showing up—every week, every month, all the way through November.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57154?c0=pbp-em-20260110.7kBwCa&refcode=ema20260110-240593&t=23&akid=240593%2E444211%2EKT_kpJ)
**[BECOME A MONTHLY DONOR](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/57154?c0=pbp-em-20260110.7kBwCa&refcode=ema20260110-240593&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=240593%2E444211%2EKT_kpJ)**

[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pbp-em-2023-footer?refcode=em20260110-240593-footer&t=25&refcode2=240593_444211_KT_kpJ&akid=240593%2E444211%2EKT_kpJ)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

clean_body: Here’s a fact: we can win across Texas in 2026. And the path to victory is already in front of us ⬇️ 1️⃣ January 31st: We WIN a deep red State Senate seat in North Texas. Democrat Taylor Rehmet—a veteran and union leader—nearly won outright in November, earning 48% of the vote against two Republicans. His runoff is at the end of this month. This is a seat Republicans never thought they’d have to defend and we can win it if we show up now. 2️⃣ March 3rd: We choose the team that will carry us into November. This is Texas’s primary election, when voters will decide our nominee for U.S. Senate. We’ll choose who takes on Greg Abbott for Governor. And we’ll pick Democratic nominees for state legislative races across Texas. We’re driving high primary turnout to ensure the strongest Democratic candidates win. 3️⃣ April and May: We turn the table on local elections. These are low-turnout local elections where Republicans often quietly lock in control. Powered by People is changing that—by making sure voters know what’s on the ballot, what’s at stake, and exactly how to cast their vote. 4️⃣ November 3rd: We send Greg Abbott packing, elect a Democrat to the Senate, win key Congressional races, and flip state legislative seats. Powered by People is getting to work right now to make these huge wins possible. What we’re seeing on the ground in Texas lets us know we can win these races , but only with supporters like you backing us from now all the way through the election. Our volunteers are registering voters and staying in touch with them all the way through election day. We don’t show up once in October and ask for your vote. We start a dialogue that empowers Texans to show up time and time again. Thank you, Powered by People Thanks to this grassroots team, we're running incredible voter registration and organizing programs—reaching Texans where they are and building real power from the ground up. But scaling up to meet this moment ahead of Election Day in November will take sustained work, people power, and real resources.

name: Stop ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Defund ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Renee Nicole Good was just murdered by an ICE agent in Minneapolis. Before
her name was even released, the Trump administration rushed to cover it
up, spreading lies and disinformation that the officer acted in self
defense.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34937?source=email-20260110&t=1011&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Headline: GOP goes all-out to prevent accountability for agent who shot
Renee Nicole Good

Video footage of the killing tells a very different story. And now the FBI
has locked Minnesota officials out of the investigation. This is what zero
accountability looks like. And we cannot sit by and let Trump and his
cronies get away with it.

It’s long past time Congress acts to stop ICE’s reign of terror – and NOW
is the moment to do it.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34937?source=email-20260110&t=1012&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Will you urgently send a message to Congress demanding it stop funding
ICE to terrorize our communities? Congress is watching the protests and
counting the calls. If enough of us speak out, we can force them to end
this nightmare.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34937?source=email-20260110&t=1013&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]ADD YOUR NAME

ICE’s violence is escalating – by design.

In recent days, the Trump administration warned that it was launching its
“largest operation to date”, deploying 2,000 federal agents who started
grabbing people off the streets and outside homes and schools, violently
tackling members of the community.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34937?source=email-20260110&t=1014&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Headline: 2,000 federal agents sent to Minneapolis area to carry out
'largest immigration operation ever,' ICE says

One thing is clear: if we don’t stop this, the violence will only
increase.

The Trump administration is now in overdrive to keep the truth from the
American people. Noem and Trump are flooding the airwaves with lies –
blaming protesters, stoking chaos, spinning falsehoods to excuse their
brutality – all to enable and prolong ICE’s reign of fear.

If Congress doesn’t rein in ICE now, these abuses will only get worse. We
cannot let ICE get away with murdering our neighbors and calling it
“normal.” We cannot allow Trump’s agents to become an unchecked secret
police force inside our own cities.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34937?source=email-20260110&t=1015&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Email your members of Congress now and demand they DEFUND ICE
IMMEDIATELY. Your message will be delivered straight to your
representatives – together let’s make our call so deafening they can't
ignore us.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34937?source=email-20260110&t=1016&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]ADD YOUR NAME

Renee Nicole Good deserved her life, her dignity, and her rights – not
government bullets and a cover-up. If we let this stand, we are complicit.
It stops now.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20260110.kk384A&t=1007&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20260110.OXJ-w7&t=1008&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20260110.N-A2tm&t=1009&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20260110.9-Fd52&t=1010&akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10066%2E5885482%2ECcdq4V

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for
any specific activity.

* * *
The numbers don't lie.
**Last year was one of the three hottest years in recorded history, and for the first time ever, the three-year average broke through the 1.5°C temperature threshold scientists warned us about.**
In 2025 alone, researchers documented deadly heat waves, catastrophic floods, intensifying hurricanes, wildfires, and storms so severe that entire regions were pushed beyond their ability to respond.
**Scientists say we can still reverse this trend, but only if we stop burning fossil fuels _immediately._**
Instead, the Trump Administration is doing everything in its power to make this crisis worse:
⚠️ His EPA abandoned life-saving air pollution rules that would prevent thousands of premature deaths.
⚠️ They launched a plan to revoke the government’s ability to act on climate pollution.
⚠️ They've fired hundreds of scientists who study health risks and test our drinking water.
⚠️ And they are erasing mentions of humans causing climate change from their government websites.
That's on top of Trump's broader assault: waging a war for oil in Venezuela, cutting clean energy investments, opening public lands to drilling, and forcing coal plants to stay open.
At JanePAC, we refuse to accept this future. We’re building power where it counts by electing climate champions from Congress to the state and local level who can stand up to Trump’s fossil fuel agenda and protect their communities.
**But we can’t do it without you.**
**[With so much on the line in the midterms, we need people who understand the stakes — and know we’re running out of time — to stand with us. clean_body: Trump is making it worse. | AP NEWS: "2025 was one of three hottest years on record, scientists say" = | = The numbers don't lie. Last year was one of the three hottest years in recorded history, and for the first time ever, the three-year average broke through the 1.5°C temperature threshold scientists warned us about. In 2025 alone, researchers documented deadly heat waves, catastrophic floods, intensifying hurricanes, wildfires, and storms so severe that entire regions were pushed beyond their ability to respond. Scientists say we can still reverse this trend, but only if we stop burning fossil fuels immediately. Instead, the Trump Administration is doing everything in its power to make this crisis worse: ⚠️ His EPA abandoned life-saving air pollution rules that would prevent thousands of premature deaths. ⚠️ They launched a plan to revoke the government’s ability to act on climate pollution. ⚠️ They've fired hundreds of scientists who study health risks and test our drinking water. ⚠️ And they are erasing mentions of humans causing climate change from their government websites. That's on top of Trump's broader assault: waging a war for oil in Venezuela, cutting clean energy investments, opening public lands to drilling, and forcing coal plants to stay open. At JanePAC, we refuse to accept this future. We’re building power where it counts by electing climate champions from Congress to the state and local level who can stand up to Trump’s fossil fuel agenda and protect their communities. But we can’t do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Onward, Team JanePAC | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: David Hogg
subject: You kept telling me we should do this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Why we think it’s important to build our online presence.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260110-1&t=1&akid=3033%2E587540%2EBoasVV)
Hi Peter,
There are a few questions folks of all ages ask me about often: **“What are we doing to reach younger voters? Are we on TikTok? How are we meeting people where they are?”**
**So I wanted to share a quick update — last month, we posted our very first video on Leaders We Deserve’s TikTok!**
We’re investing in social media because this is where a huge part of the electorate gets their news, learns about candidates, and decides what they support. Additionally, it's a great tool to inspire the next generation to run for office.
We also know that if we want to win, we can’t just show up in election years or rely on old strategies. We have to build culture, cut through the noise, and make sure people actually hear what’s at stake.
That’s why we’re building our online presence. We started with hiring an incredibly talented 25-year-old video editor who understands the platforms, the trends, and how to create content that feels authentic, not too forced or cringe, not like a campaign trying too hard to share their message. This is about communicating with Millennials and Gen-Z audiences, because our candidates are Millennials and Gen-Z. We can get younger people to vote if we give them people to vote for.
Already the results have been pretty exciting: on our first two videos for the Leaders We Deserve TikTok we received over 500,000 views and 120,000 likes total and we even had people who came to our website and signed up to run for office after seeing our TikTok videos.
We’re going to keep doing more of this, spotlighting our candidates, breaking down what’s happening in the country in plain language, and building the kind of digital presence that reaches people who don’t spend their days refreshing political Twitter or watching cable news. The leaders we deserve are out there but many of them need to be inspired to run in the first place and many of the best have never even considered it. With your support we are able to recruit candidates through direct outreach and even our TikTok and then train, advise and fund their campaigns. Thank you for making what we do possible.
**[We’re heading into 2026 with a lot at stake but also a ton of opportunity to make the changes we need. So, if you can, will you pitch in $5 to help us reach more voters and support more young progressive candidates?](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260110_1_tiktok.TB-xlA&refcode=em20260110-3033&amount=5&t=2&akid=3033%2E587540%2EBoasVV)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260110_1_tiktok.TB-xlA&amount=5&refcode=em20260110-3033&t=21&akid=3033%2E587540%2EBoasVV)**
Thank you for your support,
David Hogg
P.S. If you want to check out our content, follow us on TikTok [here](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/3957?t=22&akid=3033%2E587540%2EBoasVV)!
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20260110-1&t=23&refcode2=3033_587540_BoasVV&akid=3033%2E587540%2EBoasVV)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=3033%2E587540%2EBoasVV)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=3033%2E587540%2EBoasVV)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)

Thank you for your support, David Hogg P.S. If you want to check out our content, follow us on TikTok !

name: Sharice Davids
subject: I've been thinking
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
We need to make these final days count

Hey, I’m writing you this email on my phone between campaign meetings, so please excuse any typos. I’ve been thinking a lot about what will happen over the next two days — when Kansas GOP legislators officially kick off their plan to gerrymander me out of office on Monday morning. But most of all, I’ve been thinking about the consequences of this gerrymander. Not for me, personally. But for regular families all across Kansas. If an extreme Republican replaces me next year, what happens to the family in Franklin County who’s struggling to pay their health care premiums every month? What happens to the kids in Kansas City who just want to feel supported at their schools — not ostracized? I’ll be honest: if Kansas Republicans succeed next week, I don’t know exactly what will happen to the state we love. But it won’t be good. That’s why I’m fighting. Until the very last moment. Because the good people of Kansas deserve nothing less. **_[Now, I’m asking you to join me in this fight. If taking back the House and building a better future for our state is important to you, please make a donation of any amount to our team before midnight tonight. name: Team Kelly
subject: 375 Landings
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier 375 times. That's not easy.
#

Mark Kelly has successfully landed on an aircraft carrier 375 times.
That's not easy.
First off, the landing area of an aircraft carrier is only a few hundred feet in length. That’s about 1/40th the length of a runway at a military airbase. But what makes this even more complicated is that your runway is moving through the water.
It moves to the right because of the angled deck, and bobs up and down like a cork, and rocks left and right in the ocean. It’s challenging during the day and often feels impossible at night.
Naval aviators have to do this in all kinds of conditions... rain, snow, fog, and during combat when the ship is often blacked out so it can’t be found by the enemy.
He did that 375 times, and every time any naval aviator does this, he or she is risking their life for their country. And then he launched on a rocket ship and into space four times in a spacecraft that is more complicated and more difficult to operate than any other machine ever built by humans.
So, when Mark says he isn't intimidated by Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth, you can take his word for it.
But that doesn’t mean we can treat any of this lightly. This is the President of the United States and the Secretary of Defense we’re talking about. It’s serious, and they’ve made their next move.
Hegseth has moved to formally censure Mark, and is threatening to demote him and reduce his pension because Mark spoke the truth. And nothing — _nothing_ — is more dangerous to this administration than the truth.
Mark was successful at every one of those landings and space missions because he prepared for them, and because he had a huge team behind him. This moment is no different, so we are humbly asking you for your help.
[**Please, make a donation to Mark so he can defend himself against Hegseth and Trump. It'll add up fast if tons of people do their part and chip in.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-jan26-dod.oeiXQe&refcode=em260110-1-90&t=1&akid=6328%2E6688874%2EKGoMNr)

body:
#
**4**
That’s how many Senate seats Democrats need to FLIP if we want to take back the majority. That means we have to win Texas if we want any shot at taking back power for the people.
**52**
That’s the number of days until the Texas primary when Democrats will choose their nominee. It’ll be here before we know it, and we need to make the case to voters that James is our best fighter with the best chance to take back Texas.
**$5**
That’s the donation we’re asking you to make to our campaign today. James flipped a Trump district in his first election but only because people like you had his back.
Winning that seat is how James has been able to fight Republican extremism and pass monumental legislation to fund our public schools and lower the cost of health care, child care, and housing. And your $5 is how we can take that fight to the U.S. Senate.
It may not seem like the kind of money that can win an election, but every dollar makes a difference. So what do you say?

subject: the Trump Administration is worsening costs of living
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY Magaziner for Congress
body:
Seth is in Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.sethmagaziner.com/p/9_n7o1XMskam_GoKXFDAdg2?unsubscribedata=yNYANe97hu6l5kVGExLZBZJ5iPnP1jMuH8kd1yf%2BXkwoIfQQcqcVte3QPjVxhY4bnpoHm%2BVgI8hyaUnLUCXC0dODg%2FGHTmd4VhC1WBeENa5GqTw2Z1JWmc8yB46U%2FLlp6fxSOT0eLqhq70A37fo9MULyXYuM9UuQu8w%2BDkl%2BCOn21vIvy0LbXj3Bxx%2F7IbEmVRXFrOEg6uBOGxkU5Ae2U4w271yoegoOxsgJ4%2FbZSwMc2XsRMXNUmG9aQP5gIevW6lLsi6M7%2FzUNDmgfUWlPraJBEgBY%2BSm9vBUlyCEm8QnvnPAkKJOtvY2FqonjP9R%2FNkdHXkKFGVSOgsPJtlWOGpFeUghrsXC6RrQTOEeEj5QyX3IWLLblDtU%2FUKxBlJZhSOz4pvJP9aJsOfsr52b2lYlZ5uTFnIQqLV6I7QhCFMpLvZcTkNXrTUrbQw2Pff%2F8)

Peter,

The reality is, costs are too high for families today. We are seeing rising costs everywhere — from rent to utility bills, grocery and gas prices to healthcare bills, and so much more.

The Trump Administration has done nothing but make the problem worse. Donald Trump’s reckless tariffs have threatened the stability of our economy and made costs rise everywhere. His Big Bad Bill that he pushed through last summer ripped healthcare away from hundreds of millions of Americans.

This is not acceptable. I’m committed to bringing about legislation that addresses costs. This is a fight I won’t back down from.

**[But I can’t do it alone. name: Haley Stevens
subject: My New Year’s resolutions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Here's to 2026.

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.1bg9UyzJt7lX0swAZXTmzIFMEPcI5XOE6XiBhPRHru8?) for more
---
# [My New Year's resolutions](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=183923017&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgzOTIzMDE3LCJpYXQiOjE3NjgwNjcxODksImV4cCI6MTc3MDY1OTE4OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.D4DsTPNmOZsTzchTdkW1gpC5ZGfPiy6Ei0EhR9iE-C8)
### Here's to 2026.
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Jan 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack..fwlz9vwC81QzJ4k9Fj4p5dkGIxGisIcyNbGqnfimfc4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/my-new-years-resolutions?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

Hi friends,
I love the first few weeks of January. There's something special about the new planner pages, the chill in the Michigan air, and the sense of possibility that comes with a fresh start.
And this year? This year feels especially big.
2026 isn't just any year; it's an _election_ year. For me, it's _the_ year I'll be giving this campaign everything I've got to win a U.S. Senate seat for the working people of Michigan.
My resolutions are definitely a little different this year. But they still come from the same place they always do: gratitude, grit, and a deep love for the state that raised me.
So here they are - my unofficial 2026 New Year's resolutions:
**🗳 ️ Talk to as many Michiganders as possible.
**At small businesses, town halls, factories, union halls - wherever people are gathering, I want to be there. Listening, learning, and leading.
**📣 Fight like heck to build our grassroots movement.
**This race is going to be close. But I believe in our message, I believe in this team, and I believe that when we stand together, we win. Michigan is one of the most likely seats to flip in the country, but we're going to keep it blue.
**♥ ️ Keep showing up for working families.
**Whether it's taking on Trump's reckless tariffs, defending health care, or fighting for better jobs and better wages - this campaign isn't about me. It's about the people who keep this state running. I've got your back. _Always._
**🌲 Get in some hikes when I can.
**Campaign cardio is real, but I'd love a few peaceful moments in the woods - especially in the UP. Michigan's hiking trails are legendary, and I feel so peaceful out on the trail.
**🧘 ♂️ Do some yoga with Dad.
**He does it almost every day, and I'm determined to join him when I can. Nothing beats a good stretch and a laugh with Dad to start the day.
**⚾ Make it to at least one Tigers game this spring.
**Campaign life is nonstop, and I love it. But I'm putting this one in the calendar and _protecting_ it. Eat 'em up, Tigers!
2026 is going to be a big year. A hard year. An exciting year. The kind of year where everything feels possible, because it _is_.
I know the road ahead won't be easy, but I also know I'm not walking it alone. You're here. And that means everything.
So here's to 2026: to joy, to resilience, to community, and to fighting like hell for the state we love. Let's do this, together.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://substack.com/redirect/1ace26eb-b883-44ee-ad70-a8a8e920bbbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---
| | | [Restack](https://substack..fwlz9vwC81QzJ4k9Fj4p5dkGIxGisIcyNbGqnfimfc4?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---

(C) 2026 Haley for MI
33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..8i1RqKyjGmVM98Fkd142nZ9OavY3X2AzR1OjkeS1T1Y?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/986fd5f7-2f7d-45d8-b4c6-89d5666effb5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..-YONlY8UGZ4fpLk2TYJEPEHVZLpe-SGMnIrkXc2fsYk?)

Friends, Did you see that Trump’s extreme Border Patrol commander attacked me on Twitter? **I mean, this guy is really going to hate it when I become California’s next Governor. Because they know I will go on offense and stand up for our immigrant communities.** [_**Chip in now to help me respond and make their worst nightmare come true!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123085093/594306861/711451313?&refcode=E17065-20260110-BorvinoResponse-SL-Immigration&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwODQ2ZjMyYy00ZWVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Hfl6c_pX1rySatpPpqHwtloyCTC1Eupmwb1BLJ2oEN8=) Because here is what I’m going to do to protect immigrants in California: I’m going to make sure that if the President sends ICE agents to chase immigrants through the fields where they work or take them from their homes, they are required to take off their masks, show their faces, and provide identification. If they commit crimes like murder, false imprisonment, kidnapping, battery, or assault, they’re going to be charged and held accountable under California law. And as Governor, we can even take away their driver’s licenses and make them ineligible to drive in California. **There’s a lot we can do, but most importantly, we have to go on offense. Rural Arizonans deserve access to affordable healthcare in their communities. I’m ready to take on Trump, to be a strong vote and voice against his extreme policies that put Arizonans in harm's way. I will be the healthcare champion rural Arizonans deserve. But I can’t do it without you. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = With you, Marlene | To learn more about Marlene, visit: We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to PAID FOR BY MARLENE FOR CONGRESS Marlene for Congress 7904 E. Chaparral Road, Suite A110-472 Scottsdale, AZ 85250 United States

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Team,
Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.
I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.
My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.
Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.
If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.
**[And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Sarah McBride and me so we can fight back.](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1274?c0=mcb-em-20260110-1.myVuaZ&refcode=em20260110-2671&t=1&akid=2671%2E21716%2E17bENE)**

Don’t give up the ship.
Mark

name: Cori Bush
subject: St. Louis families can’t wait
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act]
Cori here.
The end of 2025 marked a four-year high for unemployment, and St. Louis’ rates are even higher than the national average, according to the Fed of STL and USAFacts. It’s clear the government is turning its back on our communities when so many of us need support.
I know this struggle personally. I’m a former nurse, a pastor, a survivor of gun violence, and a formerly unhoused single mom. I’ve seen firsthand what it’s like for families who work hard and still get left out.
We need more good union jobs for workers of every skill set and background, jobs that pay fairly, provide stability, and give families the security they deserve.
When I return to Congress to represent our district, expanding these opportunities will be a primary focus. I’m running to make sure no one has to fight just to be heard, and that every St. Louis family has the chance to thrive.
Our primary is just eight months away, which may seem a long way off, but I promise you, every day counts. Billionaires and special interests are already trying to drown out our message, pouring money into my opponent’s campaign to silence our people-powered movement.
That’s why your support right now is so important. Every donation helps us knock doors, make calls, and fight for every family in our district—and organizing today, not just six months from now, is how we win.
Chip in $25, or whatever you can, today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?express_lane_other=true&refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act]
Thank you,
— Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260110_unemployment_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.

name: Seth for Massachusetts
subject: We can’t settle.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Not in 2026.

| |
---
Hi team, As we enter 2026, it’s clear that Washington is still operating on old habits. The same leaders, the same excuses, and the same unwillingness to take responsibility when decisions hurt working families. We’ve seen what that looks like — rising healthcare costs, power without accountability, and leaders who stay quiet when it’s easier than speaking up. This campaign exists because 2026 demands a different kind of leadership. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087308/594313533/2090747700?refcode=260110_sfm_newleadership_img1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhjZDJhZi01MGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7257QsNF7lg68r7vBatUj4IgNJmgmK5O2iN1Vel2KZU=) As a Marine, Seth learned that responsibility only matters if it applies to everyone. He challenges the idea that you have to wait your turn, or look the other way, or defer to entrenched political leadership. In Congress, he’s taken on entrenched interests, pushed back against complacency in both parties, and helped build a new generation of leaders who put service ahead of comfort. **A new year should bring more than new rhetoric. It should bring a new generation of leadership** — leaders willing to ask hard questions, tell the truth when it’s uncomfortable, and stand up even when it’s hard. Massachusetts has always helped lead the country forward. This year is no different. **[Building this kind of leadership takes real support. Will you make a contribution today to help keep this campaign strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087309/594313534/2090747700?refcode=260110_sfm_newleadership_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhjZDJhZi01MGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7257QsNF7lg68r7vBatUj4IgNJmgmK5O2iN1Vel2KZU=)** | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087310/594313535/1375639745?amp;refcode=260110_sfm_newleadership&refcode=260110_sfm_newleadership&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMzhjZDJhZi01MGVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7257QsNF7lg68r7vBatUj4IgNJmgmK5O2iN1Vel2KZU=)

— Seth for Massachusetts

Peter,

If someone sneaks into our country – or even becomes a citizen – and then brazenly defrauds the American government and hardworking taxpayers out of hundreds of millions of dollars... they should face the ultimate consequence: **deportation after stripping their citizenship.**

Don't you agree that the individuals in Minnesota who ran massive fake child care and food scams – **pocketing over $250 MILLION meant for hungry kids while buying luxury cars, homes, and properties abroad** – deserve to be held fully accountable?

It's outrageous that politicians turned a blind eye while this fraud exploded under weak oversight. Resignations aren't enough – the perpetrators need to face justice to the fullest extent, including _**revoking their naturalized citizenship and sending them back**_ where they came from.

**[That's why I support bold policies to make this happen, and I want your input right now.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=9b9d2d1179414c05a2ed174ef879529e&_e=eh8dzeBGiRATy_TzIvmO56K33o6-aXjAlmPuj3zy4R5hSdczuEYRH9MH6NUZ53eXhx9MB3Pj9PTvB_p6TWF8QPZ2nfnCiQitSBClNC5le1IDfM5Hdq54-V18RZNxOKedofvcCZBi8Wh84SZywLDkOxicQKP_V_RHNvy0WSrlnJ8eCM6lt4I3JErS7sMqme7Qh1kk-uCkiVUlbGWJ_f03A-RcwjVSc2j1RwmuKgqhYwsrmQosLvi8Ha_gc3o8u4rD_LLClc-yxlg8_kRDnPIuRWa-ayh9amzszRZe_bFWqVHTcf1L_YoI6KkpcTJJnjQY6YoJ2qch22QRa5TIhbwvApGTbQiFH-J_0Oss4if6CMAm6QVPoPYHVYb9XK6ODEYQV0pRJ21uO1seKBdWWb6uf6S24XfiYEoCCJIzvDUduYV33OUiGrsLBgLzL6cBqN_5KDraBlPl2onj9X9lU5syNZn97yk4Wjgrac-ET1upEyuRWLdP-hWzGLqcy_Q18OvN2AinCgyCQO15t_kbpO9H9m92uAVxFdSlAJBjAI56K33v4oCAs4Brocen6GtR0jyb4IGNDL9ub_aXqLJIQGGPREeTicxYDRSDG3Z_ChMBRAnVIorMqxGSlr6EHpXR6O1jaKLKHQLhT0E5IKXsXujA4gI9Pz68VaHl2iWhXvZ9rRLHh_z9DdGMpE_UY8ZpB68lLXixJTGHwlSViwAuoRTi2ry8an3lTqtUXSlMENFutm6vG4aiH2HnU0SczkCGGH8jVwfpelT7_t6eudZkefE0Nw%3D%3D)**

We hope you’ll read until the end, but if you don’t have time, we understand and hope you’ll [_**consider making a contribution to Jeremy’s campaign.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087588/594314411/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDYyYmQwMTAtNTNlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-shOXREQFE5TasGGLlLM4BoAdkmNFh6CKYu1V6Sjgyk=)

---
Peter,

This is the longest email I’ll ever send you, but if you’ll give me a few minutes, I’d like to tell you a bit about who I am, why I’m running, and what drives me to do this work.

I’m a lifelong Oakland County resident. I was raised here, I was educated here, and I was shaped by this community. At Groves High School and later at Michigan State, I learned that public service is about showing up when people need you most. That’s why I joined student humanitarian aid missions where I helped rebuild homes after Hurricane Katrina and supported communities affected by the HIV/AIDS epidemic in South Africa.

After college, I came home and went to work for my hometown mayor, who you might now know as Congresswoman Brenda Lawrence. She showed me that leadership is about lifting people up, not tearing them down.

In 2011, I ran for City Council and became the youngest person ever elected to that office. We helped strengthen our neighborhoods after the Great Recession, brought new jobs to the city, and made government more accessible to the people it serves.

From there, I took that same approach to the State Legislature. I’ve represented hundreds of thousands of residents in Oakland County, and I’ve worked to deliver results that truly matter.

As President Pro Tem of the Michigan Senate, I helped lead the fight to flip the Senate blue for the first time in 40 years. We restored labor rights, passed the first gun safety laws in a generation, and protected reproductive freedom. I also sponsored more bills signed into law than any other legislator that year.

And when the far-right tried to re-ban same-sex marriage in Michigan, I didn’t wait for permission to respond – I showed up to their press conference and took it over. Because I’ve never been afraid to stand up to extremism, no matter where it shows up.

**Now, I’m running for Congress because I know what’s at stake.**

Donald Trump and his allies are openly threatening our democracy. They’re attacking public education, undermining health care, and trying to roll back our fundamental freedoms.

Oakland County needs a representative who doesn’t just talk about doing better, but actually demands results. Someone who will fight to lower costs, protect Social Security and Medicare, and stand up to the chaos and corruption that have poisoned Washington.

That’s the kind of leadership I’ve always tried to bring to public service, and it’s what I’ll bring to Congress, too.

[_**If you’ve made it this far (and thank you if you have), here’s the most important thing I’ll ask: Will you chip in to build the kind of campaign that can deliver bold leadership for Michigan families?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087590/594314413/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDYyYmQwMTAtNTNlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-shOXREQFE5TasGGLlLM4BoAdkmNFh6CKYu1V6Sjgyk=)
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087591/594314414/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDYyYmQwMTAtNTNlZS1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMTFmOTAzIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=-shOXREQFE5TasGGLlLM4BoAdkmNFh6CKYu1V6Sjgyk=)

– Jeremy

name: Email from Donald Trump
subject: This message was delivered from President Trump’s motorcade:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
Would you rather fly to Mar-a-Lago or take a motorcade to Trump Tower??
| | | |
# **_[THIS IS A MESSAGE FROM PRESIDENT TRUMP’S MOTORCADE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
---
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
MAGA Patriots,
You’ve stood with me every step of the way, and I think it could be time to bring a few of you even closer.
I’m thinking of putting together an exclusive day with me in person, and I want YOUR input on how we make it legendary:

| Should I fly you out on Trump Force One and host you at Mar-a-Lago...
**OR**
Roll up in the full Presidential motorcade and bring you straight to the top of Trump Tower?
---

[TRUMP FORCE ONE → MAR-A-LAGO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[PRESIDENTIAL MOTORCADE → TRUMP TOWER](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Tap your choice — I need you to let me know which one is better before 10:30pm tonight!
Thank you for your attention to this matter,
President Trump

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Trump is threatening more military action in Greenland, Mexico, Colombia, Cuba, and Iran
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s clear that he lied when he said he’d put a stop to endless wars.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260110-5800-footer&t=1&akid=5800%2E420207%2EUZK2Ye)
Peter,
Donald Trump’s actions in Venezuela last weekend were illegal and unconstitutional, with no authorization in Congress, and no plan for what comes next. But unfortunately, if he gets his way, Venezuela won’t be the end of it.
**Trump and members of his administration are already threatening other nations with military action, including Greenland, Mexico, Colombia, Cuba, and Iran.**
It’s clear that he lied when he said he’d put a stop to endless wars and focus on making life affordable for people here at home.
The truth is Congress, not the president, has the sole power to authorize war. Right now we need Republicans to step up, do their Constitutional duty, and join Democrats in ensuring that Congress reasserts our authority.
I’m fighting to rein in this abuse of power and make sure Congress does its job before more lives are put at risk and more taxpayer dollars are wasted on endless wars that do nothing to make us safer. But I can’t do it alone.
I don’t take corporate PAC money, and I don’t rely on billionaire donors to fund my work. Everything I do is powered by grassroots supporters like you.
[**So if you’re with me, can you chip in $3 or whatever you can right now to help fuel this fight? Your contributions help me organize, speak out, and keep the pressure on Congress to act before it’s too late.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260110.rbtsOZ&refcode=em20260110-5800&amount=3&t=2&akid=5800%2E420207%2EUZK2Ye)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20260110.rbtsOZ&amount=3&refcode=em20260110-5800&t=21&akid=5800%2E420207%2EUZK2Ye)**
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260110-5800-footer&t=22&refcode2=5800_420207_UZK2Ye&akid=5800%2E420207%2EUZK2Ye)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Jennifer Jenkins
subject: They burned “FU” into my lawn.
body:
They burned "FU" in my lawn, Peter.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-jenkins?refcode=partner_loc_jj_em_realtexaspac [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-jenkins?refcode=partner_loc_jj_em_realtexaspac]
That's what extremists did when I stood up for teachers and kids on the school board.
They protested outside my home. Threatened me. Even cheered when DeSantis made me a target.
But I didn't back down then, and I won't now.
While unelected Republican senator Ashley Moody votes to rip away health care, slash SNAP benefits, and support every extreme bill and budget Trump throws her way, I'm fighting for families like mine.
Like so many, I’ve worked two jobs just to make ends meet. I know personally what struggle looks like.
Moody has millionaire donors. I have you. No matter what scare tactics they throw my way, I’m standing strong and will always fight for the American people.
This isn't going to be your average campaign — we’re at the forefront of a movement backed by real people who are ready for a new generation of leadership. I won't be bought or intimidated. Instead, I'll be relying on folks like you. So, if you're willing to be one of the first donors to my campaign, will you split a donation between myself and Real Texas PAC right now? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2026-jenkins?refcode=partner_loc_jj_em_realtexaspac]

name: Mark Kelly
subject: They can threaten my rank and my pension — but they’re not going to shut me up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scholten for Congress
body:
You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087794/594315103/-1912233044?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2026-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmI4NDc5Zi01M2VlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIefsA9ZACI2_JkqN139bbXPqMaCeS6AastR8Rmp8_k=)
---
Team:

Pete Hegseth decided he's going to censure me, and is threatening to demote me and reduce my pension.

I got shot at in service to this country. I missed holidays and birthdays. I commanded a space shuttle mission and launched to the International Space Station while my wife recovered from a gunshot wound to the head.

My rank and retirement are things that I earned through my service and sacrifice for this country. Generations of servicemembers have done the same. Pete Hegseth wants to send a message to every single one that he will come after them if they say something he doesn’t like.

You swear an oath to the Constitution when you join the military — including the First Amendment right to free speech. We swore to defend the foundational principles of this country. I took that oath seriously 40 years ago, and I still do.

Pete Hegseth can threaten to reduce my rank and my pension. But I am not going to let him intimidate me, or anyone else. He is not going to stop me from defending our democracy from a president who is hellbent on destroying it.

If they think this is going to shut me up, they’ve got another thing coming.

[_**And if you’re still with me, please: Split a donation between Hillary Scholten and me so we can fight back.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123087797/594315109/-1912233044?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2026-01-10_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMmI4NDc5Zi01M2VlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wIefsA9ZACI2_JkqN139bbXPqMaCeS6AastR8Rmp8_k=)

name: Social Security Update (via GOP HQ)
subject: Can we get your John Hancock on this?

Peter,

This past week Scott took the stage with the other candidates running to represent San Francisco in Congress for the very first time.

**He shared his bold vision for the city, and everyone is noticing:**

| Peter,

When Abigail Spanberger won Virginia’s Governor’s race, we didn’t just flip a seat – we sent a message to the entire nation that Democrats can win anywhere when we organize, stay focused, and focus on everyday issues like affordability.

But our work isn’t finished. The next big test comes this year, and control of Congress could hinge on what we do right now.

| | For Immediate Release | For The White House, Attorney General and FBI Director.January 10, 2026 – Grand Rapids, Michigan Why We Must Take Greenland, Like It or Not. Austin Chenge, a decorated U.S. Army veteran and former Republican candidate for Governor of Michigan, today expressed his strong and unequivocal support for President Donald J. Trump's efforts to bring Greenland under United States control. As a veteran who has served this nation and understands the critical importance of strategic positioning in an increasingly volatile world, Chenge emphasized that acquiring Greenland is not about expansion for its own sake—it's a matter of urgent national security and geopolitical necessity. Chenge said " I ran a simulation that clearly shows how vulnerable we are now to surprise attacks, or if we let China or Russia into Greenland, and what happens after we take Greenland. As a US Army Veteran, I know that strength and foresight win wars before they start. He continued "President Trump is right: the United States must secure Greenland to protect our homeland and deter our adversaries". Chenge highlighted his compelling reasons to his support for President Trump on taking Greenland.
* Countering Russia and China: Greenland's strategic location prevents adversaries from dominating Arctic shipping lanes and resources, ensuring American freedom of navigation and early warning capabilities.
* Protecting North American defense: With existing U.S. facilities like Pituffik Space Base, full ownership would enhance missile defense, airspace surveillance, and space operations—safeguarding the continent from polar threats.
* Securing critical resources: Greenland holds vast reserves of rare earth minerals essential for advanced military technology, electric vehicles, and renewable energy—reducing dangerous dependence on foreign suppliers.

For more information, contact:
The Office of Austin Chenge
Website: [www.austinchenge.com](https://austinchenge.com/so/d3Pke_aFP/c?w=Kc6ytNlzLcOcZdg1z2TzV9a3_cwZ9gZp3RW0oVh2SNY.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cDovL3d3dy5hdXN0aW5jaGVuZ2UuY29tIiwiciI6IjUzYzNmMGQxLThkNTAtNDU4Yi1hMmYxLTE1MTIxZDVhNjAzZCIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6Ijg5ZDQwODBhLTEyOGQtNDlmZi1iZTVkLTExM2QyNTk5NmExNiJ9) The Office of Austin Chenge.

| **Here’s some cool news:** Thanks to supporters like you, we hit our End-of-Year goal in December and have already kicked off our organizing efforts for 2026! In fact, some of our first door-to-door walks are happening this weekend — even as we speak! This is a huge accomplishment. In the first month of the year, we already have volunteers having conversations with undecided voters in the critical swing districts that’ll decide control of the U.S. House. **[This was *ONLY* possible because of grassroots support. Thank you so much. But now we need to take these volunteer walks and scale them up across the entire state – hiring more paid organizers, opening regional offices, and much more. Peter, Mariannette Miller-Meeks doesn't want you to read this email. But we want to make sure you saw this.

After spending 2024 and most of 2025 telling people she lived and voted in Iowa's First District, **Mariannette Miller-Meeks quietly changed her address to her ACTUAL home in Ottumwa in IA-03.**

Christina is a proud resident and involved community member of IA-01. She got into this race because she knows the challenges her neighbors are facing, and she wants to bring their voices to the halls of Congress.

Mariannette Miller-Meeks, on the other hand, and the political establishment backing her, are working overtime to convince voters she's "one of us." **That effort includes registering to vote using the home of a state senator and then claiming residency in an apartment owned by a donor who gave her campaign $52,900.**

**[But we see right through her, and we're focused on getting her out of office and cozy back in Ottumwa. Team, There’s good news out of North Carolina. name: Wes Moore
subject: This email is about saying goodbye.
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1185%2E1086043%2Emlzbpe)
This is a longer email about saying goodbye, Peter, but if you don’t have time to read through, I would deeply appreciate **[a contribution to power our campaign.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260110-2.i3BCky&refcode=em-20260110-2&t=2&akid=1185%2E1086043%2Emlzbpe)**
After nearly a century of operation, Valley Forge Military Academy — the place where I went to school and grew from an angry, complicated child to a confident young man — will be closing.
When my mother first sent me to the Forge, she saw military school as a last resort in response to a seemingly endless chain of misbehavior, both at home and at school. At age 11, I’d already felt handcuffs on my wrists. **I was not on a path to success.**
There was no overnight miracle when I started school there, but slowly, things changed. I learned about honor, code, and service. I started to take an interest in campus life, academics, and leadership positions — and I rose up the ranks and became a first captain in command of around 800 cadets.
After graduation, I went on to study at Johns Hopkins and Oxford, deployed to Afghanistan with the 82nd Airborne Division, ran one of the largest poverty-fighting organizations in the country, and now, I serve as the 63rd governor of Maryland _and the first Black governor in the history of my state._
What saddens me most isn’t losing a place I once called home. My memories will forever live on with me.
**It saddens me that other young men like me will have one fewer avenue to challenge themselves and build their own pathway to success.**
Peter, at a time where our young men and boys are falling behind and feeling isolated, we have to offer more paths for connection and engagement.
I know Valley Forge Military Academy did that for me, and I’m determined to find ways to do that for young Marylanders today.
That includes the **Maryland Corps and Service Year Option** — the first statewide program in the country to give high school graduates a year of paid, full-time community service on the path to college or a career.
We have to help young Marylanders find the thing that guides them on a pathway to success and that inspires them to serve. **[If you support that mission, I would appreciate a donation to keep me in the fight as Maryland's governor today.](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260110-2.i3BCky&refcode=em-20260110-2&t=3&akid=1185%2E1086043%2Emlzbpe)**
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-20260110-2.i3BCky&refcode=em-20260110-2&t=4&akid=1185%2E1086043%2Emlzbpe)
_Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement from the Department of Defense._

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20260110-2&t=5&refcode2=1185_1086043_mlzbpe&akid=1185%2E1086043%2Emlzbpe)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=6&akid=1185%2E1086043%2Emlzbpe)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=1185%2E1086043%2Emlzbpe)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

body:
Last month, Kim's Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act passed the House with overwhelming bipartisan support. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123089430/594320397/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTljZGJiYy01YmVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ATjUnNsa3rinJ16CJp8pCeyc7gj1lKoJMhpvr6R9gTM=&emci=112b52a5-7aed-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&emdi=8e9cdbbc-5bee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Last month, Kim's _Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act_ passed the House with overwhelming bipartisan support, cleared the Senate by unanimous consent, and is now heading to the President's desk!

That kind of momentum only happens when people across the aisle agree on the basics: **Our kids' health should always come first.** If you agree and want to see Kim continue to deliver real results for our families in Congress, [**chip in to help defend this seat today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123089431/594320398/1210615431?refcode=em26_260110_milkfr_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em26_260110_milkfr_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=8e9cdbbc-5bee-f011-8194-000d3a11f903&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZTljZGJiYy01YmVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ATjUnNsa3rinJ16CJp8pCeyc7gj1lKoJMhpvr6R9gTM=)

As a pediatrician, Kim has spent her career focused on helping children grow up healthy and strong. She knows that good nutrition isn't a luxury, it's essential.

For many students, school meals provide the nutrients they need to focus in class, stay energized, and thrive. Whole milk plays an important role in healthy childhood development, especially for young kids who need those nutrients during critical growth years. This bill restores access to whole milk in schools so students can get the nutrition they need to succeed.

And let's be clear about something, Peter: This legislation passed because Democrats and Republicans alike recognized what parents and doctors already know: **We should be making it easier— _not harder_ —for kids to get healthy meals at school.** Kim is proud to work with anyone willing to put kids first, and she's going to keep showing up, listening, and delivering results for families.

[**If you believe we need more leaders like Kim in Congress, who put science, health, and kids over politics, chip in $5 today. Help us keep WA-08 blue and continue Kim's work in
