clean_body: Last month, Kim's Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act passed the House with overwhelming bipartisan support. Peter, Last month, Kim's Whole Milk for Healthy Kids Act passed the House with overwhelming bipartisan support, cleared the Senate by unanimous consent, and is now heading to the President's desk! That kind of momentum only happens when people across the aisle agree on the basics: Our kids' health should always come first. If you agree and want to see Kim continue to deliver real results for our families in Congress, = As a pediatrician, Kim has spent her career focused on helping children grow up healthy and strong. She knows that good nutrition isn't a luxury, it's essential. For many students, school meals provide the nutrients they need to focus in class, stay energized, and thrive. Whole milk plays an important role in healthy childhood development, especially for young kids who need those nutrients during critical growth years. This bill restores access to whole milk in schools so students can get the nutrition they need to succeed. And let's be clear about something, Peter: This legislation passed because Democrats and Republicans alike recognized what parents and doctors already know: We should be making it easier— not harder —for kids to get healthy meals at school. Kim is proud to work with anyone willing to put kids first, and she's going to keep showing up, listening, and delivering results for families. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. name: Nellie Pou
subject: My “resolution”
body:
| |
---
Hi friend, As the new year begins, I’ve been thinking about my priorities. I don't really believe in New Year's resolutions. But I’ve always had one goal: Lower the cost of living for working families. That means fighting to stop reckless tariffs that have driven up prices. It means standing up to corporate greed that spikes health care costs. It means supporting affordable housing and fighting for every family to have a quality place to live. And it means actually having a plan to make life more affordable, something House Republicans still refuse to offer. **[This is what I want to accomplish in the year ahead. But with my reelection coming up, I need your help. This is a very competitive district, and winning will require real resources. # [Does the Truth Matter?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=184137955&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MTM3OTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjgwNzQxNDUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDY2NjE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TMteZBS0FqUpDtxBZmnJcWnoPTW1tzriD7CoZgu4B4U)
### Not until we make it
| | [Lucas Kunce](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---
| Jan 10
---
| [](https://substack.com/@lucastyree)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=184137955&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MTM3OTU1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2ODA3NDE0NSwiZXhwIjoxNzcwNjY2MTQ1LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTg2Nzc0MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.DXv-H_-TjW5x64ryDWqCEQeLEmQifXAoWlYRzTiDAxs&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=184137955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MTM3OTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjgwNzQxNDUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDY2NjE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TMteZBS0FqUpDtxBZmnJcWnoPTW1tzriD7CoZgu4B4U&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1867741&post_id=184137955&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MTM3OTU1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjgwNzQxNDUsImV4cCI6MTc3MDY2NjE0NSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE4Njc3NDEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.TMteZBS0FqUpDtxBZmnJcWnoPTW1tzriD7CoZgu4B4U)
---
| | [](https://substack..pZybTYOSl3QYEKaYpd-5JL4xou2TKsLqIEUPH6ChPcA?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/lucaskunce/p/does-the-truth-matter?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

The shooting of Renee Good in Minneapolis this week shocked a lot of people. And for many, a part of that shock was the willingness of politicians and others to instantaneously spin a narrative around the shooting that fit their point of view, and then confidently run with that narrative without really knowing what happened.
If you want to understand what is going on in politics right now, or are frustrated by this "post-truth" era, and maybe even brainstorm ways to overcome it, it is critical to understand what is going on here:
Right now, there is literally no downside to lying in politics, and a ton of upside.
Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9sdWNhc2t1bmNlLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.vL9NmZqEQ-Kdq7CpzbdXpDIl-MlhxqMeTE4jQWzeoM8?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=184137955)
I got the type of inside look into that as a candidate that many of you will never get the chance to have, so I'd like to share that with you now.
For background: at one point near the end of the election, my opponent's team left their billboard-like bus [illegally parked across six spots](https://substack.com/redirect/9d6e2515-09ee-4fc0-af46-4fc63b3999b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in a private lot across from one of the busiest malls in the St. Louis area.
As it accumulated illegal parking stickers and started getting media attention, their campaign responded by [saying that it was all a hoax and that I had sent my team out to put fake Amazon parking violation stickers](https://substack.com/redirect/9d6e2515-09ee-4fc0-af46-4fc63b3999b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on their bus.
This was blatantly untrue, the security folks at the parking lot were [later interviewed](https://substack.com/redirect/9d6e2515-09ee-4fc0-af46-4fc63b3999b2?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and said that they had put their parking-violation stickers on the bus because it was illegally parked. But their campaign had no problem making the allegation because it was what they _wanted_ to be true.
As the morning went on, someone on the bus kept coming out and removing the stickers until a tow truck was called and they finally left.
Now, with that background, it's time for the interesting part.
A short while later, I was interviewed by a local news outlet. The interviewer struck up a conversation beforehand and said something along the lines of "Isn't it wild that Hawley's bus driver accidently parked his bus in that lot and created such a headache for the campaign?"
I replied with a question of my own.
"Maybe. But what makes you so sure parking a billboard across from a busy street and the mall was an accident?"
"Well, that's what their campaign said."
I was astonished.
"Their campaign also claimed that I sent my people out to put parking stickers on his bus, which one interview with building security disproved. So if they're willing to make up a story that's so easily exposed, for such a small and unimportant thing, when they could have just said 'oops,' why would you believe the next thing they say?"
He shrugged. "We just report what they say."
That's where we are at right now.
People lie in political ads despite the fact that they will get fact-checked and proven wrong because _exponentially_ more people will see their ads than will see the fact checks.
I hate to say it, but the truth really just doesn't matter anymore. All that matters is the narrative. And so, in politics, events are no longer sets of facts to be analyzed. Instead, they are opportunities to advance your narrative.
In a world of gerrymandering and polarization, where energizing the base is more important than persuading the few remaining persuadable voters out there to switch sides, this strategy has become critical to victory. And operatives who are good at it are rewarded.
The campaign representative who said I sent my people out to put stickers on my opponent's bus, for example, is now a spokesperson for the White House.
I wish I had an easy button solution. There has to be some sort of carrot for honesty again, though. And a stick for dishonesty.
Perhaps that could come from voters again if we were able to reduce the influence of money in politics. As I learned, a more critical local media could help, but that's been hard to come by now that most local media is owned by large conglomerates. Perhaps some level of media antitrust would be helpful there. Or rules around truth in advertising for political ads. Every ad comes with a fact check from the station played right after it? Same with statements made by campaigns? Would anyone even believe it? Would the media be trustworthy enough to do it given their ownership and incentives? Are there even enough independent thinkers for it to matter? Those are the questions we would need to answer.
In the meantime, I'd like to thank everyone out there for sticking with this substack for a full year now! You've been wonderful, your comments have been insightful and interesting, and I'm looking forward to what the next year will bring.
Lucas

Not until we make it | | | Jan 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | The shooting of Renee Good in Minneapolis this week shocked a lot of people. And for many, a part of that shock was the willingness of politicians and others to instantaneously spin a narrative around the shooting that fit their point of view, and then confidently run with that narrative without really knowing what happened. If you want to understand what is going on in politics right now, or are frustrated by this "post-truth" era, and maybe even brainstorm ways to overcome it, it is critical to understand what is going on here: Right now, there is literally no downside to lying in politics, and a ton of upside. Lucas's Substack is a reader-supported publication. To receive new posts and support my work, consider becoming a free or paid subscriber. I got the type of inside look into that as a candidate that many of you will never get the chance to have, so I'd like to share that with you now. For background: at one point near the end of the election, my opponent's team left their billboard-like bus in a private lot across from one of the busiest malls in the St. Louis area. As it accumulated illegal parking stickers and started getting media attention, their campaign responded by on their bus. This was blatantly untrue, the security folks at the parking lot were and said that they had put their parking-violation stickers on the bus because it was illegally parked. But their campaign had no problem making the allegation because it was what they wanted to be true. As the morning went on, someone on the bus kept coming out and removing the stickers until a tow truck was called and they finally left. Now, with that background, it's time for the interesting part. A short while later, I was interviewed by a local news outlet. The interviewer struck up a conversation beforehand and said something along the lines of "Isn't it wild that Hawley's bus driver accidently parked his bus in that lot and created such a headache for the campaign?" I replied with a question of my own. "Maybe. But what makes you so sure parking a billboard across from a busy street and the mall was an accident?" "Well, that's what their campaign said." I was astonished. "Their campaign also claimed that I sent my people out to put parking stickers on his bus, which one interview with building security disproved. So if they're willing to make up a story that's so easily exposed, for such a small and unimportant thing, when they could have just said 'oops,' why would you believe the next thing they say?" He shrugged. "We just report what they say." That's where we are at right now. People lie in political ads despite the fact that they will get fact-checked and proven wrong because exponentially more people will see their ads than will see the fact checks. I hate to say it, but the truth really just doesn't matter anymore. All that matters is the narrative. And so, in politics, events are no longer sets of facts to be analyzed. Instead, they are opportunities to advance your narrative. In a world of gerrymandering and polarization, where energizing the base is more important than persuading the few remaining persuadable voters out there to switch sides, this strategy has become critical to victory. And operatives who are good at it are rewarded. The campaign representative who said I sent my people out to put stickers on my opponent's bus, for example, is now a spokesperson for the White House. I wish I had an easy button solution. There has to be some sort of carrot for honesty again, though. And a stick for dishonesty. Perhaps that could come from voters again if we were able to reduce the influence of money in politics. As I learned, a more critical local media could help, but that's been hard to come by now that most local media is owned by large conglomerates. Perhaps some level of media antitrust would be helpful there. Or rules around truth in advertising for political ads. Every ad comes with a fact check from the station played right after it? Same with statements made by campaigns? Would anyone even believe it? Would the media be trustworthy enough to do it given their ownership and incentives? Are there even enough independent thinkers for it to matter? Those are the questions we would need to answer. In the meantime, I'd like to thank everyone out there for sticking with this substack for a full year now! | | Friend,
You may have already seen the news yesterday, but we wanted to take a moment to talk a little more about it.

This has been a long time coming....

[Tim Burchett has officially been named Chair of the House DOGE Subcommittee](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/ynbbeXYHVsMTkmM0FJ-h3ZCXsUVt8dcUk581Uc7VAjMDSp3UeqzXTNlaUcDAx5i769106ctV9k93huXI60eY2VF4D93oSna4a3d73l2ywKxQnHjqyLzKuqtAHcHGeAmZ5V8WG6yQbVQC_i4TIx5cbYf0c0vZO4E0u7dar9OeZhDdUExQZpXoZXteisN8vn8BjRIhisYuCTUuuHUXeNwu2VmiI3hwm6ufEVldBVB8MeY8PAFXFnfrTbw7MjdrEMoFlRRmkCe_HTctw52pC_4Htr6iDWpbEwDnL4eVJnf8YRh6Uz2MUUrQNe1bkdzPjGUcLIiyKa8PaQqCfLqyiwq2z2LB2o7r5YGtUcbxvJaqyfl6eXJejez7ELKN6LcQ5HMAotm3KSoi-EwpNE87b8jqfdtlWC-vjgoxu2iXgu7Q1jlsRjXOKA/4ewRgiUSSFnRVhjCi8c5vJwQyJ4RHvKB/16)—and if you’ve followed him for any length of time, you know this is _exactly_ where he belongs.

For years, Tim has been sounding the alarm about a Washington that’s become a mess of waste, excuses, and runaway spending—a sewer system that’s gone unchecked for far too long. Now he’s been handed the gavel, and he didn’t show up chasing headlines or playing politics.

He showed up ready to roll up his sleeves and get to work.

Tim has never been afraid to call out the crap and backroom nonsense. Now, he has the authority to dig deeper, ask tougher questions, and force answers the D.C. machine would rather avoid.

Friend, this is where the buck stops.

**[The reason Tim can take on this fight is because people like you stay engaged and refuse to let Washington operate in the dark. That kind of unwavering support is what gives this work its backbone.](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/s/c/ilYW1gZo3_n3iZ1zP_6vYNdHzzPIlpnZZvg2MQER4UxfJ0U1xQ8_zsTVhTql4goWxbO6qvvvSGHTQhI3kzEPa9O5WEQ5a6vlz5I--9jTql75KWQN-9QnmPftOeSK_dHE7wPa2U_xCEla4uFXlRqywy6Ejrn3PAHCRmFKb6u_QrgLu1twoHhsVHp7A2S7IoVrxV9HSRruxer7Ee8cqmm5M3sv-ZdSZO0Jk3qIb8vb_Umf3HcYZ-o_4vwzvnX3zvR-NYZsTTYaNH8ybDMe4iM2m_HTtIAvS_O2ojda9iXYuI9kZfLDAdUac8QnYojrabTns1j4FndFeh98BLJ4KPZqhsO1FLy54-8g4n85pGjIstWWl7lcbFLgMecEYD7gn4PjwpjcEWPyNuTcBsv2FvObR_DCgiI8HQD5DrmIBZrNJ0cdgJaPhd2_R5cKPryxVv1HLuiCPvF9ukrdHG7siY7l5LepR6SygX-CyeRqMdv84iuEh6TlUoudBkSniFF_bUsFi4VQJGrkM64OnNCkhtETYoWVNUfzqaq1HNuvjKQ1-7h-2t3Z2X4nxLjz0pJKKERlAIWGELJGBsnqUeCz2wrkEwfqb3JODeXsPOG62GHzf0h5kwd9I3bIbm5tWDqOtgl9gnYXXJazuNicZRiWpFvliWj7ZLgZug0J_A/7ZAxzbycYt7dQg2BWBEbnAU67Ig37BOL/16)**

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23810%2E4449941%2Ey0BB2l) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23810%2E4449941%2Ey0BB2l) [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71836?t=3&akid=23810%2E4449941%2Ey0BB2l) Yep, you read that right.

The President of the United States just called for Senator Mark Kelly’s EXECUTION... [**_all because he reminded soldiers they don’t have to follow illegal orders!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71836?t=4&akid=23810%2E4449941%2Ey0BB2l)

[**So we’re racing to get 50,000 signatures for our emergency petition to STAND with Mark Kelly, but we DESPERATELY need more support in your state before our midnight deadline. It’s no secret that Trump has been acting like a dictator since stepping back into office.

[**_But now, he’s literally calling for his political opponents to be ARRESTED and MURDERED!_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71836?t=7&akid=23810%2E4449941%2Ey0BB2l)

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Final Attempt to Reach Peter
body:
Your name is still MISSING from Marsha Blackburn’s final tally.

| | | | **Petition ID: JV839 - Peter**

**Attempt 1: FAILED TO RESPOND**
**Attempt 2: FAILED TO RESPOND**

**Final Attempt: RESPONSE PENDING**

**FINAL CALL: [](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._ZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwMTEwX1BZLVE1LjExMDExN190MTc5MTYyMS0xMDQzJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDExMF9QWS1RNS4xMTAxMTdfdDE3OTE2MjEtMTA0MyJ9/7LmMbNTm4ow3udVTMHf_9g)[Do you support enforcing Voter ID laws in all 50 states?](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn._1ht5PMTStzKPZwPUg)**

**\------**

_Peter, I've emailed you TWICE. And I know my team has sent you at least 3 texts about this!_

At the beginning of the year, I began collecting signatures on my petition to enforce voter ID laws in all 50 states. Conservatives across the country stepped up and signed their names to protect our democracy.

But, if I don't receive another 18 signatures before 11:59 PM, I’m afraid we won't have the grassroots support necessary to protect our democracy and save the integrity of our elections from the Democrats' electioneering schemes once and for all.

**And your name is still MISSING from my final tally.**

Peter, four other Republicans in your zip code have already signed on to secure our elections.

[So, will you please join them and add your name now before time runs out and I pull my final count?](https://trk.emails.marshablackburn.)[HELP SECURE OUR ELECTIONS

---
Fellow Conservative,

If someone sneaks into our country – or even becomes a citizen – and then brazenly defrauds the American government and hardworking taxpayers out of hundreds of millions of dollars... they should face the ultimate consequence: **deportation after stripping their citizenship.**

Don't you agree that the individuals in Minnesota who ran massive fake child care and food scams – **pocketing over $250 MILLION meant for hungry kids while buying luxury cars, homes, and properties abroad** – deserve to be held fully accountable?

It's outrageous that politicians turned a blind eye while this fraud exploded under weak oversight. Resignations aren't enough – the perpetrators need to face justice to the fullest extent, including _**revoking their naturalized citizenship and sending them back**_ where they came from.

**[That's why I support bold policies to make this happen, and I want your input right now.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=50847cbc1658464ea6a1a64f2b4b585b&_e=xtglCfQlzwfmK_ItjYcgxvcZqNl3KcYOZd1SXPA0hBTo9Gd5ckyLVF4Y3JguiFHuWrurjwsqi3UABOSNNsf6t0PRdHxMXhuWYpzGbCQwOhQN0pivdtzzfg7vWi5V7wFoEexWOw5A7RLSDQAHv5lJYf-89L92iBW4JWIU89jxlWISI0hzYwjJGPgsTu1PuCMADAsBBDPG6cXz_qevEfLovAPYow2YfptNfx_sbCm5NthNvYcMtUoBut2OTjqyUV9QEs8I2YQDLDGJPF2GnDuqKD5nGQyQvddwEig8fapQTbU2JdwRvvEbS1EqheaAkHyPbE7d3O4rUjmit5G6maOpHYo6muWiTWFWl0uTzmDqmjh9-k7QchDtYLqdxnOdu3MM11U-yJqrMxpAU4zgN6ZF9EgQlgItGyVThxPw1SlG-ykIU59ida2DCt32mSqlst8oFPcQxLqF07FpLrhVZtwJBEvbVbOsITROUd510_z-dzTkI8T98LOVDXckmwvN71gfJi6J7pSua-_XC2U4IVSAHace76kPOOfHT_x_beFch6SL4kjSLDRGgwKjXgVJr20A2zTDdceVhAZeVNfTy7988w49Dt1FVSDDC3stHqejSZGj3_00ewhFd8zPbrkwJkFAot9fVzBGZSAsiBncTVBAKYo4rABsPN1nDQq1U_fX-laz6NpkR_kjVjqY114UBjdxeYRp95Hg5n0cboT30fIvKIivEOPPWaRiiMUmD7qhR8fp3Ky5HFxqeBZcPsaXrfG4O4-X15ljidC8Efs095r_Rg%3D%3D)**

clean_body: If someone comes to our country and defrauds our government - or our citizens of money, property, or anything in between - then they ought to be deported. | Fellow Conservative, If someone sneaks into our country – or even becomes a citizen – and then brazenly defrauds the American government and hardworking taxpayers out of hundreds of millions of dollars... they should face the ultimate consequence: deportation after stripping their citizenship. Don't you agree that the individuals in Minnesota who ran massive fake child care and food scams – pocketing over $250 MILLION meant for hungry kids while buying luxury cars, homes, and properties abroad – deserve to be held fully accountable? It's outrageous that politicians turned a blind eye while this fraud exploded under weak oversight. Resignations aren't enough – the perpetrators need to face justice to the fullest extent, including revoking their naturalized citizenship and sending them back where they came from. We're fighting for real accountability to protect America's future and your tax dollars. Thank you for standing with me, Tim Sheehy U.S. Senator - Montana | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

Here's the truth, Peter: every single issue you care about — from your family’s health care to your child’s education, from protecting our freedoms to lowering your costs — comes down to one seat. Defending Senator Jon Ossoff helps move the Senate closer to Democratic control so he can continue fighting for Georgia’s priorities. name: President Trump
subject: Congratulations.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Never Surrender, Inc
body:
I have decided to present you with the Trump Patriot Medal!!!
| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
## **CONGRATULATIONS Friend,**

There is no greater honor in the world to me than serving as President of the United States. Every day, I work tirelessly to **[MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
I would not have been able to do any of this without you, and I want to share a very special honor with you!
**This is why I have decided to present you with the****Trump Patriot Medal:**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
This is one of the greatest honors in the Trump World. JD Vance, Marco Rubio, and Karoline Leavitt have this award.
**_[To claim this honor, simply contribute before my midnight deadline.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**

[CLAIM TRUMP PATRIOT MEDAL](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
I cannot thank you enough for your unwavering support. Together, we will continue to usher in a new era of **AMERICAN GREATNESS!**
[MAGA!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Thank you for everything, and congratulations!
President Trump

name: Haley Stevens
subject: null, I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Can I quickly share why this is so important?

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11560?t=2&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C)
---
Null, in a moment, I'm going to ask you to become a 2026 Founding Donor of my grassroots campaign to keep Michigan blue. **But first, let me explain why your support today is so important.**
Growing up, I was just a kid who _loved_ her home state and wanted to help people.

It's why I answered the call to serve as chief of staff of the Obama administration’s auto rescue, which helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs during the Great Recession.

It's why I ran for Congress – to fight for Michigan families in Washington.

And now, it's why I'm running for Senate – because I love my state and the people who live here, so I refuse to sit back as MAGA chaos harms our families and communities. **But null, I simply can't win without the grassroots support of folks like you, so I have to ask:**
**[Will you chip in $5 or more right now to become a 2026 Founding Donor of my campaign to keep Michigan blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11561?t=3&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C)**
| | [Donate Now](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11561?t=4&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C)
---
I need to be upfront with you: Michigan is now ranked one of the most likely Senate seats to flip. That's why MAGA megadonors are already spending big to flip Michigan red in 2026 – and they’re just getting started.
**If I'm going to go up against the deep pockets of the GOP and win, I'm going to need every bit of grassroots support I can get – especially now that we're officially in the election year. Every day from here on out is crucial, which means we can't miss a single goal.**
**[So, before midnight, will you chip in $5 to become one of the final 2026 Founding Donors we need to reach our goal, kickstart the election year, and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11561?t=5&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C)**
Thank you,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11562?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/11560?t=7&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=8&akid=1883%2E49239%2EPtxD4C)

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Team Taylor
subject: Our election is less than three months away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Reaching Wisconsin voters early — before the attacks define this race — is how we win.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260110-1002&t=1&akid=1006%2E294397%2El7ibgK)
Our election is less than three months away.
It’s officially crunch time, and with our extreme opponent already launching ads and pulling in people like former Gov. Scott Walker to boost her campaign, we have to start moving quickly.
**Reaching Wisconsin voters early — before the attacks define this race — is how we win.**
But doing that takes ample resources, which is why we’re reaching out.
We noticed you haven’t donated yet, and that’s okay.
**But this is a moment where even a small contribution makes a real difference as we gear up for the most important stretch of this race.** [**Can you pitch in any amount today to support Judge Chris Taylor?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260110_1_ak.yQXGoN&amount=10&refcode=em20260110-1002&t=5&akid=1006%2E294397%2El7ibgK)

body:
There comes a point in every man’s life...
| Dear Fellow Patriot,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**
---
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=2268de40b0514ef0aba4dfe033847e05&_e=1j9wrjATG_3ctJ7BeusRrUGjj4zbTHV7LjshDx5GCTGNAvFyDgONgV-rnTjiQtxnNBYb3ycRcSK_jMnzgOtux5elUfy_dM5k7MwskVCsjGIV0C6U_KZxY6jh_yOrXNU_mSPB8YMnFQoydQgrHA7sGzSA5n5ySQ0LJ2g3YqM4mphkzXnxG8M1TZ1-NohCTeQg_4xySb56t2qqfGUT-Cfk1QwdgzwQoVCw_cy2kFhqcDPKPldzoxPu1YB8_OP-Ln-t5TNyELa0BZBI-8R54kED3aYKLMa-J2sn3eOhQz3_pztoGiFcRHsFpBEwBeyb_yzfgzjEOjLSjmGCU3xq6rbJzTgsrKo8KV7nS46YrltdVjunfbflrnfuY38ZEXegqUrWOVmypvVy3WQLZG2MIYRqRQ7SShtOZKCjxKgP2Z9hOwpgTRaxh_5LDj43OkrvuwVefGi1Jh3SqNWSzoAMl7hJfUuXJVQIASyV1gkgYrWVyV8KsKmqtdaubIjduMj-UAMKv1TlZ-VFHzOtQfCPJpnFl_xPMNqAzMklxTWtDF2WrEXMi9167WrkloFS3Szael9_gf3HMj8O7_0bCIf-BlUccw%3D%3D)
__
---
**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**
---
_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._
---
**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE.**
---
_Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._
---
But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.
---
_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._
---
With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!
---
_But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day._
---

clean_body: There comes a point in every man’s life... | Dear Fellow Patriot, There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you. No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE. Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day. Thank you and God Bless you! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

name: Aaron Regunberg from All right, then, I'll go to hell
subject: It is happening here. So what are you going to do about it?

# [It is happening here. So what are you going to do about it?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=4981170&post_id=184130218&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg0MTMwMjE4LCJpYXQiOjE3NjgwNzg0ODIsImV4cCI6MTc3MDY3MDQ4MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTQ5ODExNzAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.uTlIoVcuCcp1ycOtzFzojPi6R3rcIsY0OC1FXKUtHIw)
### A quick survey of the developments leading to major fascist takeovers illustrates the degree to which all the pieces are currently on the board.
| | [Aaron Regunberg](https://substack.com/@aaronregunberg)
---
| Jan 10

I've had four thoughts that I haven't been able to get out of my head this week.
First, it's clear that if there hadn't been video of the execution of Renee Nicole Good, ICE would have just murdered her, lied, and moved on. This is, in fact, what is almost certainly _[happening all around our country](https://substack.com/redirect/69b4e19f-319f-43ca-bd07-6c1c706d87e4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_. We are outraged about this particular instance of wanton violence because we saw it. We should keep in mind what this implies about everything we're not seeing.
Second, if a masked thug can do this to Good--can shoot her three times in the face, and call her a "fucking bitch" as she bleeds out, and then be named a hero by Trump and his entire administration--if ICE can do that to a friendly mother in a car filled with her kids' stuffies who told those thugs explicitly, "I'm not mad at you," then there is _nobody_ they can't do this to. **Every one of us is vulnerable to being murdered in cold blood, and then having the president of the United States say we were domestic terrorists who deserved to die**.
Third, we need to be clear--and _loud_ --right now with Democratic leaders that "we shouldn't have a Gestapo in this country" isn't a radical position. **It is actually the only** _**non-radical**_**position one can have**. Dismantling this unaccountable, overtly fascist domestic militia is nonnegotiable, and we need to insist on this commitment in all of our communications with every Democratic official who wants to keep their seat.
Fourth, particularly after this week, it is essentially impossible to deny that we have crossed the Rubicon--that "it" is, in fact, happening here. A quick survey of the developments leading to every major fascist takeover of a state in the 20th century illustrates the degree to which all the pieces are currently on the board:
* Legal mechanism to label your political opposition domestic terrorists? That's quite literally what Trump's [NSPM-7 directive](https://substack.com/redirect/b3582631-18c3-4709-b765-5a415a9f9baa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) does. **Check**.
* Internal deployment of a quasi-official armed militia with personal loyalty to the fascist leader rather than civic loyalty to the state? That's a perfect description of ICE's [massive expansion](https://substack.com/redirect/a4735acc-8b48-4db6-ba3e-74d442dfd02f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and deployment to American cities. **Check**.
* Justification for the use of lethal force against ideological opponents? That's exactly what we saw with the administration's [disgusting lies](https://substack.com/redirect/a1a71c0c-d981-4824-8170-149aaf926c60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about Good's murder (among many other examples). **Check**.
* Rapid dissolution of domestic political constraints? We've got Congress essentially disappearing and giving up its [power of the purse](https://substack.com/redirect/7974774b-cd2b-4241-bbfa-1dac650ab536?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), while the Supreme Court is already fully in Trump's pocket. **Check**.
* Expansion of youth indoctrination programs? We've got the Hitler Youth--er, I mean, Turning Point USA--expanding into high schools, [sometimes with backing from the state](https://substack.com/redirect/00155266-8ef9-4f9f-b1d5-7a2e49b148b1?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **Check**.
* Shift from public control of expenditures to private? This week Trump announced his administration will place the [oil money it is looting from Venezuela](https://substack.com/redirect/7ee5db7a-63c7-466f-9797-73db4ce20976?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) into external bank accounts outside of the U.S. Treasury--literally a system for collecting personal imperial tribute that Trump can dispense extraconstitutionally. **Check**.
* Withdrawal from international treaties? There's too many to count, including [66 additional ones](https://substack.com/redirect/655006e0-d351-43bb-a3a1-68b67e2354b5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week. **Check**.
* Massive military expansion? Trump just unilaterally [announced](https://substack.com/redirect/0a96341a-f423-4e66-a060-7a3c1767bc19?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) he wants a $1.5 trillion military budget. **Check**.
* Annexation threats? Trump's actions in Venezuela and his likely future takeover of Greenland are arguably even less justified than Hitler's [annexation of the Sudetenland](https://substack.com/redirect/00d288c9-de6d-41a3-9c80-ca4165b8f5b3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and the [Anschluss](https://substack.com/redirect/998affc2-3c19-4eb6-ac6a-cf6a6e848d79?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **Check**.

I know I'm not saying anything new here. But it's worthwhile, sometimes, to step back and get a bird's eye look at the landscape. When you do so, it becomes undeniable: **It is happening here**.
Now, that doesn't mean we can't change course. We're not locked into a fascist future yet. But it does mean we need to act accordingly.
I recently [took my two sons](https://substack.com/redirect/bc236fbf-a900-4871-ad2a-0f8be729e076?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to visit the FDR Presidential Library in Hyde Park, New York (because I'm that kind of nerd). And I was just so struck by the good fortune we had at that historic juncture--in 1932, when fascism was rising abroad _and_ in the U.S. due to the Great Depression and the mass disillusionment it created in our broken institutions. At that moment, things easily could have gone another way. But we had leadership that was able to create a new political framework, the New Deal, that could channel that frustration for good instead of evil.
This last decade we've faced similar challenges. But we haven't had the same good fortune of having the right leaders who were willing to meet the moment. I say this because I think it underlines the **importance of all of us in this moment**.
History often comes down to really little details. Not always--there are long periods of history when society is running smoothly and it's really hard to change the course of events. But there are also certain moments when truly everything is up for grabs.
We are living in one of those moments And what that means is that every one of us should take ourselves seriously--**that** _**you**_**should take yourself seriously**. You should have the hubris to think that a campaign you help run, an organizing effort that you play a role in, could be determinative of our path forward. Because at a historical juncture like this, when the contingencies before us are so vast, and everything is so balanced on a knife's edge, that really could be the case.
We've had mass institutional failures in the Democratic Party--a slow-motion trainwreck where again and again no one in power was doing the obvious thing that needed to get done. And so it should be clear by now that nobody is waiting in the wings to save us. **It is up to everyday people like us to pick up the pieces and right the ship**. What we are able to achieve is the full extent of what's going to get achieved. That's a lot of responsibility. Let's shoulder it with as much courage as we can muster.
Thanks for reading! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support the work.

clean_body: A quick survey of the developments leading to major fascist takeovers illustrates the degree to which all the pieces are currently on the board. | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more A quick survey of the developments leading to major fascist takeovers illustrates the degree to which all the pieces are currently on the board. | | | Jan 10 | | | | | | | | | | | | I've had four thoughts that I haven't been able to get out of my head this week. First, it's clear that if there hadn't been video of the execution of Renee Nicole Good, ICE would have just murdered her, lied, and moved on. This is, in fact, what is almost certainly . We are outraged about this particular instance of wanton violence because we saw it. We should keep in mind what this implies about everything we're not seeing. Second, if a masked thug can do this to Good--can shoot her three times in the face, and call her a "fucking bitch" as she bleeds out, and then be named a hero by Trump and his entire administration--if ICE can do that to a friendly mother in a car filled with her kids' stuffies who told those thugs explicitly, "I'm not mad at you," then there is nobody they can't do this to. Every one of us is vulnerable to being murdered in cold blood, and then having the president of the United States say we were domestic terrorists who deserved to die. Third, we need to be clear--and loud --right now with Democratic leaders that "we shouldn't have a Gestapo in this country" isn't a radical position. It is actually the only non-radicalposition one can have. Dismantling this unaccountable, overtly fascist domestic militia is nonnegotiable, and we need to insist on this commitment in all of our communications with every Democratic official who wants to keep their seat. Fourth, particularly after this week, it is essentially impossible to deny that we have crossed the Rubicon--that "it" is, in fact, happening here. A quick survey of the developments leading to every major fascist takeover of a state in the 20th century illustrates the degree to which all the pieces are currently on the board: Legal mechanism to label your political opposition domestic terrorists? That's quite literally what Trump's does. Check. Internal deployment of a quasi-official armed militia with personal loyalty to the fascist leader rather than civic loyalty to the state? That's a perfect description of ICE's and deployment to American cities. Check. Justification for the use of lethal force against ideological opponents? That's exactly what we saw with the administration's about Good's murder (among many other examples). Check. Rapid dissolution of domestic political constraints? We've got Congress essentially disappearing and giving up its , while the Supreme Court is already fully in Trump's pocket. Check. Expansion of youth indoctrination programs? We've got the Hitler Youth--er, I mean, Turning Point USA--expanding into high schools, . Check. Shift from public control of expenditures to private? This week Trump announced his administration will place the into external bank accounts outside of the U.S. Treasury--literally a system for collecting personal imperial tribute that Trump can dispense extraconstitutionally. Check. Withdrawal from international treaties? There's too many to count, including this week. Check. Massive military expansion? Trump just unilaterally he wants a $1.5 trillion military budget. Check. Annexation threats? Trump's actions in Venezuela and his likely future takeover of Greenland are arguably even less justified than Hitler's and the . Check. I know I'm not saying anything new here. But it's worthwhile, sometimes, to step back and get a bird's eye look at the landscape. When you do so, it becomes undeniable: It is happening here. Now, that doesn't mean we can't change course. We're not locked into a fascist future yet. But it does mean we need to act accordingly. I recently to visit the FDR Presidential Library in Hyde Park, New York (because I'm that kind of nerd). And I was just so struck by the good fortune we had at that historic juncture--in 1932, when fascism was rising abroad and in the U.S. due to the Great Depression and the mass disillusionment it created in our broken institutions. At that moment, things easily could have gone another way. But we had leadership that was able to create a new political framework, the New Deal, that could channel that frustration for good instead of evil. This last decade we've faced similar challenges. But we haven't had the same good fortune of having the right leaders who were willing to meet the moment. I say this because I think it underlines the importance of all of us in this moment. History often comes down to really little details. Not always--there are long periods of history when society is running smoothly and it's really hard to change the course of events. But there are also certain moments when truly everything is up for grabs. We are living in one of those moments And what that means is that every one of us should take ourselves seriously--that youshould take yourself seriously. You should have the hubris to think that a campaign you help run, an organizing effort that you play a role in, could be determinative of our path forward. Because at a historical juncture like this, when the contingencies before us are so vast, and everything is so balanced on a knife's edge, that really could be the case. We've had mass institutional failures in the Democratic Party--a slow-motion trainwreck where again and again no one in power was doing the obvious thing that needed to get done. And so it should be clear by now that nobody is waiting in the wings to save us. It is up to everyday people like us to pick up the pieces and right the ship**. What we are able to achieve is the full extent of what's going to get achieved. That's a lot of responsibility. Let's shoulder it with as much courage as we can muster. Thanks for reading! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support the work. ? | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Aaron Regunberg ? ?

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: I won’t stop fighting for your healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
Republicans created this nightmare. We have to fix it.
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?t=1&akid=3566%2E898137%2EfRM66c)
Friend,
I’m pissed off. An estimated 484,000 Michiganders are now directly feeling the pain of Trump and the GOP’s callous disregard for working people.
Now that we're in 2026, the tax credits for people with Affordable Care Act plans have officially expired, and monthly premiums have increased as much as **ten times** in some cases. There’s no way people can adjust their monthly budgets for that.
On top of that, Trump’s Big Ugly Bill will kick another 260,000 Michiganders out of Medicaid.
What that means is potentially hundreds of thousands of people won’t be able to afford health insurance. They won’t go to doctor’s appointments. They won’t get treatment for simple illnesses, and they won’t be able to afford prescriptions. Their only choice for treatment will be the emergency room, and if they can’t afford to pay that bill, the whole system will have to compensate for that care.
What that means is that _everybody_ will end up paying for it through higher premiums. So even if you’re not in an ACA plan or on Medicaid, you’re going to be paying more because Trump and the GOP don’t care about your health. **And I bet you’re pissed off too.**
This system is broken, no doubt about it, and the GOP has made it so much worse. They don’t want to fix it, they want to destroy it, regardless of the consequences.
**That’s why I’m running for the Senate. I’m running to stop them from tearing this system down, and to build a healthcare system that works for everyone.**
**[We know everyone’s budgets are tight, so we’re just asking for $1 from you to help win this campaign. I promise it all adds up.](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/295?c0=mam-em-jan2026.IJK-xZ&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260110_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=3566%2E898137%2EfRM66c)**

clean_body: Republicans created this nightmare. We have to fix it. Friend, I’m pissed off. An estimated 484,000 Michiganders are now directly feeling the pain of Trump and the GOP’s callous disregard for working people. Now that we're in 2026, the tax credits for people with Affordable Care Act plans have officially expired, and monthly premiums have increased as much as ten times in some cases. There’s no way people can adjust their monthly budgets for that. On top of that, Trump’s Big Ugly Bill will kick another 260,000 Michiganders out of Medicaid. What that means is potentially hundreds of thousands of people won’t be able to afford health insurance. They won’t go to doctor’s appointments. They won’t get treatment for simple illnesses, and they won’t be able to afford prescriptions. Their only choice for treatment will be the emergency room, and if they can’t afford to pay that bill, the whole system will have to compensate for that care. What that means is that everybody will end up paying for it through higher premiums. So even if you’re not in an ACA plan or on Medicaid, you’re going to be paying more because Trump and the GOP don’t care about your health. And I bet you’re pissed off too. This system is broken, no doubt about it, and the GOP has made it so much worse. They don’t want to fix it, they want to destroy it, regardless of the consequences. That’s why I’m running for the Senate. I’m running to stop them from tearing this system down, and to build a healthcare system that works for everyone. | | Thanks for standing with me. — Mallory

clean_body: There comes a point in every man’s life... | Dear Fellow Patriot, There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you. No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: “Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.” I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump. Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my own. That’s why I officially filed a NEW Defense Trust in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me more power to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE. Fellow Patriot, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit. But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get. I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America. With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and WON! But, if you can’t give right now, then please just carry on with your day. Thank you and God Bless you! Rudy Giuliani Rudy Defense Trust Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: 3 important things you need to know today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Here’s what’s at stake, and how you can help us win the fights that matter most. |
#
---
Folks, I wanted to reach out with three important things you need to know today — and why this moment matters so much for our future. **First: The chaos coming out of Washington Republicans is hurting working families.** They let Affordable Care Act tax credits expire, driving up health care costs. Their reckless tariff policies are squeezing farmers and small businesses. And instead of lowering costs or strengthening our economy, they’re doubling down on policies that leave everyday Americans paying the price. **Second: We have a real shot at flipping both the House and the Senate this year. **With competitive races across the map, strong Democratic candidates stepping up, and voters ready for change, the path to winning majorities is clearer than it’s been in years — if we do the work to seize it. **Third: The road to a House and Senate majority runs straight through Michigan. **All eyes will be on our state this year, and Fight Like Hell PAC is working around the clock to make sure we win the races that will decide control of Congress. None of this will be easy. But we’re hitting the ground running — recruiting strong candidates, holding trainings across the country, and diving head-first into the toughest races to make sure we win. **[This work is fueled by people like you stepping up. First: The chaos coming out of Washington Republicans is hurting working families. They let Affordable Care Act tax credits expire, driving up health care costs. Their reckless tariff policies are squeezing farmers and small businesses. And instead of lowering costs or strengthening our economy, they’re doubling down on policies that leave everyday Americans paying the price. Second: We have a real shot at flipping both the House and the Senate this year. With competitive races across the map, strong Democratic candidates stepping up, and voters ready for change, the path to winning majorities is clearer than it’s been in years — if we do the work to seize it. Third: The road to a House and Senate majority runs straight through Michigan. All eyes will be on our state this year, and Fight Like Hell PAC is working around the clock to make sure we win the races that will decide control of Congress. None of this will be easy. But we’re hitting the ground running — recruiting strong candidates, holding trainings across the country, and diving head-first into the toughest races to make sure we win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Your support means we can protect working families, stand up to Republican chaos, and build the majorities this moment demands. Thank you for being in this fight. — Gretchen Whitmer Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. FightLikeHellPAC.org. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee

Their majority runs through Michigan, and they are pouring resources into making that happen. Winning this race is how we stop socialism from advancing and how we keep an America first majority that will defend America’s borders, economy, families, and freedoms. If you believe in stopping the radical Left and keeping a strong majority in the Senate, now is the time to act. Thank you for being in this fight. Sincerely, John Thune | | Text JOIN to 22033 | |

name: Ernest Lineberger
subject: Mid-January Update from Ernest Lineberger, January 10, 2026 ​
body:
Hi Friends of Lineberger for US Congress!
Welcome to 2026. This is a year of hope and action as we turn the hard work we have been putting in since our disappointing 2024 elections into a promise of a better outcome. The current administration continues to give us great reasons to stand up against those actions and do the right thing for our people, our communities, our nation and the world. I typically write about these voter motivational events in detail in other emails. Here are a few bullet points (no pun intended):
- ICE continues to disrupt communities, change lives forever and hurt the economy. The impact is cruel and immeasurable.
- Trump continues to steal authority under false emergencies and Congress refuses to intervene effectively.
o Tariffs remove all economic stability required for strong business investment and expansion, and tax us all.
o War crimes and/or lawlessness persists in deadly action against alleged drug boats and a huge raid on Venezuela that took another 80 lives.
- Alliances are stressed and confused with strong talk about taking over Greenland when it is already available for our full use.
- More and more family farms are going under and becoming part of huge farm monopolies under Trump’s economy.
- ACA subsidies have expired forcing many to lose health insurance, while tax breaks for billionaires continue.
- Trump’s rhetoric reflects more Russian talking points and fascist ideology than modern worldwide cooperation and peace. “Only his own morality will limit his actions”.
- Virtually nothing has been done in the last year to improve housing costs, healthcare costs, grocery costs, insurance costs.
- War continues in Ukraine with Trump mostly siding with the terms of the aggressor nation, Russia.
- Israel continues to find reasons to brutally attack its neighbors.
- Mr. Trump backs protesters in Iran, while having only harsh words for American protesters.
- January 30 budget deadline is rapidly approaching with little progress on major budget agreements... another potential shutdown?
- The December 19th deadline to release all of the Epstein files is well past with very little progress. The Trump administration continues to distract the public while they flaunt complying with this law.
- And when people visiting D.C. talked to our Congressman, Brandon Gill, he asked where they were from. When they said, “Denton, TX”, my understanding is that he said, “Where’s that?”, seeming not to even realize that Denton, TX is virtually at the center of his congressional district, even if mostly in CD13. Not what I’d expect from a real Representative.
- The US Debt has topped $38,000,000,000 in October 2025. It was $37T just 60 days earlier in August 2025. It continues to grow at an alarming rate. The administration’s only plan is to default or print so much money that your savings will be worth much less. There will be consequences for you and your family.
I’ve left out a lot. There are so many reasons to fight hard to win this election and truly work for a more perfect union that is so much better than the chaos, corruption and cruelty that we are getting from this one. I’m here to be your champion. To work with all North Texans and Americans to return us to a nation of democracy, civil rights with real hopes for a better future. We can do this together, but not alone.
I’m fully in as your Democratic Candidate for U.S. House (Texas CD26) with my time, talents, energy and personal financial support. **I need your help** with donations to help fund continued voter outreach efforts to increase our name recognition and win more voters. I need your help sharing our story with friends, neighbors and social media contacts. **I need your vote** in the coming primary election (February 17-27, and March 3rd), and another 250,000 votes in the November general election. This won’t be easy, but it is critical to the future we pass down.
Please donate and join our Volunteer Campaign Force using our campaign website: [LinebergerforUScongress.com](https://www.linebergerforuscongress.com/).
While you are there you can also _visit our events_ page and see what major activities we have coming soon. You can explore the blog and other pages to learn more about me and our campaign. You can also preview my book to learn more detail about my history and philosophy at <https://www.amazon.com/There-Was-Memories-Ernest-Lineberger-ebook/dp/B0FP141L57>
**What have we been up to for the last month or so?**
On December 10th, I hosted a Congressional Town Hall at NCTC Gainesville with the support of Cooke County Democrats. We had a good turn out and event, but also made a lot of headway into the local community with the advertising for the event. We had press releases and op ed’s in various local papers. I attended and spoke at multiple City Council meetings. I attended the Gainesville Christmas parade and shared literature and information about our coming town hall. That is where I learned that the local Chamber of Commerce had put an article about our event in their newsletter. This is the name of the game, getting our name and our message out to the people.
I’ve been attending numerous events with various Democratic clubs, campaign launches, and completed all of the wickets to be on the coming ballot.
I’ve been responding to questionnaires to provide my information for Ballotpedia, League of Women Voters ‘Vote411’, and various endorsement questionnaires.
I continue to visit churches for Adult Sunday School and worship services to get to meet more of the community.
And we have kicked off our block walking campaign. These personal conversations, whether with me or a volunteer, make a big difference in getting people to come out and vote. And even though we aren’t aiming for Republican houses, when we meet a Republican out doing yard work or walking the dog, you can tell they are much more open to a better alternative.
I was invited to participate in a Zoom event that was broadcast on YouTube with myself and several other candidates with military backgrounds to discuss events related to our nation’s raid on Venezuela. Here is a link to the event on Spotify: Mission: Texas, Ep. 14: Texas Democratic Veterans on Venezuela. The link looks long and scary, but it gets me there in just a click. [https://open.spotify.com/episode/1g2EyNLErQa61EkzMgJVwF?si=sr1nFQhSQxuQfoguqaSrZg&nd=1&utm_medium=organic&product=open&%24full_url=https%3A%2F%2Fopen.spotify.com%2Fepisode%2F1g2EyNLErQa61EkzMgJVwF%3Fsi%3Dsr1nFQhSQxuQfoguqaSrZg&feature=organic&_branch_match_id=1529303115872616880&_branch_referrer=H4sIAAAAAAAAA72NQQrCMBRET5MuW9qKC6GIaLsQFUrBhRuJ7U8aGvPjT0LVhWe3Cl5BmMUwj8f03lu3SBJn0SvxiLm1sVZmSJaWsAutL9CCiVg2E0HrcyBd9B%2BF5SuWVVM%2BOP7ZLV6nCaxy2MHUUpmVj8OupJrP03J47uX2OFYsr5xi%2BcZRaqq6b%2Bp7qAXKcOMNneT3i2t94e3wjz%2BWzU030TQSwH0gKJAkN6qNXgQCiJSR5wvh6ICKdU94hTcRfegNNQEAAA%3D%3D](https://open.spotify.com/episode/1g2EyNLErQa61EkzMgJVwF?si=sr1nFQhSQxuQfoguqaSrZg&nd=1&utm_medium=organic&product=open&%24full_url=https%3A%2F%2Fopen.spotify.com%2Fepisode%2F1g2EyNLErQa61EkzMgJVwF%3Fsi%3Dsr1nFQhSQxuQfoguqaSrZg&feature=organic&_branch_match_id=1529303115872616880&_branch_referrer=H4sIAAAAAAAAA72NQQrCMBRET5MuW9qKC6GIaLsQFUrBhRuJ7U8aGvPjT0LVhWe3Cl5BmMUwj8f03lu3SBJn0SvxiLm1sVZmSJaWsAutL9CCiVg2E0HrcyBd9B%2BF5SuWVVM%2BOP7ZLV6nCaxy2MHUUpmVj8OupJrP03J47uX2OFYsr5xi%2BcZRaqq6b%2Bp7qAXKcOMNneT3i2t94e3wjz%2BWzU030TQSwH0gKJAkN6qNXgQCiJSR5wvh6ICKdU94hTcRfegNNQEAAA%3D%3D "https://open.spotify.com/episode/1g2EyNLErQa61EkzMgJVwF?si=sr1nFQhSQxuQfoguqaSrZg&nd=1&utm_medium=organic&product=open&%24full_url=https%3A%2F%2Fopen.spotify.com%2Fepisode%2F1g2EyNLErQa61EkzMgJVwF%3Fsi%3Dsr1nFQhSQxuQfoguqaSrZg&feature=organic&_branch_matc")
In addition to campaign events, I’ve been doing other work in support of my community like attending a Span/ Meals on Wheels board meeting and working at my churches once a month drive through food pantry. It takes a lot to help meet the many needs of our neighbors.
In just 10 days, I’m excited to have our first episode of ‘Ernest Conversations’ with several other Democratic candidates in an online forum that you can enjoy from the comfort of your own home.
On January 20th, we will be hosting Democratic candidates Detrick Deburr (HD65) and Ray Stith (HD57) (online only). On February 15th, we will be hosting Vikki Goodwin, a four term Texas House Representative now running for Texas Lt. Governor. With likely another guest, also. This event will be available online, but also in person in Lewisville. Details TBA.
So, there’s a lot going on with many, many thanks to some key volunteers who have jumped in and really helped us pick up the pace. Volunteering is a lot like parenting, showing up and being there is the biggest first step.
**Less than Two Months until Primary Election Day 2026!
Our campaign is ready to go! Please join us and do your part.**
_Volunteer opportunities:_ I have sent out emails separately to those who have asked to be on our volunteer list. Here is the condensed version.
_Block Walking_ is the number one voter engagement activity that actually brings in voters to the campaign. It’s fun to get out and share our positive message in our neighborhoods.
For January, we will be walking the precincts that have been added to CD26 in the Southeast corner of Denton County. Dates include Sunday, January 11, and Saturdays, January 17, 24, 31. Meet at Noon at the ALDI parking lot, 3632 Frankford Rd, Dallas. We stop at 3 PM.
Use mobilize link to sign up: <https://www.mobilize.us/dentondemocrats/event/879778/>
We also have plans to block walk on Fridays, January 16, 23, and 30th from 11 am to 1 PM with Georgiana’s Vikki Goodwin Team.
And we plan to continue block walking in February and beyond.
_Placing Campaign signs_ is a simple way to help increase name recognition, message reach and reinforce that our campaign is asking for votes. We have a Signup Genius where you can take responsibility to help put signs out where they will be seen. This is in addition to signs in people’s yards, but they are mostly the same style of signs. Easy to install!
[https://www.signupgenius.com/go/805084DA8AD2DA64-61283442-lineberger#/](https://www.signupgenius.com/go/805084DA8AD2DA64-61283442-lineberger#/)
_Bumper Magnets:_ This is a great way to help increase name recognition and alert more voters to the upcoming election. These new and improved magnets will last 3 to 5 years outdoors. They are all Blue on a white background. Find me in person or send your contact information to arrange to get one. Then you can help spread our message while you drive safely around the district.
_Pos Cards:_ The postcards are on order (10,000 or them!). So far, 2,000 have been adopted. So, there are still plenty. If you would like to write postcards for Lineberger for US Congress, please email back to me the number of cards you are willing to do. Remember that this includes you providing the postage at about $0.61 each. That can add up to $61 to mail 100, so factor that into how many you are willing to do.
When they arrive, we’ll arrange to get them to you, along with enough names and addresses.
Then you write a few personal lines on each card. It can be the same on every card or you can mix it up. You can write the name and address on each card or use labels. Attach the postage and then return them to me.
I hope to get them in the mail by February 10th so that they have a week to get there before early voting.
So, for now, your job is to reply to me with how many postcards you can manage. Thanks!
**What’s Next?**
The Primary election is March 3, 2026 with early voting starting February 17, 2026 (~37 days away). We are going to push hard in the primary season to take every opportunity to get our message out.
Thank you so much for your continued support! We are building to make the 2026 election fall in the favor of the people.
Putting People’s Needs First,
Ernest Lineberger
Democratic Candidate for US House of Representatives (Texas CD26)
[LinebergerforUScongress.com](http://linebergerforuscongress.com/)
To unsubscribe simply reply “stop” to this email address

| | Patriot, It’s Mike Rogers.

I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails.

I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard.

I’m not supposed to share anything written.

[**But I wrote a personal note anyway... and it’s for you. clean_body: What I wrote cannot leak.| | | | | Patriot, It’s Mike Rogers. I’m writing to you directly because I don’t know who else I can trust right now. I just left a series of meetings that shook me: the kind of conversations that never make it into press briefings or fundraising emails. I’m not supposed to tell you what I heard. I’m not supposed to share anything written. Please understand: I’m asking you humbly to read it immediately. Quietly. I wouldn’t come to you like this if I had any other choice. — Mike Rogers Michigan U.S. Senate Candidate | | | Paid for by Rogers for Senate

So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and Motor City PAC today. Here’s the link again: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcpac-ossoff-bundling](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123091726/594328588/311687544?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk8-bu-group2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDUvMS84ODk5MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YzkzODMzNS02Y2VlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0AKlOMnRc9zwEXcDjaFKZ_U7fhP2d8Zx1jSSeNSoTFI=)**

Jon

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]
