The U.S. mining sector is entering a historic revival, and this company sits at the very center of it.| | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Trump just tapped a CEO to lead America’s mining comeback. body:
_Please read this note from my friend NY Governor Kathy Hochul, who has a critical update on her race. — Kirsten Gillibrand_
* * *
Let me pull back the curtain. — Trump's handpicked lackey, Bruce Blakeman, announced his campaign for Governor to turn New York red. — Special interest billionaires met with Trump at the White House to scheme to take me down. — And now, Blakeman launched $200,000 worth of TV attack ads against me — and I need your help fighting back. **[I'll get right to it: We can't let Blakeman's attacks go unanswered. So, could you pitch in $10 — or whatever you can — between my campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand before my first filing deadline of the year hits in 24 hours to help me fight back, counter the special interest cash, and put an end to Republicans' schemes? I'm counting on you more than you know. >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123092044/594329982/399819169?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2025.01.10_Kathy-Hochul-Split_B2_F1_S1_C1_90AC_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YWRhOTFiMy02ZmVlLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExMWY5MDMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6_gbTkjl_enlaJHxefYw_116fmcJe8_aYXU6W4QQGG4=)** Here's the deal: **Bruce Blakeman, Donald Trump, and their MAGA donors are plotting to flip New York red and unravel all the progress we've made.** I won't let that happen — but I can't fight back alone. So I need you to make a critical choice: We can either sit back, watch Bruce Blakeman and his MAGA donors flood this race with special interest cash, and put everything we've fought so hard for at risk... ...Or we can fight back with a surge of grassroots support before the filing deadline, hand Trump and Blakeman an embarrassing loss, and keep Republican extremism out of New York once and for all. **[So I'm humbly asking: Can I count on you to step up and split a $10 donation between myself and Kirsten Gillibrand before my first filing deadline of the year hits in 24 hours? name: Kathy Hochul
subject: Humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| I may have emailed you.
I may have texted you.
I may have even called you.

[But I’m humbly asking once more, and I’ll get straight to the point: Will you split a $10 donation between me and the Voter Protection Project before my first public filing deadline of the year tomorrow? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101044?t=6&akid=22568%2E878179%2EkHzDCV)

Team, let me explain.

My first filing deadline since Bruce Blakeman launched his campaign is tomorrow.

That means everyone — including Bruce Blakeman, Donald Trump, and their special interest donors — is watching to see if I have the support needed to defend this Governorship and keep New York from flipping red.

This is the **last chance** for grassroots supporters like you to show that you’re 100% in and behind my campaign to protect New York from Trump’s extremist agenda.

[So let’s finish my crucial filing deadline off strong to show reporters, political pundits, and Bruce Blakeman that I’m ready to win this race and defend New York from Republican extremism. So: Can I count on you to chip in $10 between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project before my critical deadline hits tomorrow? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101044?t=7&akid=22568%2E878179%2EkHzDCV) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Kathy Hochul and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101045?t=8&akid=22568%2E878179%2EkHzDCV)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101046?t=9&akid=22568%2E878179%2EkHzDCV)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/101044?t=12&akid=22568%2E878179%2EkHzDCV)
Ever upward,

Kathy
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Why bother with elections?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
“How we have to even run against these people—I won’t say cancel the election, they should cancel the election, because the fake news will say, ‘He wants the elections canceled. He’s a dictator.’ They always call me a dictator."
That was Donald Trump, Team, speaking to members of his party in the House of Representatives on the 5th anniversary of his supporters storming the Capitol to overturn an election he lost.
How many times has Trump "joked" about something he wanted to do before he did it? Too many to count, including weaponizing the government to attack his opponents, his attack on Venezuela, and his attacks on mail-in ballots.
Now, apparently, he's "joking" -- and not for the first time -- about canceling the upcoming midterm elections. It's a threat we all have to take seriously, regardless of party affiliation, because our country was founded on the idea that our voices matter, not just the voices of the powerful.
Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to help us protect our elections, defend vote by mail, and increase voter participation nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011026_1&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=011026_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=011026_1&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=011026_1&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=011026_1&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=011026_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=011026_1&amount=35]
How does Trump describe his opponents? “ They say that when you win the presidency you lose the midterm. I wish you could explain to me what the hell is going on with the mind of the public because we have the right policy. They don’t. They have a horrible policy. They do stick together. They’re violent, they’re vicious, you know. They’re vicious people .”
He -- and the MAGA propaganda movement at large -- keep saying, in essence, that anyone who doesn't agree with them is sub-human and anyone who doesn't vote for MAGA candidates has something wrong with them, so why bother having elections at all?
They're setting the stage by rewriting history. They're still trying to manufacture evidence to support their lies that the 2020 election was stolen. They've whitewashed the January 6th attack on the Capitol by saying that the police egged the protestors into violence. They're using the Civil Rights division of the Department of Justice to chase internet conspiracy theories. And they threaten investigations and subpoenas into anyone who tries to stop them.
Opponents of voting rights will go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and stay in power. Fight back with $25 or whatever you can to make every vote count in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=011026_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011026_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=011026_1&amount=20]

subject: popular drink linked to Alzheimer’s disease?
body:
Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *

|
Harvard Medical School has just revealed a disturbing link between a common drink and skyrocketing rates of Alzheimer's disease.

Because this everyday drink contains shocking levels of a toxic mineral that's present in nearly 98% of Alzheimer's patients' brains...

Can you guess which one it is?

[**A) Black Coffee (Colombian Beans)

B) White Wine (Chardonnay Grapes)

C) Diet Soda

D) Tap Water

E) Beer**](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/465710ba2be143e9a522fa445e3079a9-ef5b3911237a42e4aa6069deae0cda25/63)

Studies show that this toxic mineral builds in our brains over time...

Killing off an important molecule that's key for keeping our precious memories intact.

Which not only leads to forgetfulness and "senior moments" as you age...

But it's also a shocking newly discovered root cause of Alzheimer's disease.

[](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/465710ba2be143e9a522fa445e3079a9-ef5b3911237a42e4aa6069deae0cda25/63)

**If you think it's the drinks that contain alcohol...**

You might want to think again.

This will surprise you!

**[Click here to see this memory destroying drink now](https://click.em.dcdailyjournal.com/t/c/465710ba2be143e9a522fa445e3079a9-ef5b3911237a42e4aa6069deae0cda25/63)**.

Peter,

This is Newt Gingrich. [**_I’m writing to you with an URGENT WARNING._**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/apBh_4Frb6TGiWot2brs6BUgYRxkyGWo8D2nm-X98qxptnS2ESv0eaQmduvWNsDkfb4Ha52kLICoJcLNx4sZxNagIflDWeC4GIq2DqPzDPMxZUT1Ld5auYEIATMzYXNy9BSknQLvI-yZcHKUETJ1GYSVubZdhlZoV24Jr1tYZwJsxgwG6tELEaXsWBlaoadk8EcZk8IuJxupx4HWDjh57ACwJ5LS54Epwzt-UuBQrC6BUQanBe0qvU0a2sOtj8ExO3-tBC4l-yTTs6hBkmY7yg8J-na9t5YJpmrpDe2xLCXTXTFKPYqem5YNTCfVLOo3zj9_f5T9KW0dNnZ8XBRaF1FBAt7zsG7sZHL96n_H_V0hwCvFTjH1tbhF7GyDtQHqfzbStM_5grXW-aF0up9dHa8015lES972WHQe-IKYW62VD3PfoKZcRQaO2hQJCwI1XU6dxdYUdueFyrRODCzacukkjvfwH7R0hpXt3nP36VuTUctd93Hk8701ymO5AnQCLFGPdLxL1q3jTH7XpXGZSdAxwwxluae3Lk-wGcaKhR_unRCkCkkh1tkREQ31Year7VMU5fwe_z7ua9ijLe0pYqXmTpzvbtb2o0M9cZv0LnD8YjCcA6aZ8BBdlQ4yPAf5W0ljZUu453YiCS45iKYMMPgWg43Ggj5JZpzK0zVjL70Ic8L3vnhboJ6xtLdZ-ah1X3oNeUSu-Vt0YRz1iQxyfLBDVW6lErkhYdJMiV85DdcywbppozQQpZ6E59e7Iy1lgqqXoe7rc3F6mgJfQEM7PP54IfCCcbUXsVyxA-i05NOnV3hjqRN-Mo-WyE-K5wHTXKHl71A6UXHupEkq1XnXHLU4tSwWd2p2PBImg6EZ4TF0ImucsM9KV6qTEsKOOE7Du1pAFoh3h11JN2pUSvoyBqmpoweL9gL631jQClw/PM6-6iVCW0MK6qbibp3iodjTdIBNCDrN/16)

I've been in Republican politics for decades, and I know when one race carries the weight of the entire country. Today, that race is in **Georgia**.

The media won't say it. The Left is trying to hide it. But trust me, [**this is the most important election in America.**](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/YjP-YU8ScmhyvM9eI85-yiLbyB3NT4ZBI1aFgssxbA54Dl7UKM4A1mWK8tR3crum4w7nKHzX4mpXtLHSNTAIHP72JOUBiJE-X5gFr-GfdgxBHbEYw5f6oN-Gu6Huyyott9Ii_I9QiYjLmx2l2E5Z359xNQNk72-m538Eaa7SKGU6EKcI-qvx1iAQv4MqMs6HcPcxiZI9h24yng30SeBJh_ePknQlcb-Kf8k895KZRJu0m0bOQRsfYFCwcU08A1IEyn4Hejn6qZHdHCdA4cmQTRR-3my87uAzipC5hL0NMGKA6_JLXWSJZy6jDtpMH-j2AViQA_fL0MoN5r-iSThorGNNoEdm6QffilwJzD-dyUf3aNy02YNsdtUR_j8h8BfV6QOjwJfvxA4cg9oqFPJ0nSMXrGMznSW-DX5Sg1a4xliIs5hygbXp9FB2F5PSyJxlF3Vhz5HZEDM245Rb3gLmM9uZZPBfBps_u8WkBy4hGgZ9aYyLHb8I5ExxYXwYy61-nqaMOqeW3Qta009j6L69fIi-FSr_9jFxIRQaRMa0BS1Y41sjSM_RiSELZk0-aI0f6Z4nTnrReyeTuMStnyNfn0566WV5UkngO6ijSLB2wOiBFi6pvTVcpc5pdKp31cVDzaQvUH_xsRRDFnQmdeCyFAxTfewQljLF5hFBHmlBXwMsG2qqc4zTHicgk8Ovu66BZ513blTdPScnWlIYJh0kO_v3B0brlx3XN4LljzTbJN74K9tklyNnvKQxkVkeoDMUyc7759J2UkyZP7ywDC5mJXmp75hC1v7oNXbaCtdS10wsh64RBpnXvh9jewpsY0SyzZxEU6XdlVXiav6GQd9iXfPiz76T2Q5udR2oTn81rXy6WsPLgwGzzf_wBr6PfqXerHAw5X5B1hpceOl11lOOBFmx424T6ARdT_7wjzc/RGZS8h3vYDLXIkz9E4j6_rp_NbpRSIHu/16)

Here's the truth:

* Jon Ossoff is Chuck Schumer's golden boy.
* He's voted with the D.C. swamp every single time.
* And if he wins re-election, Schumer takes the Senate majority.

That means:

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Jasmine Crockett and James Talarico
body:
I’m proud to have support from both candidates.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
I know the Texas Senate race is on a lot of Democrats’ minds right now — and for good reason. We’ve got two extremely qualified candidates in the March primary.
I have served in the state legislature with Jasmine Crockett and James Talarico, and count them both as friends. I’m honored to have each of their endorsements in my race to defeat Greg Abbott in the November election.
I tell everyone — I’m Team Jasarico.
No matter who you’re supporting, here’s something we all agree on:
**Democrats need to win the Senate race _AND_ the governor’s seat this year.**
**[Will you make a $5 contribution right now, split between my campaign and the fund for the eventual Democratic nominee for the Senate race?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260110_1_senate.hqlks1&refcode=em20260110-394&amount=5&t=1&akid=394%2E299639%2Em9tqZw)**
John Cornyn, Ken Paxton, and Wesley Hunt, three politicians every bit as extreme as Greg Abbott, are vying for the Senate nomination on the Republican side.
We _must_ beat Abbott and whichever radical candidate the GOP nominates for the Senate. We can’t afford more failed leadership from far-right Texas Republicans.
Texas deserves leaders focused on strong public schools, lower costs, and a government that works for the people — not corporations and billionaires.
**That’s the leadership we’ll deliver when we defeat Greg Abbott and the GOP.**
**[If you’re with us, we need your support right now. Pitch in $5 or whatever you can, split between my campaign and the Democratic Senate nominee fund.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260110_1_senate.hqlks1&refcode=em20260110-394&amount=5&t=2&akid=394%2E299639%2Em9tqZw)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260110_1_senate.hqlks1&amount=5&refcode=em20260110-394&t=21&akid=394%2E299639%2Em9tqZw)
Thank you for supporting the Texas Democratic ticket. Let’s win these fights.
— Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260110-1&t=22&refcode2=394_299639_m9tqZw&akid=394%2E299639%2Em9tqZw)
---
Email us: [info@ginafortexas.com](mailto:info@ginafortexas.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_gov/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ginafortexas.com/signup/update-your-information_gov/?t=23&akid=394%2E299639%2Em9tqZw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ginafortexas.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_gov/?t=24&akid=394%2E299639%2Em9tqZw)

Pol. Ad. paid by Gina Hinojosa Campaign

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Can I count on you, Peter??
body:
$15, Peter.
That’s how much I’m asking you to chip in today to help us reach our $25,000 goal and win in Ohio. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3] Can I count on you? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
CHIP IN NOW >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-sherrod?refcode=120225_3]
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could guarantee we flip this Senate seat and defeat my opponent, wouldn’t you donate immediately?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could help us fight back against misleading attack ads and reach more voters with the truth, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew that by giving $15 now, you could make real progress for working people and upend a status quo that only serves billionaires and big corporations, wouldn’t it be the best $X you ever spent?
I know that $15 doesn’t feel like it can do all of these things and more. But in a race like this, every dollar counts.
But by the time you get to this point in the email, thousands of folks have already given their $15 – and now, they’re counting on you to do the same.

subject: You won’t read this from anyone else
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
This might be surprising. But it’s the truth.
#
You won’t see this message from anyone else in your inbox today:
**2026 is NOT the most important election of our lifetimes.**
That might be surprising to hear. But it’s the truth, Peter...
**The most important election will happen in 2028 – when we will restore our democracy by electing a Democrat to lead our country.**
But let’s be clear: _That will not be possible if we don’t build momentum and support strong Democrats up and down the ballot in 2026._
**Winning BIG this year will set the stage for what’s to come.** And Peter, today we’re asking for your help to do exactly that.
**[Will you support Democrats running in competitive races across the United States by chipping in $15 or whatever works best for you today? Your donation today, while it’s still early, will play a critical role in choosing the leaders who shape our country over the weeks, months, and years ahead.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99446?refcode=em20260110-9933&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9933%2E614464%2EMRZUWF)**

name: Jasmine Clark
subject: I need to be clear with you about what RFK Jr. is doing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk]
Science is under attack at the highest levels of our government — and if we don’t stop it now, patients, families, and children will pay the price.
I’m Dr. Jasmine Clark — a scientist, a professor, and a candidate for Congress — and I need to be very clear with you about what’s happening.
Under RFK Jr., political ideology is being elevated above evidence-based medicine.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk]
Thousands of scientists and public health professionals have been fired. Billions of dollars in lifesaving research have been frozen or canceled. Vaccine guidance is being rewritten without new data. Decades of settled science are being treated as optional.
That’s not reform. That’s sabotage.
I’ve spent my career teaching students how to evaluate evidence, how to separate facts from misinformation, and how to protect public health using rigorous science. What we’re seeing right now is the opposite of that standard — and it’s dangerous.
When vaccine confidence collapses, children get sick.
When research funding disappears, cures are delayed.
When politics replaces science, people die.
That’s why I’m running.
I won’t sit quietly while our public health institutions are hollowed out from the inside. I won’t allow misinformation to replace medical consensus. And I won’t pretend that “disruption” is acceptable when it puts lives at risk.
But standing up to this takes resources. It takes organizing. It takes a campaign strong enough to tell the truth — clearly, calmly, and backed by evidence — even when that truth is inconvenient. So I need your help.
If you believe science should guide health policy...
If you believe doctors and researchers should not be sidelined for political gain...
If you believe families deserve facts, not fear...
...Then please chip in today to support this campaign. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk]
Together, we can protect public health, defend scientific integrity, and lead with knowledge instead of noise.
With determination and clarity,
Dr. Jasmine Clark
Democrat for Congress, GA-13
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260110em-rfk]
https://www.facebook.com/ [https://www.facebook.com/] https://twitter.com/ [https://twitter.com/] https://instagram.com/ [https://instagram.com/] https://www.linkedin.com/ [https://www.linkedin.com/]

Jasmine Clark for Georgia

Lilburn, GA 30048
United States

name: Team Cooper
subject: They must have forgotten about us, Peter 🫠
body:
Why is everything more expensive? Oh, right...
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=325%2E124072%2EUHWtZf)
It's been about a year since Republicans took full control of Washington, and Peter... _working families are being left behind._ Grocery prices on everything from beef to orange juice are up from over a year ago. Global tariffs will cost households an additional $1,400 on average this year. And instead of working to lower costs, **Washington Republicans spent last year passing tax cuts for billionaires and allowing our health care premiums to skyrocket.** **[Roy is tired of watching the wealthy and well-connected get ahead on the backs of working families. If you are too, chip in $5 ASAP to help Roy start off 2026 strong and WIN this Senate race in November>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3780?amount=5&t=7&akid=325%2E124072%2EUHWtZf)** _**Here's what Roy will fight for in Washington:**_ | 👉 **Making health care affordable and accessible —** Roy fought like hell to pass Medicaid Expansion in North Carolina, delivering coverage for 700,000+ people. In the Senate, he'll protect Medicaid and work to bring down the cost of prescription drugs and insurance premiums.
---
👉 **Lowering costs for working families —** As Governor, Roy focused on making life more affordable for North Carolinians. He raised pay for teachers, successfully helped clear more than $6.5 billion in medical debt for more than 2.5 million people, and made historic investments to stabilize and keep child care centers open so parents can continue working.
---
👉 **Investing in good-paying jobs and a strong economy —** Roy knows that building a strong economy means creating good-paying jobs right here in America — 640,000 of them during his time as governor. He'll fight for investments that bring opportunity to every corner of this country.
---
Peter, this race is about whether Washington works for everyday people or just the powerful. You already know whose side Michael Whatley is on (*cough cough* Big Oil and Gas, pharmaceutical companies *cough cough*) — so **electing Roy Cooper to the Senate is CRITICAL to making America affordable again.**
**[Whatley has wealthy GOP donors in his pocket. Roy has US. Pitch in any amount right now to help Roy win this Senate seat and put Washington back to work for working families>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3780?t=8&akid=325%2E124072%2EUHWtZf)**

Thanks for being in this fight,
Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

name: Steve Scalise
subject: I tried to mail this to your house:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
clean_body: I tried to mail this to your house, Peter - but I never heard back from you. It's House Majority Leader Steve Scalise. I'm sending this message directly to your inbox because you are one of our top Patriots in your state. I know this is longer than our usual messages, but please take a moment to read it from start to finish - and please don't forget to Thank you for everything you do. \- Steve Scalise ORIGINAL MESSAGEPATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION SURVEY You have been selected to participate in this important nationwide PATRIOT VOTER VERIFICATION survey project. I offered to conduct this project as part of our Republican Party's mission to ensure that every single patriotic American citizen is registered to vote and fully empowered to guide our nation's future. Your record stands out as a proud American, law-abiding taxpayer, and a registered voter living in: your state. Please ensure our records are as accurate as possible by completing the VERIFICATION SURVEY below. You are identified as a loyal patriot, so I am really counting on your prompt response. This project's results will be incomplete if we don't hear from you. And frankly, with everything at stake, your voice is urgently needed in our country's system of self-government. As House Majority Leader, I am proud of everything I am doing to help President Trump enact his America First agenda. And I will not stop. Not ever. But the Democrats are spreading lies about the policies and getting their base of supporters riled up. We've already seen left-wing "resistance" activists in communities across the country (including near your part of your state). And we are seeing Democrat Party committees and liberal PACs smashing fundraising records. All due to anti-Trump hatred. If loyal patriots can't organize and mobilize on our own, the Woke Democrats will take back power and shut down our MAGA agenda. And they will spend President Trump's final two years in office attacking him with more Witch Hunts and impeachment drives. That is why your immediate response is so important, Peter. I was honored to be selected by my colleagues to serve as Majority Leader. But I do not lead "from the top down." I listen to the grassroots . . . to patriotic men and women like you who love our country, share my conservative values, and want the best for our kids and grandkids. And I am confident that the best way to strengthen our movement - and score big victories at the polls in 2026 - is by continuing to work shoulder to shoulder with you and other caring citizens. To defeat the Woke Left and pass the rest of President Trump's MAGA agenda, we'll need REAL Americans to vote in large numbers. And we'll need them to cast informed votes. That means pushing back against left-wing propaganda at every turn through next November. So please complete your VERIFICATION SURVEY and submit it TODAY. And when you respond, I urge you to include one important gift of $250, $100, $50, $35, or any amount you can spare to my campaign. As I push the Trump Agenda through the House, forcing tough, narrow votes and speaking up for facts and the truth, I am coming under relentless attack from the left-wing campaign machine. So please complete our voter verification survey as soon as possible. And don't forget to include your important gift of $250, $100, $50, or $35. Every dollar will fuel my fight to pass more pro-America policies and mobilize a surge of MAGA voters to the polls next year. Thank you and God bless! Steve ScaliseHouse Majority Leader Q1. Are you a registered voter in your state?. Do you intend to vote in the 2026 midterm elections?. Did you vote in person in the 2024 presidential election?. Do you want your state's law enforcement officials to cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), when it comes to detaining illegal aliens? - HOW IMPORTANT IS IT THAT YOUR PUBLIC OFFICIALS WORK TO: 1\. Secure the border.\. Protect parents' rights.\. Cut the debt.\. Stop socialism. \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration\- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:| | | | Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC. Team Scalise is committed to restoring a Conservative House majority and electing Conservatives across the country. Thank you for being a part of our movement. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a member of the Team Scalise Conservative grassroots network. Contributions to TEAM SCALISE, or any participating committee, are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, national banks, labor unions, foreign nationals without "green cards," and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and employer of each individual who contributes over $200 in a calendar year. You can donate via mail by sending a check to: 320 First Street SE 2nd Floor Washington, DC 20003 |

Already, it’s looking like 2026 will be a hectic and lengthy legislative season — meaning it might be a while before the congressional maps for the midterm election this November are set.
We know that Donald Trump and his allies across the country are going to extreme lengths to keep their grip on power. They've stooped to new lows, including bribery and extortion, to pressure state lawmakers to fall in line.
But as Donald Trump’s pressure campaign gets increasingly desperate, the American people are resisting this democratic crisis. In states like Indiana, voters rose up and persuaded a bipartisan majority of state senators to reject the extreme Republican gerrymander. In Missouri, 300,000 citizens signed petitions to put their gerrymandered map on the ballot to fight to restore a fair congressional map.
**This is a fight we can win — we can stop Republicans from rigging the midterm elections. But it will take all of us working together.**
[**We know that as soon as legislative sessions begin, extreme lawmakers will push gerrymandered maps forward. Help us prepare for the fights ahead and equip us with the resources necessary to fight back, anywhere and everywhere.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/123092797/594332669/1128139581?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_LegSessionsBegun_email_20260110-NDRC-Tier1-LegSessionsBegun_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260110-NDRC-Tier1-LegSessionsBegun_&utm_campaign=LegSessionsBegun&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImYyZGZhMDE1LTc4ZWUtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTExZjkwMyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OslgSCWBTfCRIGZgw2P7MP7JDgI3DLGTO_aJYqyc5sA=)
Thank you for being with us in this fight — more to come from us soon.
Marina Jenkins
Executive Director
National Democratic Redistricting Committee

clean_body: Your donation is an investment in ensuring Republican power grabs fail. | Peter, Florida and South Carolina’s state legislative sessions will start in just a few days — opening the door for Republicans to push new attempts to redraw congressional maps. Our work to stop Republicans’ attempts to rig our maps before the 2026 midterms is full steam ahead. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Already, it’s looking like 2026 will be a hectic and lengthy legislative season — meaning it might be a while before the congressional maps for the midterm election this November are set. We know that Donald Trump and his allies across the country are going to extreme lengths to keep their grip on power. They've stooped to new lows, including bribery and extortion, to pressure state lawmakers to fall in line. But as Donald Trump’s pressure campaign gets increasingly desperate, the American people are resisting this democratic crisis. In states like Indiana, voters rose up and persuaded a bipartisan majority of state senators to reject the extreme Republican gerrymander. In Missouri, 300,000 citizens signed petitions to put their gerrymandered map on the ballot to fight to restore a fair congressional map. This is a fight we can win — we can stop Republicans from rigging the midterm elections. But it will take all of us working together. = Thank you for being with us in this fight — more to come from us soon. It's 2026. Will this be another year where your health goals fall apart by February?
Or will this be the year they actually stick?
The difference isn't motivation. It's having the energy to follow through.
Think about it.
If you feel sluggish, everything feels harder...
You stare at your running shoes and talk yourself out of it.
By 3 PM you're already counting the hours until bed.
You swap a healthy lunch for whatever's fastest and easiest.
Not because you quit. Because your body doesn't have enough fuel.
**A Morning Ritual That Supports Your Energy**
That's why I take Berberine Breakthrough every morning.
It helps support healthy blood sugar already within the normal range and metabolism for steadier daily energy.
So your mornings feel more manageable without three cups of coffee to function.
Your afternoons don't end in a slump that derails your plans.
Your health goals don't lose momentum because you ran out of steam halfway through the day.
When energy stays steady, everything shifts.
Healthy choices don't feel like torture.

subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...
body:

---
| | Patriot,
---
| | Charlie would have wanted you to have this.

Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book.

The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice.

This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans.

**Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. **

Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children.

By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: _**" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." **_

His book, _**Stop, in the Name of God**_ is the fruit of that conviction.
---
[](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19492d89e99e4c88a2dd836e9693b41c&_e=nKE3XwSoBYuuacYNhVZ_VJGWqdPo7owsFRPHmXRN4cBt0_pass2Kx8yJJ9LqMutMlrNOem9jlYPQJIsgbFFy7Ezh8FL5hitot1UhazBibdKb3l5HnGoqN3Dt0D8GdcliX8wuT6rUsxaB8cydsMJAeU0MH6ZawXWdpU_enWQ0tSAVQF87NuiRTg6NInm6kEIaMu0K5ZU0C_FbcltQkFNKWISAH-ntqYO7ss-WVOjNPzUVElWhzN50Jpk_sN9B_l6LxJdIWnrDa3QcOYgMZL6hwLVk2cklnEFRZBip-_w_w3OS5WO9_uTTXVzE2Kt5uiQP-qxSw62__3byIxwNpgAIO7i3GmU7OtBnXq6t2csW4y8zV0BDO-OL6Li1reG6Hm-aLMvEZzz-4YUNfJK129O6jPl5c2aktR4PCsA8ZXpQUrhfq04sIa8_XDTxq3vUXGopF-j06unz77uW_iuegcAeDvt8SksoxOiQ05tS3fgAx_lGlSmDEYUNXSP-jO-qBidZgNZW6t-1vsmW0LFy7ClUjdPH9_M6bBFOVAMQ500n_be4WSbty8VDAYBx7V2t0xLi4ELetgSVJdRwIiqIBT_92tjWaUl4rNdD7pYlIBAE47X25-vt3828-_stiEYqkePnnl8EjWxeJAvyEuCG9fOmAMLo7ihf0fZFFDBiDe8Zr99OhVaJK3G98xVuI6Z1_NqZ)
---
When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family.

Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive...

A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us.

I believe you will find this book inspiring.

Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life.

**[To claim your copy of this life-changing book, simply make a generous gift in any amount to Turning Point USA today.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=19492d89e99e4c88a2dd836e9693b41c&_e=nKE3XwSoBYuuacYNhVZ_VJGWqdPo7owsFRPHmXRN4cBt0_pass2Kx8yJJ9LqMutMlrNOem9jlYPQJIsgbFFy7Ezh8FL5hitot1UhazBibdKb3l5HnGoqN3Dt0D8GdcliX8wuT6rUsxaB8cydsMJAeU0MH6ZawXWdpU_enWQ0tSAVQF87NuiRTg6NInm6kEIaMu0K5ZU0C_FbcltQkFNKWISAH-ntqYO7ss-WVOjNPzUt4v04BJQIJTFmFiBPfMJMBqik2Z13Vqx6aFUbCd4bDhVHgUCwOSa2WDCOBeRuMbvDyprgtZmkBxM7fOcjHzlnb1cPUarhyMyI0u23iVxISeJeNnn5UDj9UO0RXnaHDz31KZ6jJrL_60uw-kdGr5nizerUwFlqIu61WSldiYl-TiMEjeh6_wck6v7XFqQuqt36UoWOmM-aXweaZHv5Hn_TdZzuB3MXPclpZUF_VCpakW7cea_585lUwE3v137s4GyU3gPLT4AYc9VThEfI4ogA1OlFFUJHKxuLVEsSxrJOLhWdoQ_DW4fCeNeFYWvMCaCUVOKQ8Mn5yKi0pqCyNmuuIuArFn-GdxQynhUSAPnOsW2OqhINS0rnPGEvMdGrRQRTVmyQv69JJm9QSaSISe0eivLZd46pFC4gOE7J3UiiMillnmhHWXhwabMSt8_xwpRUVp_B_2TdaMN8U6ZX5vO6)**

In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans...

...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- _**it 's the message of FAITH! **_

In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God.

Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. _And it 's happening. _

After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country.

What we're witnessing is not just growth --**it 's revival. **

At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old.

We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families.

We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message.

You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie.

**But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. **

All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, _" We're not backing down." _

This is what Charlie prayed for.

I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too.

None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, **_so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. _**

Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God.

clean_body: A sacred routine meant to draw us| | | | | Patriot, | | Charlie would have wanted you to have this. Before his September 10th assassination, Charlie had just put the finishing touches on a very important book. His final book. The topic is one that Charlie found to be crucial for every human to understand and practice. This isn't a book about public policy or political discourse, nor is it simply about passing on values of patriotism to young Americans. Instead, this book is about something far deeper and more personal -- the importance of honoring the Sabbath and resting in God's grace. Despite his hectic schedule and full life, Charlie was committed to setting aside an entire day each week to rest, to pray, and to give undivided attention to God, Erika, and his children. By honoring the Sabbath, Charlie lived out a powerful message: " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." His book, Stop, in the Name of God is the fruit of that conviction. When you read it, you will hear Charlie's voice inviting you to reclaim something our fast-paced culture has essentially erased: a time for rest, a time devoted to God, and time with family. Charlie's hope was for each of us to rediscover the Sabbath as he did: not as a burden to bear, but as a gift to receive... A sacred routine meant to draw us nearer to God, to steady our hearts with His peace, and renew our strength for the battles to which He calls us. I believe you will find this book inspiring. Charlie wanted everyone to have this book because its message meant so much in his own life. In the months since Charlie's assassination, there has been a massive surge of interest in Turning Point USA's message among young Americans... ...and it's not just the conservative message as a whole -- it 's the message of FAITH! In recent months, I have heard countless stories of people who have answered Charlie's call to attend a Bible study, start a family, and pray to God. Charlie devoted so much of his time urging people to build strong families, to go to church, and to stand up for America. And it 's happening. After years of witnessing declining church attendance, we are now seeing Americans filling the pews in huge numbers across the country. What we're witnessing is not just growth --it 's revival. At Turning Point USA, we are dedicated and honored to continue strengthening the faith of Americans, young and old. We are building a coalition of truth-preaching churches that stand firm against cultural compromise, defend biblical values, and strengthen families. We are training pastors, uniting congregations, and, of course, reaching the next generation on campuses across the country with this same message. You might feel disheartened by the evil in our culture and by the unthinkable assassination of Charlie. But America 's faithful are waking up. The youth are waking up. America is waking up. All across this nation, pastors are linking arms, young believers are finding their voice, and families are saying, " We're not backing down." This is what Charlie prayed for. I see this book as one of Charlie's most enduring gifts to the world, and I know you will too. None of us knew how brief his time on earth would be. But the truths written in this book are timeless. They will outlive us all, and most importantly, so will the legacy of Charlie 's faith. Charlie lived life at a relentless pace, but he also understood the sacred value of stillness. Through it all, his gaze was fixed on eternity with God. I'll personally ensure your copy is sent to you as soon as possible. Thank you in advance for carrying on Charlie's mission and supporting his legacy. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. When you read Stop, in the Name of God, you will discover what Charlie found in the Sabbath: a holy rest that steadies the heart, renews the soul, and gives strength for the road ahead. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044
